name: Adhesive remover / 1 Gal
description: Pure-grade industrial solvent that removes adhesives, glue, gum, stickers, decals, and road tar. Trusted by professionals for maximum cleaning power.

specs.overview: P&S Solvent X is a powerful, pure-grade industrial solvent formulated to tackle stubborn adhesives, gum, grease, and grime. This versatile adhesive remover effortlessly dissolves glue, over-spray, road tar, stickers, decals, and more, leaving surfaces clean and residue-free. It is the go-to choice for general-purpose cleaning and degreasing in automotive detailing, workshops, and job sites. Superior strength and effectiveness make it essential for demanding industrial and commercial applications.
specs.pro_tips: Always test in an inconspicuous area first to ensure compatibility with the surface. Use in well-ventilated areas. Flammable product - requires freight transportation.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers, automotive shops, and DIY users who need to remove stubborn adhesive residues, decals, stickers, and tar from vehicle surfaces and trim without harsh scrubbing.
key_features: Removes adhesives, glue, gum, stickers, and decals
Ready to use - no dilution required
specs.application_method: Apply P&S Solvent X directly to adhesive or decal residue. Allow product to dwell for a few minutes to break down the residue. Gently scrape or wipe away softened residue with a plastic scraper or cloth. Repeat as needed for stubborn residues. Clean surface with appropriate cleaner to remove any remaining residue.

name: 5" Foam Blue HD Polishing Pad
description: Professional foam polishing pad designed for dual action and rotary polishers to remove light to moderate paint defects.

specs.overview: Buff & Shine foam polishing pads are manufactured with precision using European prepolymer foam construction. These pads feature superior quality and craftsmanship with consistently cut sidewalls and heat-resistant adhesive backing. Designed for use with dual action polishers including Porter-Cable 7424XP, Meguiars G110V2, and Flex XC 3401 VRG models.
specs.pro_tips: Use with backing plate number 500Y for flexible performance. Clean thoroughly between uses and replace when foam begins to deteriorate.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts seeking to remove light defects, polish paint surfaces, and achieve high-quality finishes on automotive paint and clear coat.
key_features: Compatible with DA and rotary polishers
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care and cleaning
specs.application_method: Attach to 5" backing plate on dual action or rotary polisher. Apply appropriate polish and work at recommended speeds.

name: 1/4 Female Brass Socket Quick Connect
description: Brass quick connector component for foam cannons used in pressure washing applications, featuring 1/4″ (6.35mm) brass socket quick coupler and female thread fitting.

specs.overview: This connector allows for a secure and efficient attachment between the foam cannon and the pressure washer gun or wand, facilitating easy setup and operation. The Pressure Washer Brass Quick Coupler With Ball Lock Design For A Secure Connection. Made from durable brass and designed to handle pressures up to 5,000 PSI, it's an excellent choice for professional pressure washing setups that require frequent and secure connections.
specs.pro_tips: Used anywhere high-pressure connections are frequently assembled and disassembled. Its reliable sealing and EPDM O-ring ensure leak-free operation even under demanding conditions.
specs.use_case: This connector is primarily used to quickly and securely attach a foam cannon or foam lance directly to a pressure washer spray gun or wand, enabling efficient foam application. Quick connect fittings are used to connect pressure washer hoses, wands, and/or pressure washer nozzles quickly and easily without the use of tools.
key_features: Made of premium quality and durable brass
Ball lock design ensures a solid connection and prevents water leakage
Superior resistance to rust and corrosion
specs.coverage_yield: Built for long-lasting performance with up to 5000 psi working pressure for a long lifetime
specs.application_method: Universal Quick Release Pressure Washer Coupler, Easy To Connect, and Disconnect Spray Guns Or Nozzles. Easy to assemble and disassemble the high power washer connections in lots of situations.

name: C4 Permanent Trim Restorer / 30ml
description: An advanced trim restorer that bonds to exterior plastic surfaces at a molecular level, providing a natural finish with no oily buildup.

specs.overview: Engineered with advanced smart surface science, this trim restorer bonds to your vehicle's exterior plastic surfaces at a molecular level—offering results that look better and last longer. C4 is an exceptionally thin (circa 30nm) optically clear film which means that it does not add an unattractive gloss film to the surface instead it restores all but the most faded trim to an as new condition. When applied correctly, C4 can provide up to two years of protection from UV rays, fading, and the elements—far outperforming most plastic restorer or trim dressing products.
specs.pro_tips: Ensure that the surface to be coated is entirely free from fats/oils or previously applied products – clean trim vigorously with a 1:10 dilution of Gtechniq W2 Universal Cleaner. If coating heavily textured trim you need to ensure that all coating residue is fully removed from the deep crevices of your trim as if not it may turn into an unsightly white powdery residue in the crevices.
specs.use_case: Works across a wide range of plastic surfaces, including textured rubber and exterior car trim, such as rear bumpers, door handles, and any vinyl surface.
key_features: Natural finish with no oily buildup
Up to two years of protection from UV rays, fading, and the elements
Up to 2 years durability from a single application
specs.coverage_yield: 30ml bottle is recommended for vehicles with larger areas of trim that need coating such as vehicles with black plastic bumpers
specs.application_method: Clean plastic surfaces thoroughly and ensure they're dry. Apply the product to a microfiber applicator pad and spread it evenly across the trim piece. Allow it to cure in a well ventilated area, away from direct sunlight, and wipe off any excess with a clean cloth or microfiber towel. Allow C4 to cure for 12 hours before exposing your trim to outdoor conditions for optimal results.

name: Assorted Scents/ Air Fresheners/ Black Glacier/ 8oz
description: Renegade Detailer Series 8oz air freshener with masculine Black Glacier scent that neutralizes vehicle odors with premium fragrance oils.

specs.overview: The Renegade Detailer Series Black Glacier Air Freshener is a liquid odor eliminator formulated with premium-grade fragrance oils. Unlike aerosol sprays, this formula neutralizes unwanted odors rather than masking them, delivering a controlled fine mist that evenly disperses fragrance throughout vehicle interiors. Each 8 oz bottle provides long-lasting scent that refreshes and revitalizes cabin air, perfect for daily drivers and professional fleets.
specs.pro_tips: For pet odors, repeat application after pets have been in vehicle. For smokers, apply weekly to neutralize new odors over time. Use with A/C recirculation for optimal scent distribution throughout cabin.
specs.use_case: Designed for vehicle interiors to neutralize odors caused by food, pets, smoke, or general mustiness. Professional detailers and vehicle owners use this to refresh and maintain pleasant-smelling vehicle cabins.
specs.coverage_yield: Typically several days depending on airflow and environment
specs.application_method: Shake well before use. Set vehicle A/C to maximum and recirculate mode. Spray 3-5 times under glove compartment and above pedals on each side. Can also be sprayed into air or onto fabric surfaces like carpets and floor mats. Allow scent to disperse naturally. Avoid direct contact with plastic or leather surfaces.

name: Premium Rolling Detailing Cart
description: Metal rolling cart with three recessed tiers for tool storage and organization, featuring durable wheels and casters for easy mobility during car detailing.

specs.overview: The Metal Rolling Detailing Cart offers durability and longevity due to metal construction with anticorrosive coating and ample storage space with three recessed tiers and many slots and racks for various detailing tools. Maximizes mobility and control through durable wheels and casters, making the detailing process effortless.
specs.pro_tips: The easy-to-reach polisher holder keeps your polisher conveniently placed wherever you go.
specs.use_case: Designed for professional detailers and DIY enthusiasts who need mobile storage for washing, claying, polishing, or waxing vehicles.
key_features: Three recessed tiers with multiple slots and racks
Durable wheels and casters for mobility
specs.coverage_yield: Assembled with approximately 60 screws and bolts for durability
specs.application_method: Assemble the cart and organize tools across three tiers of shelves and tool slots for convenient access during detailing work.

name: Wonder Wafer/ 250ct Wild Cherry
description: Non-wrapped wafer air fresheners with 250 count per canister. Provides long-lasting wild cherry scent for cars, homes, offices, and other enclosed spaces.

specs.overview: Wonder Wafers are patented, ultra-scented solid wafer air fresheners designed for professional and consumer use. Each canister contains 250 non-wrapped wafers that release fragrance evenly over several days. They are air-activated, environmentally friendly, contain zero carcinogens, and eliminate the mess and spill concerns of liquid fresheners.
specs.pro_tips: Position wafers near air vents to help circulate scent throughout the vehicle or space. Keep the canister lid tightly closed when not in use to preserve product freshness.
specs.use_case: For professional detailers, car dealerships, and consumers looking for a cost-effective, mess-free air freshening solution that can be placed in vehicles, homes, offices, boats, and RVs.
specs.coverage_yield: 250 wafers per canister; releases fragrance evenly over several days
specs.application_method: Open the canister. Place 1-2 wafers under the front seat and on top of the carpet of any automobile, boat, RV, or other enclosed space. Keep the lid closed when not in use.

name: Clay Lubricant / 16 oz
description: DS Clay Lubricant provides lubrication during the claying process to prevent scratching and marring from clay bars, mitts, pads, or towels.

specs.overview: DS Clay Lubricant is used as lubrication in the claying process to prevent scratching. This product works with traditional clay bars, clay mitts, clay pads or clay towels. Use straight without dilution.
specs.use_case: For professional and DIY detailers who need a dedicated lubricant to safely use clay decontamination tools without damaging the paint surface.
key_features: Works with all clay tool types
specs.application_method: Spray onto the surface before using clay bar, mitt, pad, or towel. Use straight without dilution.

name: All Shine Dressing / 1 Gal
description: P&S Shine All is a water-based performance dressing that delivers a deep, long-lasting gloss on tires, trim, and interior surfaces without the mess.

specs.overview: Shine All truly outperforms competitive water based tire dressings and was built specifically for use as a high performance tire dressing. The fast-drying formula sets up quickly to reduce sling and dries in minutes, while penetrating deep into the rubber, providing a long-lasting shine that resists fading, cracking, and discoloration.
specs.pro_tips: Work with as little product as possible and spray only as needed, or spray directly to the tire and wipe excess quickly due to thin formula. For a more discreet satin finish, dilute with water to reduce gloss while maintaining protection.
specs.use_case: Perfect for use in carwashes, detail shops, rental fleets, and anyone who needs a professional-grade tire and trim dressing that works on both interior and exterior surfaces.
key_features: Fast-drying, no sling formula with rapid setup technology
Interior & exterior versatility - safe for leather, vinyl, and rubber surfaces
Dilutable with water to extend product or reduce gloss if desired
specs.dilution_ratio: Primarily ready to use product but may be diluted with water to adjust desired performance
specs.application_method: Clean and dry the area to be dressed prior to product application. Spray or hand apply depending upon application and desired results. Allow to dry to a glossy finish and wipe off excess material.

name: Leather Tonic
description: Renegade Detailer Series Leather Tonic is a one-step leather cream that cleans, beautifies and conditions leather at the same time.

specs.overview: Renegade Detailer Series Leather Tonic Leather Cleaner & Conditioner is a one-step leather cream that cleans, beautifies, and conditions your leather. It's low-shine, non-slip, and provides protection against common problems such as staining, fading, and discoloration. It's also great for use on vinyl and leaves a pleasing leather scent.
specs.use_case: Leather conditioner is meant to clean, moisturize, replenish, and protect leather surfaces found in your vehicle. If you find staining, fading, or discoloration to be a problem on your leather seats, upholstery, or other leather surfaces, a leather conditioner can be used to make these areas look new again.
key_features: One-step leather cream - cleans and conditions simultaneously
Protects against staining, fading, and discoloration
specs.application_method: This is a one step product that will clean and condition the leather at the same time. Apply a thin coat and then rub onto surface. Allow to dry. Buff it off with a soft clean cloth.

name: Citrus Solution / 1 Gallon
description: Safe and effective all-purpose cleaner that's non-acidic, low-pH and non-caustic for interior and exterior cleaning.

specs.overview: DS Citrus Degreaser is a safe and effective all-purpose cleaner. It is non-acidic, low-ph and non-caustic cleaner. May be used for interior as well as exterior. Best used for engines, wheels and wheel wells. This versatile cleaner provides safe cleaning power without harsh chemicals.
specs.use_case: Best used for engines, wheels and wheel wells, but may be used for interior as well as exterior applications for professional detailers and car enthusiasts.
key_features: Safe for interior and exterior use
specs.application_method: Dilute 1:10 for interior cleaning. Can be used at various concentrations depending on cleaning task.

name: Water Spot Remover/ 16oz
description: Fast-acting water spot remover that eliminates hard water marks without leaving film residue.

specs.overview: DS Water Spot Remover is an effective cleaner for removing water spots from all vehicle surfaces. Fast acting ingredients eliminate the need for hard scrubbing. The product does not leave any film residue and is safe for use on various surfaces including tires.
specs.pro_tips: Always dilute and do not use on hot surfaces. Cool the surface with water first to ensure optimal results.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and vehicle owners looking to remove hard water spots and mineral deposits from painted surfaces, glass, and other exterior components without damaging the finish.
specs.dilution_ratio: Dilute before use (specific ratio not specified on product page)
specs.application_method: Dilute as directed and apply to spotted surfaces. Do not use on hot surfaces—cool with water first.

name: Ferrari 3 Models
description: Tomica Premium Ferrari 3 Models die-cast toy car collection featuring three high-quality replica Ferraris

specs.overview: A collectible die-cast toy car set from Takara Tomy's Tomica Premium series containing three Ferrari supercars: the Testarossa (1/61 Scale), Ferrari FXX K (1/64 Scale), and F40 (1/62 Scale). Each car is made from durable plastic and certified as safe for children. Package dimensions: approximately 19.0 x 14.0 x 3.5cm. Released April 15, 2023.
specs.pro_tips: Suitable for ages 6 and up; ideal for car collectors and enthusiasts; each model features different scales for variety
specs.use_case: Collectible die-cast toy car set for collectors and car enthusiasts
key_features: Safe for children aged 6 and over
specs.application_method: Display and collection

name: Snap Pad Polishing Foam
description: Double-sided snap-on polishing foam pad with secure attachment system for consistent buffing performance.

specs.overview: Buff & Shine Snap Pad Polishing Foam features a unique snap-on design that stays firmly in place during high-speed rotations, offering precise and consistent results. The double-sided construction maximizes pad life and efficiency, while the specialized foam composition provides effective polishing performance for various paint correction tasks.
specs.pro_tips: Use appropriate speed settings and pressure for consistent results. Clean pad regularly during use to maintain performance.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts looking for secure foam pads that won't slip during polishing operations on painted surfaces.
key_features: Snap-on attachment system for secure fit
Stays in place during high-speed operations
specs.coverage_yield: Extended life due to double-sided design
specs.application_method: Attach to compatible backing plate via snap system, apply polish to pad, work in 2x2 foot sections at medium pressure and low-medium speed.

name: Terminator spot and stain / 16oz
description: Enzyme-based spot and stain remover that combines cleaning chemicals and degreasers to quickly remove spots, grease, oil, dirt and food-related stains from carpet and upholstery.

specs.overview: This uniquely formulated product is a blend of dry and wet cleaning chemicals and degreasers that quickly remove spots and stains. Terminator cuts grease, oil, dirt and food related stains. P&S Terminator uses powerful enzyme action and effective cleaning agents to eliminate stubborn soil, grease, dirt, and protein stains. The fresh scent and deodorizers ensure that protein stains don't leave odor lingering after they are eliminated. Terminator is step #1 of the Double Black Interior Cleaning System, but can also be used on its own for incredible stain removal.
specs.pro_tips: While not required, extracting or wiping the area after agitation ensures maximum stain and odor removal.
specs.use_case: For professional and DIY detailers who need to remove stains and odors from carpet and cloth upholstery. Contains a broad-spectrum enzyme package that breaks down and destroys dirt.
key_features: Powerful enzyme action and effective cleaning agents
Ready to use product with no dilution required
specs.application_method: Vacuum and brush the interior before application. Apply P&S Terminator directly onto the stain/spot initially and then treat the entire area. Allow the product to work for about 3 minutes agitating the surface with a carpet brush. Once completed, vacuum the carpet and upholstery.

name: Blue X Armor / 1 Gal
description: A solvent-based tire dressing that provides a mirror-like finish lasting for days on tires, trim, rubber, plastic, and vinyl surfaces.

specs.overview: Blue X Armor is a solvent-based tire dressing formulated to restore the rich black appearance of automotive tires and trim. The product dries fast to a mirror-like finish that will last for days. It is designed for application on tires, trims, rubber, plastic, vinyl, convertible tops, seat backs, armrests, steering columns and similar surfaces.
specs.use_case: Professional and DIY detailers looking to restore the deep black color and shine to tires, trim, and interior plastic/vinyl surfaces with a long-lasting high-gloss finish.
specs.application_method: Apply directly to the surface using a towel, foam applicator, or spray method. Allow to dry to achieve the mirror-like finish.

name: Paint Surface Prep /  16oz
description: Ready-to-use surface cleaner formulated to remove wax, oils, silicone, and contaminants from paint surfaces prior to ceramic coating application.

specs.overview: Paint Coating Surface Prep is a surface preparation solution designed to cleanse paint surfaces before applying the P&S Inspiration ceramic coating. It effectively removes polish residue, wax, silicone, and other contaminants that could hinder coating performance and adhesion. Apply by spray, let dwell for 30 seconds, and wipe with a microfiber towel.
specs.pro_tips: Allow 30 seconds dwell time for optimal effectiveness in breaking down oils and polishing residues. Use clean microfiber towels and rotate frequently during wiping to prevent recontamination. Ensure paint correction is completed before applying this prep solution.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and automotive enthusiasts preparing vehicle paint for ceramic coating application, particularly before using P&S Inspiration coating.
key_features: Removes wax, silicone, and polish oils
Designed specifically for P&S Inspiration coating system
Part of P&S Double Black Renny Doyle Collection
Also suitable as a glass cleaner
specs.application_method: Spray apply a heavy coating of solution saturating the paint surface. Allow product to sit for 30 seconds and wipe clean frequently rotating towel to ensure proper product removal. Repeat process over entire vehicle. Prior to applying coating, inspect paint thoroughly.

name: Renegade Forged Red Metal Polish
description: Polish designed for forged and billet wheels with finer abrasive grains appropriate for softer aluminum wheels, delivering a show-quality finish.

specs.overview: Renegade Forged Red Metal Polish is designed for forged and billet wheels and aims to give a show-quality finish with finer abrasive grains appropriate for softer aluminum wheels. The cleaning agents and sealants leave wheels bright, clean, and protected. It is perfect for maintaining a polished wet finish between machine polishing sessions.
specs.pro_tips: Apply a protective coating such as Renegade Hydro Guard Ceramic Spray or Graphene + Ceramic Spray to protect newly polished wheels and prolong shine.
specs.use_case: Designed specifically for forged and billet wheels. Perfect for maintaining a polished wet finish between machine polishing sessions on most vehicles.
key_features: Finer abrasive grains appropriate for softer aluminum wheels
specs.application_method: Apply with a Microfiber Pad until a dark haze starts to develop. Use a cotton terry cloth towel to do majority of drying, then switch to Premium Microfiber Towels to help reduce clumping.

name: Reacher Glass Kit / 3pk
description: Make cleaning windshields easier with the Reacher Glass Kit, which comes with the innovative Reacher Tool and 3 Smooth Glass Flip towels.

specs.overview: The Reacher Glass Kit from Autofiber comes with the innovative Reacher Tool and 3 Smooth Glass Flip towels. The Reacher Tool features an updated design with a lower profile to reach into even tighter spaces. The towels are folded and pre-sewn so they flip inside-out after each section becomes saturated; use the twist side to clean and scrub glass, and the smooth pile side to buff away residue and streaks lint-free.
specs.pro_tips: Use the Glass Perfect Towel for deep cleaning and the Smooth Towel for final polishing; pair with a high-quality, ammonia-free glass cleaner for best results.
specs.use_case: Designed for professionals and enthusiasts who need to clean windshields and hard-to-reach glass surfaces easier than ever.
specs.size_volume: 8" x 8" Double Flip Towel Design with MicroEdge
key_features: Includes Reacher Tool with innovative extension design
Updated lower profile design for tighter spaces
Pre-sewn flip design for multiple clean sections
Dual-sided: twist pile for cleaning, smooth pile for buffing
specs.coverage_yield: Multiple cleaning sections per towel due to double flip design
specs.application_method: Use the twist side to clean and scrub the glass, then use the smooth pile side to buff away residue and moisture; flip the towel inside out when saturated for fresh cleaning sections.

name: Insect Remover / 1 gallon
description: Industrial-strength insect remover that breaks down heavy bug concentrations on grills, bumpers, and painted surfaces prior to vehicle washing.

specs.overview: P&S Bug Off Insect Remover is a powerful, industrial-strength cleaner formulated to quickly remove stubborn insect debris and neutralize harmful acids that can etch clear coat. The product breaks down heavy bug concentrations on grills, bumpers, and painted surfaces, making bug removal fast and easy. Simply spray onto affected areas, allow 1-2 minutes dwell time, and rinse away.
specs.pro_tips: For stubborn bug spots, can be diluted from straight application down to 5:1 ratio. Do not apply to hot surfaces or allow product to dry on surface. Always spot test on inconspicuous areas before full application. Avoid washing in direct sunlight when possible.
specs.use_case: Designed for detailers and vehicle owners who need to remove insect splatter before washing. Ideal for vehicles with heavy frontal bug debris, especially after highway driving or during summer months.
key_features: Safe for paint, glass, metal, and plastic
specs.coverage_yield: Not specified by manufacturer
specs.dilution_ratio: Ready to use straight, or can be diluted up to 5:1 with water
specs.application_method: Spray P&S Bug Off directly onto affected areas. Allow to sit for 1-2 minutes to break down insect residue. Optionally scrub gently with paint-safe tools. Rinse thoroughly with water. Use prior to vehicle washing.

name: Wheel Acid / 1 gallon
description: Heavy-duty acid wheel cleaner designed to remove brake dust and grime from metal wheels.

specs.overview: Acid wheel cleaner formulated to effectively remove brake dust, road grime, and stubborn dirt from wheels. This concentrated formula is designed for professional use on metal wheels.
specs.pro_tips: Wear appropriate personal protective equipment including eye protection, masks, and gloves when handling this product.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and automotive enthusiasts who need to restore heavily contaminated metal wheels.
specs.application_method: Follow manufacturer safety instructions. Wear eye protection, masks, and gloves when handling.

name: White edge brush
description: The White Soft Edge Brush is built for cleaning grout lines and grooved surfaces in and around the home.

specs.overview: The Edge brush is a wheel-shaped scrub brush used for getting into tight grooves and grout lines. It features soft non-scratch nylon bristles, a steel shaft with rust resistant nickel plating, and a strong polypropylene plastic block for increased durability. The brush is designed as an attachment for use in the cordless drill that you already own. The higher speed and power of a cordless drill allows you to cut through messes up to twice as fast as standard cleaning methods.
specs.pro_tips: For delicate caulking use soft white edge brush. For treaded floor mats with channels, the wheel-shaped design excels at getting into the grooves. The brush works at a 45-degree angle to reach tight spaces.
specs.use_case: For cleaning grout lines and grooved surfaces in and around the home. Works on tile grout, desktop mouse mats, boot grooves, bike tire treads, and vehicle floor mats.
key_features: Steel shaft with rust resistant nickel plating
Wheel-shaped design for grout line access
specs.application_method: Attach to cordless drill. Use for scrubbing grout lines and grooved surfaces. For vehicle applications, especially effective on treaded floor mats and tire grooves.

name: 100 Ct Gloves/ Medium
description: Disposable medium-sized protective gloves for auto detailing and cleaning tasks. 100-count box provides reliable barrier protection.

specs.overview: Store-branded disposable gloves designed for professional auto detailing and cleaning applications. These medium-sized gloves provide essential hand protection when handling cleaning chemicals, waxes, and detailing products. Each box contains 100 individual gloves for extended use across multiple detailing sessions.
specs.pro_tips: Keep multiple boxes on hand for busy detailing operations. Change gloves between different chemical applications to prevent cross-contamination.
specs.use_case: Auto detailers, car wash professionals, and enthusiasts who need reliable hand protection during vehicle cleaning and detailing operations.
specs.coverage_yield: 100 individual uses per box
specs.application_method: Put on gloves before handling detailing products. Replace with fresh pair when switching between different chemicals or when torn.

name: Finisher peroxide treatment
description: Step #3 in the Double Black Interior Cleaning System that adds a final attack on odor causing molecules and organic stains.

specs.overview: Finisher Peroxide Treatment is Step #3 in the Double Black Interior Cleaning System, completing the system by adding a final attack on odor causing molecules and organic stains. It breaks down odor causing chemicals, eliminates residual organic stains and slightly sterilizes the surface, assisting in reducing water stains, mold and mildew odors. Finisher breaks down into oxygen and water, leaving no chemical residue that requires further removal.
specs.pro_tips: Finisher Peroxide contains a 3% hydrogen peroxide solution. The CDC recommends 6 to 8 minutes contact time for inactivating rhinovirus, meaning the surface must remain wet with Finisher for this duration.
specs.use_case: For professionals and DIYers completing the Double Black Interior Cleaning System to reduce odors and stains as the final treatment step.
key_features: Breaks down into oxygen and water
Reduces water stains and mildew odors
specs.application_method: After completing Step 1 (Terminator) and Step 2 (Carpet Bomber), spray apply a light mist of Finisher to the treated surface. No removal of chemical is required, though if excessive moisture exists it is recommended to remove by vacuuming and/or dry the interior prior to vehicle delivery.

name: Clay Mitt
description: A microfiber glove lined with a synthetic rubberized polymer surface that safely removes bonded contaminants from automotive surfaces faster than traditional clay bars.

specs.overview: Made of high-quality materials (moya and microfiber) that provide great tenacity and stickiness, lasting 5-6 times longer than traditional clay bars. The clay side can quickly remove most contaminants with its great stickiness including heavy oxidation, heavy rainwater stains, ferrous powder, light rust, brake dust, pollen, stubborn rubs and streaks. Rinses clean with fresh water, meaning if you accidentally drop it, just rinse it clean and keep working.
specs.pro_tips: Pre-soak the mitt in soapy water before use. It'll glide smoother and reduce drag on delicate finishes. Rinse the clay mitt with soap and water and air dry after each use.
specs.use_case: Best for professional detailers or enthusiasts who clay cars frequently. Great for full-body decontamination during maintenance washes. Crucial step before polishing, waxing, or applying a ceramic coating by removing embedded particles to create a clean, slick surface.
key_features: Scratch-free and paint safe on various colors of paint surface
Can be reused about 50-80 times for whole car decontamination
Covers an area 3-5 times larger with every swipe compared to traditional clay bars
Up to 60 applications and more depending on condition of car
specs.coverage_yield: Up to 60 applications and more (dependent on condition of car)
specs.application_method: Thoroughly wash the vehicle to remove loose contaminants. Spray workable sections with mild shampoo as lubrication. Lubrication is important while using the clay mitt. Scrub lubricated areas with light pressure until silky smooth.

name: Soft Detailing brush / S
description: Ultra-soft synthetic brush designed for delicate automotive surfaces without scratching.

specs.overview: The Maxshine Ever So Soft (ESS) detailing brush features ultra-soft bristles ideal for light-duty cleaning on scratch-prone surfaces. Made with high-quality 612 Nylon bristles, it offers excellent bend recovery and chemical resistance. The brush is perfect for interior detailing tasks like cleaning dashboards, leather seats, and emblems.
specs.pro_tips: Keep dry for dusting applications, or wet with your preferred cleaning chemical for deep cleaning. Resistant to harsh chemicals for extended durability.
specs.use_case: Interior detailing on delicate surfaces where scratch-free cleaning is essential, including leather seats, dashboards, and trim.
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use dry for dusting delicate surfaces or wet with preferred cleaning solution for deeper cleaning. Works well on both interior and exterior scratch-prone areas.

name: Correction Glaze / 16oz
description: Fast-working paint correction glaze formulated for dark car paints. Removes swirls and light scratches while delivering deep, long-lasting gloss and shine.

specs.overview: Renegade Detailer Series Midnight is a professional-grade paint correction glaze and sealant designed for new car prep or used car reconditioning. The advanced formula combines glaze technology to fill fine scratches and marks with a protective sealant barrier that adds durability against sun damage and contaminants. Works on all paint types but is most effective on darker colors, leaving a rich, mirror-like finish.
specs.pro_tips: Most effective on darker colored vehicles. Can be applied by hand, dual-action polisher, or rotary buffer. Keep container sealed when not in use. Store in cool, dry place away from freezing temperatures.
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional detailers and car enthusiasts preparing vehicles for shows or enhancing daily drivers. Removes imperfections such as swirls, scratches, oxidation, and color haze while enhancing paint clarity and vibrancy.
key_features: Removes light swirls, scratches, and micro-scratches
Enhanced gloss and depth enhancement for dark paints
Dual protection: glaze fills imperfections + sealant protects against UV and contaminants
Safe on clear coat and single-stage paint systems
Easy application with foam/microfiber applicator or dual-action polisher
specs.application_method: Apply a small amount to foam or microfiber applicator. Spread evenly on clean, dry paint using circular motions. Buff off residue with clean microfiber towel or use dual-action polisher for best results. Avoid applying in direct sunlight or on hot surfaces.

name: Yellow Upside Down Trigger Sprayer Head / 32oz
description: Upside down trigger sprayer works great for hard to reach locations and works at any angle and completely upside down.

specs.overview: Upside down trigger sprayer works great for hard to reach locations and works at any angle and completely upside down. Nozzle tip adjusts from a wide mist to a sharp stream. Non-leaking shippable sprayer with 28/400 neck finish and 9 1/4" dip tube length with standard strainer.
specs.pro_tips: Strainer can be removed and trigger trimmed to make it fit perfectly to any bottle you have on hand.
specs.use_case: Perfect for when you have to maneuver a spray bottle to reach that one tough or tight area, including wheel wells, wheels, engine bay, interior carpets, headliner.
key_features: Works at any angle and completely upside down
Nozzle tip adjusts from wide mist to sharp stream
specs.application_method: Attach to any 32oz spray bottle with 28/400 neck size. Adjust nozzle between mist and stream as needed. Spray from any angle including upside down.
surface_compatibility: General spray application for detailing products
Works with various cleaning and chemical solutions

name: Wheel Cleaner / 16oz
description: pH-neutral wheel cleaner that removes stubborn brake dust and road grime from painted steel, light-alloy, chrome, and polished rims with a color-change formula.

specs.overview: Sonax Wheel Cleaner Full Effect is a non-acid, pH-balanced special cleaner designed to safely remove stubborn dirt including baked-on brake dust, oil residue, and road grime from all wheel types. The formula sprays on fluorescent green and changes to deep red as it reacts with contaminants, signaling that it's breaking down and loosening soils for easy removal. Acid-free and gentle on wheel surfaces, it does not damage rims, bolts, or wheel coatings.
specs.pro_tips: Do not apply to hot or wet wheels - allow to cool before application. Test for material compatibility in an inconspicuous area before full use. Do not allow product to dry on wheels. For best results, work on one wheel at a time.
specs.use_case: Ideal for vehicle owners and professional detailers who need to clean heavily soiled wheels without damaging the rim surface, lug nuts, or wheel coatings.
key_features: Color-change indicator (green to red) shows cleaning action
Safe on steel, alloy, chrome-plated, polished, anodized, and clear-coated wheels
Does not damage wheel bolts or coatings
Ready to use - no dilution required
specs.coverage_yield: Approximately 5.5-8.5 wheel sets per bottle
specs.application_method: Ensure wheels are cool and dry. Spray evenly from short distance. Allow to work for 3-5 minutes (do not let dry). For heavy soiling, use a wheel brush. Rinse thoroughly with strong water jet or high-pressure cleaner.

name: All Purpose Microfiber Towel/Blue 10pk
description: Versatile microfiber utility towel for all-purpose auto detailing tasks including buffing, polishing, and general cleaning.

specs.overview: Professional-grade all-purpose microfiber towel designed for reliable performance across multiple detailing applications. Features superior absorption and durability with an 80/20 polyester-nylon blend construction that effectively lifts dirt and debris without scratching surfaces.
specs.pro_tips: Color code to prevent cross contamination between chemicals. Use black for wheels, and white for buffing polish and wax residue
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional detailers and enthusiasts who need versatile towels for buffing polish residue, general cleaning, dusting, and multi-surface detailing tasks.
key_features: Great for all car care tasks with color coding capability
specs.coverage_yield: Can be laundered and reused many times
specs.application_method: Fold towel twice to create 8"x8" square that can be rotated for 8 clean sides

name: Water Repellent
description: G5 is a hydrophobic glass coating that repels water, dirt, bugs, and bird droppings for clarity and easier cleaning.

specs.overview: G5 is a hydrophobic glass coating that repels water, dirt, bugs, and bird droppings for clarity and easier cleaning. G5 Water Repellent Coating combines the latest advancements in nanotechnology to ensure superior performance, using rigorous lab testing and real-world trials to deliver a product that not only protects glass but also enhances its durability and ease of cleaning. G5 is highly hydrophobic and beads water even at low speeds – making driving safer and reducing the need for your wiper blades. Any glass coated in G5 will stay cleaner for longer and any contaminants such as bugs, bird droppings and ice will be easier to remove.
specs.pro_tips: For best results, apply in shaded areas away from direct sunlight, and pair with G1 ClearVision Smart Glass for longer-lasting protection. It cannot be used on anti-reflective coating as it can fill in the microscopic texture and add unwanted gloss to the finish.
specs.use_case: G5 is a water repellent glass coating that repels water, dirt, and grime, making the glass easier to clean and improving visibility, especially in rainy conditions. It is the perfect glass coating for professional detailers who have customers that want a glass coating, but aren't interested in paying a premium for an ultra durable coating.
key_features: Repels water, dirt, bugs, and bird droppings
Beads water even at low speeds
Cures for between 10 and 15 minutes at room temperature
Thick creamy formula that applies easy and wipes off without effort
specs.coverage_yield: 85m2 per L
specs.application_method: Apply a small amount of G5 to an AP1 Applicator or an MF1 ZeroR Microfibre Buff Cloth, in a circular motion covering all of the glass. Leave the coating to cure for between 10 and 15 minutes at room temperature. Remove residue from the coated surface with an MF5 Glass Power Cloth or MF1 cloth. Avoid contact between water and the coated surface for at least two hours following application.

name: 3" Microfiber Pads
description: Buff and Shine Uro-Fiber Pads are designed to fully maximize the detailing potential already seen in microfiber pads. These two features, never before seen in a microfiber pad, allow you to cut, polish and finish in just one step!

specs.overview: With a 25% lower pile than traditional microfiber pads, Buff and Shine Uro-Fiber Pads also feature a blend of two different microfiber grades into just one pad. With both cutting fibers and polishing fibers blended together into one pad, you are now able to remove light to moderate scratches and swirls, polish to perfection, and buff to a high shine in just one pad!
specs.pro_tips: Use with Gear-Driven, Long Throw DA, and Standard DA polishers - Not recommended for High-Speed/Rotary Polishers
specs.use_case: This American-made pad is designed to be usable with almost any Gear-Driven, Long Throw DA, or Standard DA detailing polisher. Perfect for professionals and enthusiasts who want to perform multiple correction steps with one pad.
key_features: 25% lower pile than traditional microfiber pads
Blend of two different microfiber grades into just one pad
Black and white fibers blended together
Crafted with heat-resistant adhesive. This pad also features a premium edge bevel for precise cutting and polishing
specs.application_method: 3 inch Buff and Shine Uro-Fiber Pad can be used with a 2 or 3 inch backing plate. Use with compatible polishing compound or polish. You will need a clean pad for each step.

name: Polymere Shield / 12 oz
description: Aerosol-based hybrid polymer sealant providing 6 months of wax-free paint protection with outstanding water beading and color restoration.

specs.overview: Sonax PROFILINE PolymerNetShield is an aerosol spray sealant formulated with organic and inorganic hybrid polymers that cross-link on paint upon spray application. It creates a protective shield that lasts up to 6 months while intensively restoring paint color and producing a deep, velvety finish with exceptional water-repellent properties. The formula reduces dust and dirt adhesion, making vehicle maintenance easier between washes.
specs.pro_tips: Do not apply to hot surfaces. Ensure paint is clean and dry before application. Do not allow product to dry on the surface—buff immediately after curing. Vehicle surface becomes water resistant within 1 hour. For extended protection, use Sonax Brilliant Shine Detailer after maintenance washes to prolong sealant life.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and car enthusiasts seeking quick, easy-to-apply paint protection that delivers color restoration and hydrophobic beading without wax.
key_features: Hybrid polymer technology with organic and inorganic components
specs.coverage_yield: One 11.5 oz can treats 4-6 vehicles
specs.application_method: Shake can vigorously for at least 30 seconds. Spray a thin, even layer directly onto paint surface. Immediately spread evenly with a foam or microfiber applicator pad using overlapping motions, working one panel at a time. Allow to cure 1-2 minutes, then buff with a clean microfiber cloth for streak-free finish.

name: P-3 Compound / CLEARANCE
description: P-3 Compound

name: Premium Microfiber Green / 10pk
description: Premium 390 GSM green microfiber towel designed for coating leveling, compound removal, and general detailing with zero micro-marring on soft paint surfaces.

specs.overview: The Mr. Everything Premium Paintwork Microfiber Towel is designed for specific detailing tasks such as coating leveling and compound removal. The heavy base layer yarn makes the towel firm and resistant to crumbling when wiping high-friction surfaces. The low pile surface yarn is made from ultra-fine 70/30 microfiber yarn that has been tested under ultraviolet light to leave zero micro-marring and scratching on soft paint surfaces. These characteristics also make the towel fantastic for glass cleaning, spray coating application, and general-purpose wiping.
specs.pro_tips: Color-code towels to prevent cross-contamination between different detailing products. The heavy base layer makes this ideal for high-friction applications like compound removal.
specs.use_case: Professional and enthusiast detailers who need specialized towels for coating leveling, compound removal, and paint correction work on delicate paint finishes.
key_features: 390 GSM weight for plush, absorbent performance
Heavy base layer resists collapsing on high-friction surfaces
Low pile surface for zero micro-marring on soft paint
UV-tested for safety on sensitive finishes
Multi-use capability for glass and general detailing
specs.coverage_yield: Can be used hundreds of times with proper care
specs.application_method: Use for coating leveling, compound removal, paint correction, glass cleaning, and general-purpose wiping. Machine wash hot with gentle detergent on gentle cycle and dry on delicate cycle.

name: Touchless Wash Part 1 / 1gal
description: Low pH acidic truck wash (Part 1 of 2-step system) that shocks and emulsifies dirt, grime, bugs, and industrial fallout from vehicle surfaces.

specs.overview: Touchless Wash Part 1 is the first step in Renegade's 2-step touchless truck wash system. With a pH of approximately 3-4, this low pH soap is formulated to shock and emulsify stubborn dirt, grime, bugs, and industrial fallout embedded on truck surfaces. It works via pressure washer application and must be followed by Part 2 (High pH soap) to neutralize the acid and remove remaining residue. The dual-action system cleans most vehicles without requiring scrubbing.
specs.pro_tips: Part 1 cannot be used as a standalone product—High pH soap (Part 2) must always follow. For best results with heavily soiled vehicles, agitation may be necessary. A pressure washer system is required; cannot be used with bucket application.
specs.use_case: Designed for professional truckers, owner-operators, and detailers who need to efficiently clean large vehicles like semi-trucks and fleet vehicles using a touchless pressure wash method.
key_features: Shocks and emulsifies dirt and industrial fallout
Minimal or no scrubbing required in most cases
specs.application_method: Apply via pressure washer to vehicle surface. Must always be followed by Part 2 (High pH soap) to neutralize acid and complete cleaning.

name: 3" Wool Pad
description: Professional 3" wool buffing pad with hook & loop backing and 100% wool 4-ply twist construction for compounding and paint correction

specs.overview: Quality hook & loop material with plush durable fibers and strong washable backing structure. Made from 100% wool with 4-ply twist construction and 1/2" pile height. Designed for compounding applications and engineered to deliver consistent cutting performance on automotive paint surfaces.
specs.pro_tips: Operate at 1750-2400 RPM for optimal performance. Features 1/2" pile height for effective cutting action.
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional detailers and enthusiasts performing heavy paint correction and compounding work. Perfect for removing oxidation, scratches, and swirl marks from automotive paint surfaces.
specs.coverage_yield: Multiple uses with proper care and cleaning
specs.application_method: Attach to 3" backing plate via hook & loop system. Use with compounding products at recommended RPM range. Clean with buffing pad spur during use.

name: Extreme Carpet Stain Remover / 18oz
description: Aggressive carpet stain remover that tackles tough soil, dirt and stains from carpet, upholstery and vinyl surfaces.

specs.overview: EXTREME Carpet Stain Remover is a fast-acting formula enhanced with surfactants and wetting agents designed to remove stubborn stains including dirt, coffee, grease, animal urine, ink, oil, cola, wine, and more from carpet, cloth upholstery and vinyl surfaces.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and consumers tackling tough carpet and upholstery stains that require an aggressive cleaner for heavily soiled interiors.
key_features: Enhanced with surfactants and wetting agents
specs.application_method: Apply directly to stained area and work in with a brush or cloth. Allow product to penetrate, then extract or wipe clean.

name: 3" Wool Blend Pads / 2pk
description: Professional 3-inch wool blend polishing pads designed for light cutting and polishing applications in tight areas and detail work.

specs.overview: Buff and Shine 3" Mini Yellow Wool Blend Light Cut Polishing Pads (301GY) are perfect for buffing or polishing those hard to reach areas. Made of wool blend 4-ply twist, these pads perfect for all light compounding and polishing applications. Features Velcro backing for quick attachment and removal. Reinforced plastic backing and washable grip backing with domed face for improved buffing.
specs.pro_tips: Drill safe and great for use with most 3" backing plates such as Buff and Shine 300Y and 358.
specs.use_case: Use for small touch-up areas such as painted side view mirrors, clear-coated divider window panes, bumper tops and boat topsides and interiors.
key_features: Velcro backing for quick attachment and removal
Reinforced plastic backing and washable grip backing
specs.coverage_yield: Sold 2 per package
specs.application_method: Attach to 3-inch backing plate using hook and loop system. Use with appropriate compounds or polishes at recommended RPM range.

name: W9 Water Spot Remover / 500ml
description: W9 Water Spot Remover is formulated to effectively break down stubborn water spots without harming your car – even if you have a clear coat or ceramic coating.

specs.overview: Designed for various surfaces, including car paint, metal surfaces, and glass, W9 is a heavy duty water spot remover that restores your vehicle's shine with ease. W9 utilizes an advanced three-mechanism approach to eliminate stains at the molecular level, dissolving mineral contaminants, neutralizing metal ions found in hard water, and breaking down silica scale. W9 is coating safe and will not degrade ceramic coatings, ensuring a clean surface without harming the protective layer.
specs.pro_tips: Test W9 in an inconspicuous area first. Apply to a microfiber towel and work in small sections. Avoid direct sunlight or hot panels. Wipe off rather than rinsing with water alone. Follow up with Quick Detailer to neutralize remaining acidity.
specs.use_case: For professionals and enthusiasts looking to remove hard water spots and mineral deposits that can leave automotive surfaces looking dull and worn.
key_features: Dissolves mineral contaminants, neutralizes metal ions, breaks down silica scale
Safe for all paint types, including matte finishes and vinyl-wrapped surfaces
Works on paint, metal surfaces, and glass
specs.application_method: Spray liberally onto a clean Gtechniq MF1 ZeroR Microfibre Buff Cloth, wipe onto an area no bigger than 20x20cm (8″x8″)

name: Swift Clean & Shine / 1 gallon
description: All-in-one interior quick detail that quickly and effectively removes dirt and grime from leather, vinyl and plastic while leaving behind a conditioned dressed appearance.

specs.overview: SWIFT Clean & Shine is the all-in-one interior quick detail clean and shine product that quickly and effectively removes dirt and grime from leather, vinyl and plastic, leaving behind a conditioned dressed appearance. The pleasant fragrance makes using this product a great experience for the detailer and consumer. The dual-action formula cleans and conditions in one step, works effortlessly on all interior surfaces without causing discoloration or greasy residue, and restores a satin, conditioned appearance.
specs.pro_tips: For best results, use on a cool surface and avoid over-saturating leather—less is more when it comes to conditioning.
specs.use_case: Ideal for freshening up daily drivers or finalizing a professional detail, leaving interiors looking refreshed with a soft, dressed appearance.
key_features: Safe on leather, vinyl, and plastic
specs.application_method: Shake well prior to product use. Spray apply swift onto surface, wax applicator or Xpress Sidekick scrub pad. Scrub as needed to produce a clean surface. Remove excess product and wipe to desired finish.

name: Foam Cannon PRO 1.5 L
description: Professional-grade 1.5L foam cannon for pressure washers, creating thick foam for safer car washing with adjustable spray patterns and controls.

specs.overview: Heavy-duty foam cannon designed for professional detailing applications, featuring a large 1.5L capacity bottle for extended use. Creates thick, clinging foam that helps lift dirt and grime while reducing wash-induced marring. Built with durable brass components and adjustable controls for foam thickness and spray pattern.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and car enthusiasts who need extended foam capacity for washing multiple vehicles or large surfaces without frequent refilling.
key_features: Wide neck bottle for easy filling
specs.coverage_yield: Multiple vehicle washes per fill
specs.application_method: Fill bottle with car wash soap and water, connect to pressure washer wand via quick-connect fitting, adjust foam thickness and spray pattern as needed.

name: Renegade Banana wax/ 16 oz
description: An easy one-step cream wax that cleans and polishes in one application, delivering a deep glossy finish with long-lasting protection ideal for light-colored vehicles.

specs.overview: Renegade Banana Wax is a premium cream wax formulated with natural carnauba and synthetic polymers to create a robust protective layer over your vehicle's paintwork. It gently removes light scratches, buffer marks, and oxidation while enhancing paint depth and color with a wet-look finish. The water-repellent properties ensure water beads up and rolls off, reducing water spots and damage. Safe for all painted surfaces.
specs.pro_tips: Start with a clean and dry vehicle. Use a car shampoo and microfiber wash mitt, then thoroughly rinse and dry. Apply only 3 drops to the applicator pad per section for best results.
specs.use_case: Designed for detailers and enthusiasts seeking to protect and enhance their vehicle's exterior with a high-gloss, deep finish. Particularly effective on light-colored and metallic vehicles.
key_features: Natural carnauba wax with synthetic polymers
Removes light scratches, buffer marks, and oxidation
Deep glossy, wet-look finish with enhanced paint depth
specs.application_method: Apply a small amount to an applicator pad. Work in small sections using up-and-down and side-to-side motions for even coverage. Allow to haze, then buff off with a clean microfiber towel.

name: Nano-Ceramic P1800 / 250ml
description: Ceramic nano synthetic sealant that provides very high gloss, is hologram free, and offers UV protection

specs.overview: A ceramic nano synthetic sealant that strengthens paint gloss and provides protection against oxidation, UV rays, acidic rain, tree saps and insects. Also removes minimum-sized defects (holograms) with its abrasive action while being applicable for protection treatment of painted surfaces and gelcoat.
specs.pro_tips: Let Nano Ceramic cure on surface for 30-60 minutes, then remove any residue with clean dry microfiber towel
specs.use_case: Excellent for all kinds of paint and gelcoat, designed for those seeking both paint correction and long-term protection in one product
key_features: Removes minimum-sized defects with abrasive action
specs.application_method: Use with light polishing pad or waxing pad on DA polisher. Apply small quantity (3 pea size dots) on pad surface and work in 2-3 sq ft areas at a time with medium pressure

name: Zero Waterless Wash / 16oz
description: Renegade Zero Waterless Wash provides quick, scratch-free cleaning for lightly soiled vehicles without a foam cannon or bucket.

specs.overview: Renegade Detailer Series Zero Waterless Wash is designed for quick touch-ups on lightly soiled vehicles. The formula saturates and lubricates the paint surface to safely remove dirt without scratching or damaging the clear coat. Ideal for situations where traditional washing methods aren't available.
specs.use_case: Perfect for detailers and vehicle owners who need a convenient, on-the-go cleaning solution for light dust, water spots, and minor contaminants between full washes.
specs.application_method: Spray liberally onto the vehicle surface and a microfiber towel. Gently wipe the paint in smooth motions to remove dirt and debris.

name: 3” Flat Foam Pad / CLEARANCE
description: MaxShine 3" Flat Foam Finishing Pad (Red) removes swirl marks and oxidation with heat-resistant construction for final polishing on automotive paint.

specs.overview: The MaxShine 3" Flat Foam Finishing Pad is color-coded red for final finishing applications in paint correction. These heat-resistant foam pads support cutting, polishing, and finishing processes with optimized thickness and shape for smooth, easy contouring. Designed to remove heavy swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation from most paintwork while providing precise control on contoured surfaces and tight areas.
specs.pro_tips: Wash and reuse between applications. Can be used for applying polishes, waxes, and sealants. Maintain proper pad centering on backing plate for even results.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts performing paint correction finishing passes. Ideal for final polishing stages after cutting or intermediate polishing.
key_features: 3-inch diameter size for precision work on contours and tight spaces
Hook and loop attachment compatible with DA and rotary polishers
Scientifically designed for safe contouring along curves
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care and washing
specs.application_method: Attach to 3-inch hook and loop backing plate on dual action or rotary polisher. Apply finishing compound or polish. Work in overlapping passes with light to medium pressure.

name: P&S Terminator Enzyme Spot & Stain Remover / 1gal
description: Enzyme-based spot and stain remover that blends dry and wet cleaning chemicals to quickly remove grease, oil, dirt and food-related stains from carpet and upholstery.

specs.overview: P&S Terminator is a uniquely formulated blend of dry and wet cleaning chemicals and degreasers that quickly removes spots and stains, cutting through grease, oil, dirt and food-related stains. Use as a pre-treatment for spots and stains on carpet and upholstery prior to shampooing. The formula deodorizes while it cleans, helping remove unwanted odors.
specs.pro_tips: For maximum effectiveness, follow up with P&S Carpet Bomber and Finisher Peroxide Treatment as part of the Double Black Interior Cleaning System
specs.use_case: Professional-strength enzyme cleaner designed for automotive detailers and car care specialists to target and eliminate tough interior stains including food, drink, oil, and biological messes without leaving residue.
key_features: Powerful enzyme action and effective cleaning agents eliminate stubborn soil, grease, dirt, and protein stains
Attacks embedded soils, grease, dirt and protein based stains
specs.dilution_ratio: Ready to use product, not diluted
specs.application_method: Dry brush and vacuum interior carpets and upholstery first. Apply Terminator directly onto spots/stains, allow product to work for a minimum of 3 minutes, then use a steamer or carpet brush to scrub. Vacuum or extract carpet and upholstery when completed.

name: Dream Maker / 1 Gallon
description: Dream Maker is an Exterior Show Spray that amplifies the gloss of single stage and clear coated paint. Safe for all existing protection including Bead Maker, this will continue to improve the look and feel of glossy surfaces.

specs.overview: Developed for the McCall Detailing Team during Monterey Car Week, this is the latest in Gloss Technology. Dream Maker is an Exterior Show Spray that amplifies the gloss of single stage and clear coated paint. Dream Maker amplifies gloss. That's its sole purpose. It offers very short-term protection, but loads of gloss. The application will not negatively affect coatings or hydrophobic finishes.
specs.pro_tips: Perfect for the final wipedown on the lawn at Pebble Beach.
specs.use_case: This is the answer to Dream Cars, Show Cars, and everyday drivers that need an edge on the competition. This unique product was not designed with protection in mind, but instead with just a huge boost of gloss to your paintwork.
key_features: Gloss amplifier for single stage and clear coated paint
Compatible with existing protection like Bead Maker
Short-term protection with maximum gloss enhancement
Will not negatively affect hydrophobic finishes
specs.application_method: Make sure the paint is clean and spray directly onto the paint or panel, one section at a time. You can apply it to a wet surface, or dry. Just spray 1-2 sprays per panel and work the product in with a premium microfiber towel.

name: Maxshine Spray Bottle/ Red
description: Durable 25-ounce spray bottle with adjustable nozzle for safe storage and controlled dispensing of detailing chemicals.

specs.overview: The Maxshine Heavy Duty Spray Bottle features chemical-resistant plastic construction designed to securely contain detailing chemicals. The high-quality sprayer head withstands rigorous tasks, while the adjustable nozzle allows you to control the spray pattern from fine mist to a high-powered stream. With its 25-ounce capacity, this bottle provides an easy solution for storing and dispensing your preferred detailing chemicals.
specs.use_case: Ideal for detailing professionals and enthusiasts who need reliable storage and application of various detailing chemicals, cleaning solutions, and sprays during automotive detailing work.
key_features: Adjustable nozzle (fine mist to high-powered stream)
Red bottle with red and grey trigger options
specs.application_method: Fill bottle with detailing chemical, adjust nozzle to desired spray pattern (mist or stream), and spray as needed during detailing application.

name: Maxshine Bucket/ Blue
description: Durable transparent blue detailing bucket designed for the two-bucket wash method to minimize swirl marks and protect your paint finish.

specs.overview: The MaxShine Blue Detailing Bucket is made of heavy-duty, durable materials built to last through frequent car washing sessions. Its transparent blue construction allows you to easily monitor water levels and see the dirt and grime you're pulling off your vehicle. Perfect for professional-grade two-bucket washing systems, this bucket helps keep wash water clean by allowing you to rinse your wash mitt in clean water before reloading in soapy water, reducing dirt transfer to your paint.
specs.pro_tips: The two-bucket method is recommended by professionals to guard against wash-induced swirls. Use the transparent design to easily see when you need fresh wash water.
specs.use_case: Professional and DIY car detailers who want to implement the two-bucket wash method to prevent wash-induced swirl marks and protect their vehicle's paint finish.
key_features: Compatible with MaxShine Grit Guard and Bucket Dolly
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Fill one bucket with soapy water and the second with clean water. Rinse your wash mitt in the clean water bucket first, then reload it in the soapy water to minimize dirt transfer to your paint.

name: Assorted Scents/ Air Fresheners/ New Car
description: Renegade Detailer Series Air Freshener in New Car scent neutralizes odors and refreshes vehicle interiors with a clean, neutral fragrance in a convenient spray bottle.

specs.overview: The Renegade Detailer Series New Car Air Freshener infuses a clean, new car scent along with odor neutralizers to completely refresh the way your vehicle smells. Formulated with premium-grade fragrance oils, it neutralizes unwanted odors rather than masking them. Can be sprayed anywhere in your vehicle or near recirculation vents for even distribution. The liquid formula delivers a controlled, fine mist that lasts for days.
specs.pro_tips: For best results flushing vehicle odors, turn on vehicle A/C to maximum setting and set to recirculate. Repeat application after pets have been in vehicle. If smoker, repeat weekly to neutralize new odors over time.
specs.use_case: Ideal for daily drivers, professional fleets, and detailers who need to eliminate odors and freshen vehicle interiors with a clean, new car scent.
specs.application_method: Shake well before use. Spray a light mist into the air or onto fabric surfaces such as carpets or floor mats. Avoid direct contact with plastic or leather surfaces. Spray 3-5 times under glove compartment and above pedals for A/C system application.

name: DeWalt PSI Power Cleaner
description: Cordless 20V MAX power cleaner delivering 550 PSI and 10X the cleaning power of a garden hose for portable jobsite and home cleaning.

specs.overview: Portable cordless power cleaner with 10X the cleaning power of a garden hose for on-the-go cleaning. Draws from any fresh water source with an included suction hose or connects to a garden hose with the quick connect adaptor. Cleans tools, equipment, decks, boats, outdoor furniture, and vehicles with 4 interchangeable nozzles stored on the unit plus a soap bottle.
specs.pro_tips: 2-speed selector allows higher pressure for stuck-on messes or lower speed for routine rinsing with longer runtime. Supply flow rating at 60 PSI when connected to a pressurized source.
specs.use_case: Portable cordless power cleaner for quick washdowns on jobsites or at home, removing mud, salt, and grime from tools, vehicles, decks, and outdoor furniture.
specs.size_volume: Tool only (Battery and charger sold separately)
key_features: 550 PSI maximum pressure with 10X the cleaning power of a garden hose
Draws from any fresh water source with included suction hose
Quick connect adaptor for garden hose compatibility
2-speed variable control for higher cleaning power or extended runtime
4 quick-connect nozzles with on-board storage plus soap bottle
Part of 20V MAX system with compatible batteries
specs.coverage_yield: Approximately 14 minutes runtime with 5.0-Ah battery
specs.application_method: Connect to a standard hose bib with quick-connect adaptor for continuous water, or use self-priming suction hose to draw from any fresh-water source. Select appropriate nozzle and adjust 2-speed setting for the cleaning task.

name: Tyre Gel / 500ml
description: Professional-grade tire and trim gel with nanotechnology that delivers customizable shine from satin to high-gloss with water and dirt resistance lasting up to one month.

specs.overview: Gtechniq T1v2 Durable Tyre Gel is a solvent-based gel formula engineered for automotive tires and plastic trim. Using advanced nanotechnology, it provides water, dirt, and oil repellency to keep surfaces cleaner longer. The product offers complete control over finish—a single thin coat delivers a natural satin finish, while multiple coats build a deep, high-gloss shine. Its durable protection resists fading and maintains appearance through normal driving conditions.
specs.pro_tips: A little product goes a long way—only small amounts are needed per application. Wear gloves during application. For best results, use a foam applicator pad for even coverage. Remove excess product with a microfiber towel. DO NOT USE ON MOTORCYCLE OR BICYCLE TIRES.
specs.use_case: Ideal for auto enthusiasts and professional detail shops seeking long-lasting tire and trim protection. Solves the problem of frequent reapplication by providing durability up to one month.
key_features: Nanotechnology-based formula with water and oil repellency
Precise, even application with gel consistency
Lasts up to one month under normal driving conditions
specs.coverage_yield: Multiple applications per bottle depending on application thickness and surface area
specs.application_method: Thoroughly clean and dry tires and trim prior to application. Apply T1v2 onto a foam applicator pad and spread evenly across the surface. Single coat provides satin finish; for high-gloss, reapply after 10 minutes. Allow 1-2 hours cure time before driving or water exposure.

name: Profiline Cutmax / 250ml
description: Highly effective abrasive polish for rotary polishing machines, ideal for heavily weathered, scratched or sanded paint layers.

specs.overview: Highly effective abrasive polish for rotary polishing machines designed for heavily weathered, scratched or sanded paint layers. Removes scratches and nibs in refinishing paintwork, smooths marks, and removes spray paint mist. Water-based formula offers a long working window and will not dry out like other compounds, and is dust-free for easy clean up after use.
specs.pro_tips: Shake bottle before use. Use SONAX PROFILINE Perfect Finish (02243000) for finishing polish after CutMax application. Regularly clean polishing pads, never use different polishes on one pad, and do not use on hot surfaces.
specs.use_case: Professional paint correction and restoration work; designed to achieve highest cutting and polishing results on sanded or weathered paintwork, with sanded areas up to P1500 that can quickly and safely be removed with excellent gloss effect.
key_features: Water-based formula with long working window
Low-dust technology with virtually no polish residue
Removes sanding marks up to P1500 safely with excellent gloss effect
specs.application_method: Apply product to SONAX Foam Pad hard or Lambswool Pad and polish at low speed with increased pressure for approximately 10 seconds; then exert slight pressure and polish with plane pad for 20 seconds. Remove polish residue with SONAX Microfibre Cloth soft touch.

name: Nano-Ceramic H2
description: Nano-Ceramic H2

name: Supreme Suds Wax Shampoo / 1 gallon
description: High foaming car soap engineered with emulsified carnauba wax that cleans and enhances paint shine while being compatible with foam cannons or bucket washing.

specs.overview: Supreme Suds is a high foaming car soap engineered with emulsified carnauba wax that effectively cleans away grease, bugs, oil, and rain film from paint, glass, and chrome surfaces. This versatile soap cleans and enhances your paint's shine and can be used with foam cannons or traditional bucket washing methods.
specs.use_case: Ideal for car enthusiasts and detailers who want a wash and wax solution in one step for regular maintenance cleaning of painted surfaces, glass, and chrome.
key_features: Cleans grease, bugs, oil, and rain film
Compatible with foam cannon or bucket
specs.application_method: Can be used with foam cannon or in traditional bucket washing. Apply foam evenly, allow dwell time, then rinse thoroughly.

name: Xpress Wax
description: Fast-drying liquid wax that combines carnauba and polymer waxes for quick protection and high-gloss shine on all vehicle finishes.

specs.overview: Xpress Wax quickly brightens and protects vehicle paint. It combines the natural protection factor of carnauba wax with high-tech polymer waxes to produce long-lasting protection with high-quality depth and shine. The product is designed for fast and easy application on a wide variety of vehicle finishes, making it ideal for express detailing workflows.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and vehicle owners who need quick, effective paint protection with minimal application time. Suitable for cars, trucks, motor homes, motorcycles, boats, and planes.
specs.size_volume: Available in pints (12 per case) and gallons (4 per case)
key_features: Easy application on all paint finishes
specs.application_method: Apply to vehicle paint using a soft cloth, applicator pad, or polishing equipment. Work in small sections and buff to a high shine.

name: Microfiber Waffle / single
description: Professional-grade 16" x 16" waffle weave microfiber towel designed for streak-free glass and window cleaning with superior water absorption.

specs.overview: This waffle weave microfiber towel features a professional construction ideal for auto detailing, glass cleaning, and general drying. The waffle weave pattern traps water and moisture efficiently, allowing the microfiber more time to absorb liquids. The towel delivers streak-free, lint-free results and can absorb up to 7 times its weight in water.
specs.pro_tips: Store in a clean, dry location. Wash separately from lint-producing materials. Avoid fabric softener as it reduces absorbency. Can be laundered hundreds of times while maintaining performance.
specs.use_case: Professional auto detailers and car enthusiasts use this towel for cleaning windows, glass, mirrors, and drying small vehicles. It's equally effective as a hand towel for general cleaning purposes.
key_features: Waffle weave construction for superior water trapping
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Apply to wet glass or painted surfaces and glide across in one direction. The waffle pattern absorbs water and moisture as it moves. Rinse and air dry or tumble dry on low heat.

name: Glass Cleaner Concentrate / 1 Gallon
description: Professional-grade concentrated glass cleaner that removes road film, smoke, and dirt from automotive glass.

specs.overview: Tru Vue Concentrated Glass Cleaner is an excellent and effective water-based glass cleaner that removes road film, smoke, and dirt. Perfect for both hot and cold weather applications with longer working time for hot weather and fast enough evaporation for cold climates. Fast evaporating formula creates a professional-quality finish.
specs.use_case: For professional detailers and automotive enthusiasts who need an effective glass cleaner that works in all weather conditions. Ideal for removing tough road film, smoke residue, and dirt from vehicle windows.
key_features: Removes road film, smoke, and dirt
Works in hot and cold weather
Longer working time in hot weather
specs.application_method: Dilute concentrate 4:1 to 10:1 depending on desired performance (4 parts water to 1 part cleaner for heavy soiling, 10 parts water to 1 part cleaner for light cleaning). Spray diluted solution onto glass and wipe clean with a microfiber towel.

name: Matte Protectant / 1 QT
description: Matte Finish Protectant maintains the original appearance and adds a layer of protection to matte paint finishes without adding gloss.

specs.overview: Matte Finish Protectant is specifically formulated for matte paint finishes, which create a unique vehicle maintenance challenge requiring special care. Unlike typical wax products that can increase gloss and haze matte finishes unevenly, this product maintains the original appearance while providing a protective layer to maximize the appearance of matte finishes.
specs.use_case: For vehicle owners and detailers with matte finish paint who need proper maintenance without adding gloss or haze to the finish.

name: Honda TYPE R 30th
description: Tomica Premium Honda Type R 30th Collection is a Tomica gift set within the Tomica Premium toyline, released September 17, 2022.

specs.overview: This set commemorates the 30th anniversary of Honda TYPE R in 2022, containing 3 Tomica Premiums of INTEGRA TYPE R, NSX TYPE R and CIVIC TYPE R. The collection is a high-quality and durable toy suitable for both play and display purposes, with detail and accuracy in replicating real-life vehicles, and features a realistic design with working features such as moving wheels.
specs.use_case: This is a great collectible for fans of miniature vehicle enthusiasts, suitable for both play and display.
key_features: Integra Type R with 1/62 Scale, Suspension/Opening Doors
NSX Type R with 1/60 Scale, Suspension
Civic Type R with 1/62 Scale, Suspension/Opening Doors
specs.coverage_yield: Includes three Honda Type R model figures
specs.application_method: Collectible display or play toy

name: Yellow edge brush
description: A wheel-shaped scrub brush built for cleaning grout lines and grooved surfaces in and around the bathroom.

specs.overview: The Edge brush is a wheel-shaped scrub brush used for getting into tight grooves and grout lines. This brush features medium non-scratch nylon bristles, a steel shaft with rust resistant nickel plating, a strong polypropylene plastic block for increased durability, and a 1/4 inch quick change shaft for use in any drill. The brushes are designed as attachments for use in cordless drills you already own, and the higher speed and power of a cordless drill allows you to cut through messes up to twice as fast as standard cleaning methods.
specs.pro_tips: The shafts and blocks are engineered to last, unlike competitors' brushes that tend to break under heavy load or sustained use.
specs.use_case: For tight, thin spots like grout lines and shower door tracks, a yellow edge brush can do the job right.
key_features: Steel shaft with rust resistant nickel plating
Strong polypropylene plastic block for increased durability
1/4 inch quick change shaft for use in any drill
specs.coverage_yield: Durable with proper care; suitable for heavy use
specs.application_method: Insert into cordless drill. The brush attachment is used with your existing cordless drill or impact driver.

name: Multifunction Bucket Lid Seat w/ Soft Foam
description: Soft foam-padded bucket lid seat that snaps securely onto 12" buckets, transforming them into a comfortable seat, kneeling pad, or storage surface.

specs.overview: The bucket lid seat snaps securely on buckets and includes a padded top for comfort, turning any bucket into a comfortable seat, kneeling post, step stool, or storage container. It comes with a convenient side rail for hanging detailing accessories. Perfect for detailing shops, mobile detailing work, and hand car wash operations.
specs.pro_tips: Available in multiple colors (red and black). Lightweight design allows for easy transport between mobile detailing locations. The side rail is specifically designed to hold spray bottles and brushes, keeping your workspace organized and tools within reach during extended work sessions.
specs.use_case: Designed for professional detailers and DIY enthusiasts who need ergonomic seating solutions and organized tool storage during car detailing tasks. Ideal for those working on lower vehicle panels, wheels, and interiors for extended periods.
specs.size_volume: Fits on any 12" diameter standard round bucket
key_features: Snaps securely on buckets with padded top for comfort
Fits on any 12" diameter standard round bucket
Transforms bucket into seat, kneeling post, step stool, or storage container
Side rail for hanging detailing accessories
Soft foam construction with padded cover
specs.coverage_yield: Built for long-term daily use in garages, shops, detailing vans, or mobile service setups
specs.application_method: Simply snap the lid onto any standard 12-inch diameter bucket. Use as a comfortable seat while working, kneeling pad for lower body work, step stool for reaching upper areas, or organizational tool for hanging detailing supplies.
surface_compatibility: Works with any 12" diameter round bucket
Suitable for detailing shops, mobile units, and hand car wash stations
