name: Graphene Spray Coating / 16oz
description: Renegade Graphene + Ceramic Spray Coating is a 1-year sprayable coating engineered with SiO2, carnauba & graphene dispersion that combines extreme hydrophobic properties with enhanced gloss, UV & water spot protection.

specs.scent: This graphene spray coating has a fantastic smell and is very user friendly.
specs.overview: Renegade's Graphene + Ceramic Spray Coating is a 1-year sprayable coating engineered with SiO2, carnauba & graphene dispersion that combines extreme hydrophobic properties with enhanced gloss, UV & water spot protection. Graphene is a carbon-based molecule that can effectively bind to and fortify surfaces when functionalized, demonstrating improved contact angle, gloss, scratch resistance, UV resistance and a reduction in water spotting. The formula is mostly water-based with minor solvents used to help quickly dry the product on the vehicle's surface.
specs.pro_tips: Easy on, easy off formula that can be used in the shade or sun. Makes maintenance washes easy with a simple rinse.
specs.use_case: Designed to wash, clean, and protect the glass and painted surfaces of vehicles. Suitable for both professional detailers and car enthusiasts seeking long-lasting paint protection with enhanced shine and easier maintenance washing.
key_features: Engineered with SiO2, carnauba & graphene dispersion
Provides 3X the water beading of normal spray coatings
Easy on, easy off formula that can be used in shade or sun
specs.application_method: Spray onto the work surface or onto a clean Premium 16" x 16" Microfiber Towel, and spread until the surface is evenly coated. Gently buff the surface until any residual coating has been sufficiently dried and worked into the paint or glass.

name: Chrome Polish & Conditioner
description: Chrome polish and conditioner that removes oxidation, restores luster, and protects chrome surfaces from corrosion and rust with mild abrasives.

specs.overview: Renegade Pipe Dream Chrome Conditioner and Polish is a professional-grade chrome polish formulated with mild abrasives and micro-abrasive wax blend. It removes oxidation stains, tarnish, and grime while blending imperfections to restore a radiant shine. The formula combines wax and synthetic fillers to create a protective layer against dirt, road grime, pollution, UV light, and corrosion, making it ideal for motorcycles, cars, trucks, semis, and marine applications.
specs.pro_tips: Use an applicator pad for chrome pipes with oxidation and a non-abrasive prep pad for chrome pipes with stains. For heavily oxidized surfaces, use circular motions to break up oxidation, then finish with linear motions for consistent results. Product may be used with dual-action machines at 2-3 speed level with a White Foam Finishing Pad.
specs.use_case: Designed for detailers and vehicle owners who need to restore and maintain the shine of chrome surfaces on motorcycles, cars, pickups, semis, and marine equipment. Perfect for removing discoloration and oxidation from grilles, trims, wheels, exhaust tips, and chrome pipes.
key_features: Protects against corrosion, rust, UV light, and contaminants
Mild abrasives gentle enough to avoid damage
specs.application_method: Apply Renegade Pipe Dream to a premium microfiber round pad or applicator pad. Use linear motions to agitate the chrome surface. Let dry 2-3 minutes. Wipe excess product away with a clean microfiber towel to reveal the final shine.

name: Sonax Microfiber Mitt
description: Practical and convenient wash glove for exterior vehicle cleaning with soft microfibre quality that ensures thorough and gentle cleaning of all paintwork, glass and plastic surfaces.

specs.overview: The soft and smooth microfibre quality ensures a thorough and gentle cleaning of all paintwork, glass and plastic surfaces. Intensive cleaning with maximum surface protection: dirt is held in the fibres and cannot scratch the surfaces. The ergonomic shape of the glove, with thumb and a separating seam in the finger area, as well as the elastic cuff, prevents it from twisting or slipping off.
specs.pro_tips: For best results use with Sonax Car Wash Shampoo Concentrate or Sonax Ceramic Active Shampoo.
specs.use_case: For cleaning vehicle exterior areas. Ideal for professional and DIY detailers who want to prevent wash-induced scratches and swirl marks while maintaining superior paint safety.
key_features: Ergonomic shape with thumb and separating seam in finger area
Elastic cuff prevents twisting or slipping
Soft microfibre quality that holds dirt without scratching surfaces
specs.coverage_yield: Washable in machine and reusable many times
specs.application_method: Thoroughly rinse the glove every now and then. Use wet with car wash shampoo to clean vehicle exterior surfaces. Do not use fabric softener or tumble dry.

name: Round yellow brush
description: Medium-stiffness yellow nylon drill brush attachment for bathroom cleaning, tile, grout, and general-purpose scrubbing without scratching surfaces.

specs.overview: Drillbrush yellow drill brush attachments feature medium-stiffness nylon bristles designed for cordless drill operation. These reusable power scrubber brushes cut through soap scum, mildew, and grime on bathroom surfaces, tile, grout, carpet, and upholstery. The brushes feature a 1/4-inch quick-change shaft compatible with most cordless drills and impact drivers, and are designed not to scratch most bathroom surfaces even under heavy use.
specs.pro_tips: For stubborn grout lines, tilt the 4-inch flat brush at a 45-degree angle. Use the original bullet-shaped brush for curved spaces like sink bases and toilet bases. The 2-inch detail brush is ideal for small missed spots. Medium bristles are effective on most bathroom surfaces without causing damage.
specs.use_case: Professional cleaners and homeowners who want to accelerate bathroom cleaning, tile restoration, grout scrubbing, and general household cleaning tasks using cordless power drill equipment.
specs.size_volume: Available in multiple configurations: Original (standard), Mini (smaller), Jumbo (larger), 2-inch detail, 4-inch flat, 5-inch, various kit bundles (2-piece to 5-piece)
key_features: Compatible with cordless drills and impact drivers
Available in multiple shapes: original (bullet-shaped), flat (round), detail, edge/wheel-shaped
specs.coverage_yield: Durable with proper care and maintenance; designed for repeated use across multiple cleaning projects
specs.application_method: Insert the 1/4-inch shaft into your cordless drill chuck and tighten. Apply light to moderate pressure while operating at standard drill speeds. Use flat brushes on large surfaces; original/bullet brushes for curves and corners; detail brushes for small spots; edge brushes for grout lines.

name: Decon Claybar / Medium
description: A clay bar dedicated for medium to heavy contamination removal that leaves the surface with a glass-like finish.

specs.overview: An innovative clay formula that instantly removes environmental contaminants which can deteriorate a vehicle's finish. Formulated to easily and gently lift foreign particles, overspray, tar, tree sap, and bugs leaving a smooth finish. This clay bar even helps reduce the chance of swirling during the polishing process. Can be used on virtually any hard surface such as paint, glass, chrome, plastic, fiberglass and can be used on automobiles, SUVs, motorcycles, boats, RV's and airplanes.
specs.pro_tips: Knead the clay out to form a flat piece and rub the affected paint area with it. Use water or a water-based lubricant designed to help the clay slide on the paint surface. The clay works with minimal pressure and once it gets loaded up with contaminants, you simply re-knead it and use it over and over. Caution should be used not to drop the clay on the ground. If this happens, the clay is rendered useless.
specs.use_case: For detailers and vehicle owners who need medium to heavy contamination removal. Removes contamination from overspray, rail dust, industrial fallout, bugs, tar, tree sap and ferrous metal particles.
specs.size_volume: Two individually wrapped 100-gram clay bars per package
key_features: Medium grade for medium to heavy contamination removal
Neon orange color for easy contamination tracking
specs.coverage_yield: Multiple applications depending on contamination levels and reuse after kneading
specs.application_method: Thoroughly wash and rinse vehicle. Spray favorite clay lubricant over 2x2' area of vehicle's painted surface. Gently rub clay bar over painted surface with a back-and-forth motion to remove exterior contaminants. Wipe with clean microfiber towel to remove contaminants and remaining lubricant.

name: Classic Detailing Brush / L
description: Large Classic Detailing Brush with soft, high-density synthetic bristles for interior and exterior automotive cleaning. Durable and safe for delicate surfaces.

specs.overview: The Maxshine Large Classic Detailing Brush features premium PET synthetic bristles designed for both interior and exterior automotive detailing. The soft, densely-packed bristles tackle tough cleaning tasks while remaining gentle on delicate surfaces like leather seats and trim. The non-slip rubber handle provides secure grip control during extended use.
specs.pro_tips: Pair with MaxShine compound products for best results. The non-slip handle provides secure control when using water-based cleaning agents and degreasers. Store with handle hole facing down for easy hanging after use.
specs.use_case: Professional and enthusiast detailers seeking a versatile brush for interior panels, leather seats, engine bays, wheels, dashboards, and hard-to-reach areas without causing scratches.
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use dry or wet with cleaning solutions, shampoos, and degreasers. Apply gentle brushing pressure on delicate surfaces; moderate to firm pressure on hardy surfaces like wheels and engine bays.

name: Detailing Swabs 10pc
description: Professional detailing swabs with five designs featuring foam or microfiber tips and varying handle lengths for cleaning tight crevices in vehicle interiors and exteriors.

specs.overview: These detailing swabs are designed for detailing tight crevices and spaces in both the interior and exterior of your vehicle, with selections including five designs featuring either foam or microfiber tips, varying handle lengths, and unique head shapes. They are suitable for deeper cleaning of high-cleanliness areas, don't leave residue like regular cotton swabs, and stay together securely without falling off.
specs.pro_tips: Use to remove wax and polish from car badges and side moldings. Also great for interiors, removing dust from crevasses of dashboards, gear levers, consoles, air vents and speakers.
specs.use_case: Best used on car outlets, radiators, air conditioners, speakers, fans, wipers, logos, and more to conveniently remove dust and dirt in tough-to-reach areas.
key_features: Five different swab designs with foam or microfiber tips
Varying handle lengths and unique head shapes
Soft and non-abrasive tips for reliable cleaning of narrow openings
No residue left behind, stays together securely
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use the appropriate swab type for the detailing task. Apply to tight crevices, air vents, dashboard gaps, badge areas, and other hard-to-reach surfaces. Can be used dry or with cleaning solutions.

name: Blue X Armor / 16oz
description: Solvent-based tire dressing that dries fast to a mirror-like finish lasting for days. Delivers rich, long-lasting gloss on tires, trim, rubber, plastic, and vinyl.

specs.overview: Blue X Armor is a solvent-based tire dressing formulated especially for tires and automotive trim. The product dries fast to a mirror-like finish that will last for days. It leaves a rich, long-lasting gloss on all tires, trims, rubber, plastic, vinyl, convertible tops, seat backs, arm rests, steering columns and more.
specs.use_case: Designed for detailers and car enthusiasts who want a durable, high-gloss finish on tires and trim surfaces. Ideal for professional detailing and vehicle show preparation.
specs.application_method: Apply directly to tires, trim, rubber, plastic, vinyl, and other automotive surfaces using an applicator pad or brush. Allow to dry to a mirror-like finish.

name: IK Multi Tr1 / 32oz
description: Professional trigger sprayer with adjustable nozzle for automotive detailing, cleaning, and disinfection. Resistant to most chemicals and diluted acids.

specs.overview: The IK Multi TR1 is a light, handy trigger sprayer designed for professional use in automotive detailing and cleaning. It features a translucent tank with level indicator for easy dilution, color-coded content identification system, and a stable base. The atomizer is made of high-quality materials resistant to most cleaning products, disinfectants, and diluted acids (max 5%), making it suitable for a wide range of chemical applications.
specs.pro_tips: Regularly apply grease to moving parts to prolong seal life. After each use, depressurize sprayer and clean with water. For blocked nozzles, rinse with water only—avoid metallic objects. Store away from extreme temperatures.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers, cleaners, and automotive technicians who need reliable spray application for small to medium surface work including window cleaning, interior detailing, wheel cleaning, and disinfection tasks.
key_features: Adjustable spray nozzle (tight stream to wide mist)
Resistant to most cleaning and disinfection products
Easy assembly and disassembly for maintenance
specs.coverage_yield: Typical bottle provides adequate coverage for small to medium detailing tasks; capacity depends on spray width and trigger pressure
specs.application_method: Fill tank with diluted or ready-to-use product. Adjust nozzle as needed from tight stream to wide mist. Squeeze trigger to spray. Depressurize after each use and rinse with clean water.

name: P-2 Compound / CLEARANCE
description: Medium-cut polishing compound designed to remove moderate paint defects and restore gloss to automotive clear coats.

specs.overview: P-2 Compound is a medium-cut polishing compound formulated to remove moderate surface defects including light scratches, swirl marks, oxidation, and water spots from automotive paint. This compound provides balanced cutting action while maintaining workability for effective paint correction without being overly aggressive.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts working on vehicles with moderate paint imperfections who need effective correction without heavy cutting action.
specs.application_method: Apply with microfiber or foam cutting pad using dual-action or rotary polisher. Work in small sections with overlapping passes.

name: IK Multi Pro2 / 50oz
description: Professional hand pump sprayer with 50oz capacity, designed for acids and aggressive chemicals. Features adjustable nozzles and chemical-resistant construction for auto detailing and industrial applications.

specs.overview: The IK MULTI Pro 2 is a heavy-duty hand pump sprayer engineered for maximum strength and versatility with acids and aggressive chemicals. Built with injection-molded polypropylene and polyethylene tank featuring Viton seals and washers resistant to most acids, solvents, and disinfectants. It includes adjustable conical and flat fan nozzles for spray pattern selection, a 45 psi depressurizable safety valve, and ergonomic design for professional use in automotive detailing, cleaning, and industrial applications.
specs.pro_tips: After each use depressurize the sprayer and clean it with water. In the event of obstruction of the nozzle, clean it with water and do not use metallic objects. To prolong the life of the joints, regularly apply some drops of oil or grease on the moving parts.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers, custodians, and industrial workers who need to spray acidic cleaners, glass cleaners, quick detailers, spray sealants, and other aggressive chemicals on vehicles and surfaces without fear of chemical damage to the sprayer.
key_features: Adjustable conical and flat fan nozzles
Chemical-resistant FPM Viton seals and washers
Large filling mouth for easy filling and cleaning
Ergonomic design with safety lock trigger
specs.application_method: Fill tank with desired chemical, pump handle to build pressure, squeeze trigger to spray. Adjustable conical nozzle for concentrated spray or switch to flat fan nozzle for wider coverage. Depressurize after each use and rinse with water.

name: Product Rack / Bottle Holder
description: Wall-mounted spray bottle rack designed to organize and store 16oz, 32oz, or 34oz detailing bottles and compounds. Made of lightweight, corrosion-resistant metal with powder-coated black finish.

specs.overview: Made of lightweight metal with anticorrosive coating, they excel in durability and longevity. Features red rubber rings to keep bottles safe from fine edges, which can be removed to fit slightly wider bottles. Mounts directly to the wall with included wall anchors and screws for secure mounting. An optimal organization solution for 16oz, 32oz, or 34oz compounds, polishing, waxes and more.
specs.pro_tips: Not all brands have identical bottle dimensions for the same volume capacity—verify other brand bottle dimensions will fit MaxShine Spray Bottle Racks before purchase.
specs.use_case: Designed for detailing professionals and garage owners who need organized storage for spray bottles and compounds. Perfect for wall mounting in garages, mobile detailing vans, and workspace organization.
specs.size_volume: Available in 16oz, 32oz, or 34oz bottle size variants
key_features: Lightweight metal construction with anticorrosive coating
Powder-coated black finish for rust prevention
Red rubber rings to protect bottles
Removable rubber rings for wider bottles
specs.coverage_yield: Durability designed for long-term professional use with proper care and maintenance
specs.application_method: Mount directly to wall using included screws and wall anchors. Removable rubber rings can be taken out to accommodate wider bottles.
surface_compatibility: Any paintable surface suitable for wall mounting

name: Iron Buster / 16oz
description: A color changing, fast acting, pH balanced cleaner formulated to safely dissolve ferrous particulate from wheel and painted surfaces.

specs.overview: Iron Buster safely and effectively removes embedded iron particulate along with other contaminants from wheels and painted surfaces. Once applied, the product quickly changes to a purple color when iron particulate is plentiful and then can be rinsed to produce a clean surface. This product is ready to use – no dilution required.
specs.pro_tips: For maximum results, follow up with a clay bar or clay mitt after rinsing to remove any remaining bonded contaminants.
specs.use_case: Iron Buster is ideal for both routine maintenance and deep decontamination, removing ferrous contaminants from vehicle wheels and paint surfaces.
key_features: Color-Changing Formula – Turns purple upon contact with iron particles
Dissolves brake dust, rail dust, and industrial fallout within minutes
Safe for clear coat, polished metals, and modern wheel finishes
specs.application_method: For paint, wash and dry surface prior to application. For wheels, no pre-washing is required. Spray a generous amount of Iron Buster onto the paint and/or wheels, allow to dwell for 2-5 minutes, then rinse thoroughly with water using a hose or pressure washer.

name: Microfiber wheel brush 3 pk
description: Ultra-soft, scratch-free microfiber wheel brush set with three sizes (14", 18", 20") for cleaning tight spaces and intricate wheel shapes.

specs.overview: Removes road grime and brake dust from tight and narrow areas in wheels without damaging wheels. The package contains three sizes of the brush. The 100% microfibre gently removes grime and brake dust with ease from all types of wheels. Long handles allow for extended reach without straining, making it easy to clean intricate areas of your vehicle.
specs.pro_tips: The microfiber bristles are plush enough to tackle stubborn dirt while ensuring your wheels remain scratch-free.
specs.use_case: Perfect for DIYers who value keeping their wheels in pristine condition without the hassle of traditional brushes. Ideal for cleaning wheels, vehicle grills, spokes, door jams, engine areas, and other tight spots.
specs.size_volume: Length: 35cm (hair part length 15cm), 45cm (hair part length 16cm), 50cm (hair part length 20cm) Dia: 7cm, 9cm, 10cm
key_features: Three sizes for different wheel areas
Extended handles for deep wheel wells
specs.coverage_yield: Durable with proper care and maintenance
specs.application_method: Spray your desired brush with your wheel cleaner of choice, then dip it into your wash water and agitate the wheel. The 100% microfibre gently removes grime and brake dust with ease from all types of wheels. The brushes are designed to be lint-free and can be easily rinsed with soap and water. Simply shake dry or air dry for effortless cleanup after use.

name: 5 Gal Citrus Solution
description: 5 Gal Citrus Solution

name: Supreme polish medium / 16oz
description: Thick-bodied compound formulated with hollow micro abrasives to provide a fast initial cut that breaks down into a fine polishing material. Removes moderate to heavy oxidation, light scratches, and 1000-1200 grit wet sand scratches.

specs.overview: Medium Supreme Polish is a thick-bodied compound formulated with hollow micro abrasives to provide a fast initial cut that breaks down into a fine polishing material. It removes moderate to heavy oxidation, light scratches, and 1000-1200 grit wet sand scratches, along with other minor defects. Leaves a smooth surface ready for machine glazing. Safe for all types of paint.
specs.pro_tips: Pair with Supreme All-In-One Cleaner, Polish, Sealant and White Foam Finishing Pad for refined final finish.
specs.use_case: Professional and consumer detailers who need to correct moderate to heavy paint defects. Perfect for removing oxidation, light scratches, and sanding marks before final finishing.
key_features: Fast initial cut with fine polishing breakdown
specs.application_method: Pair with a Yellow Foam Polishing Pad for a fast initial cut that breaks down into a fine polishing material. Apply to paint and work with a machine polisher in overlapping sections.

name: 3” Velvet 2Pk / CLEARANCE
description: Professional orange peel removal pad that eliminates clear coat imperfections without wet sanding using 3000 grit velvet material.

specs.overview: The Orange Peel Pad is a professional detailer solution to remove orange peel on the clear coat and top coat without wet sanding, working with rotary polishers. The pad empowers aggressive removing orange peel on the clear and top coat used by professional detailers. Made with purple velvet material that is less aggressive than denim pads due to the milder velvet construction. This pad is the same grade as 3000-grit sandpaper without wet sanding and works for the top coat or thin paint system.
specs.pro_tips: Not recommended for original factory paint
specs.use_case: This product is for professional detailers used with rotary polishers, and we recommend using this pad by professionals since removing orange peel requires detailing expertise.
key_features: Hook and loop backing for easy attachment to polisher plates
Reusable - can be cleaned, dried naturally, and reused
Mild velvet material won't leave scratches
specs.coverage_yield: Reusable with proper cleaning and drying
specs.application_method: Use with rotary polishers attached via hook and loop backing

name: Microfiber 5 Pocket Detail Apron
description: Professional microfiber detailing apron with multiple pockets for storing tools, pads, and cleaning products during car detailing work.

specs.overview: The detailing apron assists to keep clothes clean and tidy while detailing. It easily protects a vehicle's exterior paint from jeans, belts, and shirts. Soft, thick microfiber feels comfortable to wear and is safe to lean against paint without scratching. Built-in waterproof layer helps repel water, soap, and chemicals, keeping clothing clean and dry.
specs.pro_tips: The microfiber apron protects the paint from buttons, zippers, and belt buckles. The apron also keeps loose clothing closer to the body so they're not in your way while you operate a polisher.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts who need to protect their clothing and vehicle paint while detailing. The apron keeps tools, pads, and products organized and accessible during work.
key_features: 330GSM microfiber material - soft and safe against paint
Deep pockets approximately 10 inches wide for detailing tools and products
specs.coverage_yield: Durable with repeated use when machine washed
specs.application_method: Wear over regular clothing with adjustable straps secured around neck and waist. Use pockets to store detailing supplies, towels, and tools during the detailing process.

name: 5” High Pro Foam Pad / CLEARANCE
description: Ultra-soft finishing pad designed with ultra-fine foam density for applying final polish, wax, or sealant with a gentle touch.

specs.overview: Designed with an ultra-soft, ultra-fine foam density specifically tailored for the delicate art of finishing. Its ultra-low density ensures a gentle touch on surfaces, making it the ultimate choice for applying final polish, wax, or sealant. The specialized construction guarantees an impeccable, swirl-free finish, preserving the brilliance of just-polished paintwork without any risk of marring or overworking the surface.
specs.pro_tips: Use at the final stage of paint correction to preserve brilliance without risk of marring or overworking the surface. Easy to clean and reapply to orbital buffer.

The formula is specifically compatible with Gtechniq's ultra-durable coatings including EXO, C1, Platinum, and Crystal Serum. Fits comfortably in the palm of your hand

name: 6" Wool Pad

specs.overview: The Uro-Wool™ 6" Cutting Pad is an aggressive wool pad made from 100% processed knitted wool—not traditional twisted wool. It delivers more cutting capability than foam pads while avoiding pigtails and heavy swirls. The pad features virtually no interface between the wool face and hook-and-loop backing, allowing power to transfer directly to the paint for faster correction cycles. Compatible with all polishing machines including rotary, dual-action, random-orbit, long-throw, and gear-driven models.
specs.pro_tips: Use as a starting pad for heavy-cut situations followed by a foam pad for finishing. Compatible with high-speed rotary, random orbital, dual-action, gear-driven, long-throw, and high-action polishers. The knitted wool construction eliminates the pigtails and swirls associated with traditional twisted wool pads.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and paint correction specialists performing heavy cutting and compounding work. Ideal for jobs requiring aggressive cutting capability and faster correction cycles.
specs.coverage_yield: Washable and reusable with proper care

description: A step below 100% white wool in aggressiveness, designed to cut while leaving a better finish than white Uro-Wool.

specs.overview: Buff & Shine Uro-Wool Blended pad uses a blend of processed wool that is 'knitted' onto the pad, not twisted. The biggest advantage of knitted wool is the minimal amount of lint floating around the shop! The face is soft to the touch but slightly denser because of the proprietary blend. The process keeps fibers fused together, helping keep product more on the face of the pad, while still being absorbed at a different rate than white Uro-Wool, making it a more versatile wool pad. The Uro-Wool pad has virtually no interface between wool fiber and hook-and-loop backing, allowing the polisher power to transfer more directly to the paint surface, resulting in faster polishing and correction cycles.
specs.pro_tips: The rule of thumb is to start with a wool buffing pad and finish with a foam pad.
specs.use_case: Designed to cut but leave a better finish than aggressive white wool pads. Ideal for professional detailers and paint correction technicians who need a balance of cutting power and finished results.

Soft to the touch with fused fibers that keep product on the face of the pad

name: Absolute Rinseless Wash / 1 Gal

specs.overview: Absolute Rinseless Wash was formulated from the ground up as a premium soap alternative, utilizing a unique subset of polymers that encapsulates and emulsifies dirt beyond what soap is capable of. Absolute allows you to wash vehicles anywhere, anytime, whether you are a detailing professional or passion driven enthusiast, and is safe and easy to use on all exterior and interior surfaces.

key_features: Unique subset of polymers that encapsulates and emulsifies dirt beyond what soap can
Water softening formula reduces hard water spotting
Functions as a rinseless wash, quick detailer, clay lubricant, or interior cleaner from one bottle
No rinsing required—just dry with a plush microfiber towel

specs.application_method: Add one ounce of Absolute to 2 gallons of water in a wash bucket. Submerge a wash mitt or multiple microfiber towels and mix the product thoroughly. No rinsing is required after the panel has been wiped down; simply take a plush microfiber towel and dry the area to a smooth finish.

key_features: Pure grade carnauba paste wax with no cleaners

name: Assorted scenes/ Air Freshener/ Mountain Pine/ 8oz
Alloygator Wheel Protection/ Red
description: Red AlloyGator wheel protectors give your car a touch of style while protecting your wheels. Provides an effective barrier against kerb damage and offers reliable protection against scratches and scuffs, especially when parking in tight spaces or navigating rough roads.

specs.overview: AlloyGator Wheel Protectors are securely integrated between alloy wheel rims and tyres to protect against scratches and scuffs caused by kerbing and road impacts. Made from super tough nylon which is flexible but tough enough to give superior protection when getting heavy impact from hitting a kerb, and locked to the wheel over 360° using highly robust patented technology. Colour runs consistently throughout the wheel protectors, meaning there is no damage to colour even after impact with a kerb. Engineered to withstand winter salt, acid rain and summer heat, preventing clear-coat corrosion during every season.
specs.pro_tips: Regularly clean your wheels and AlloyGators with normal car shampoo or universal wheel cleaners suitable for delicate finishes like chrome; avoid harsh acid based cleaners and thick, brush-on tyre shines used by some hand car-washes.
specs.use_case: Drivers can glide into narrow bays and kerbs without flinching as AlloyGators absorb every accidental scrape, keeping alloys pristine and adding value to your part-exchange offer.
specs.size_volume: Set of 4 AlloyGator wheel protectors per set; fits wheels ranging from 12" to 24" diameter
key_features: Locked to wheel over 360° using highly robust patented technology
Only TUV and MIRA certified wheel protector on the market
Colour runs consistently throughout, preventing colour damage after impact
Stainless steel securing clips and super bond adhesive guarantee protectors stay firmly in place
Coloured throughout so a scuff or scrape won't remove coloring
specs.coverage_yield: AlloyGators will hide roughly 1/4" of damage depending on the wheel/tire and protect from further damage. Long-term durability with proper maintenance.
specs.application_method: Installing AlloyGators is straightforward and hassle-free, with clear fitting instructions and care advice included whether installed by a professional 5 Star Fitter or yourself. You can fit AlloyGators yourself if you have a rubber mallet and a car jack.

name: Alloygator Wheel Protection/ Graphite
description: Premium alloy wheel rim protectors in graphite color, engineered to absorb curb and pothole impacts while enhancing wheel appearance. Set of 4 protectors fits wheels 12-24 inches.

specs.overview: Alloygator Wheel Protection in Graphite is a highly engineered rim guard system designed to prevent curb rash and pothole damage. Manufactured from blended super tough nylon composite with UV stabilizers and impact modifiers, these protectors sit between the wheel and tire, held in place with patented diamond gripping technology and stainless steel securing clips. Graphite is a discreet color option that complements most wheel finishes while remaining virtually invisible during normal driving.
specs.pro_tips: Check wheel and tire compatibility using the included suitability gauge before installation. Regularly clean wheels and protectors with mild car shampoo or universal wheel cleaners. Avoid harsh acid-based cleaners. Monitor fitment regularly to ensure protectors remain secure. Professional installation recommended and available through Alloygator's 5-Star Fitter network.
specs.use_case: Ideal for drivers in urban environments or tight parking situations who want to prevent costly wheel damage. Protects alloy wheels from curb rash, scratches, and scuffs while maintaining a clean aesthetic.
specs.size_volume: Set of 4 (fits one vehicle with 4 wheels)
key_features: Manufactured from super tough blended nylon composite
Patented 360° locking technology with diamond gripping
Stainless steel securing clips for secure fit
TUV and MIRA certified for quality and safety
Universal fit - compatible with 80% of OEM wheel and tire combinations
Includes suitability gauge for proper fitment verification
Color runs throughout - no damage to color after impact
specs.coverage_yield: Designed for permanent long-term protection with proper care and maintenance
specs.application_method: Jack up vehicle and deflate tire. Insert protector profile between wheel and tire, hammer into place with dead blow hammer. Re-inflate tire. Includes detailed fitting instructions. Professional installation recommended.
surface_compatibility: Not recommended for diamond-cut or machine-polished wheels

name: Assorted Brushes/ B&W
description: Wheel Brush

name: Tri-Clean / 500ml
description: All-surface interior car cleaning solution that cleans and kills 99.9% of bacteria.

specs.overview: Effectively purifies and refreshes every part of your car's interior, including seats, dashboards, door panels, carpets, floor mats, and upholstery. Features a unique odor absorber that tackles and eliminates unpleasant smells rather than masking them. Avoids leaving behind any sticky residues that attract further dirt and grime, maintaining a clean, pleasant scent and a pristine, non-porous surface throughout your car.
specs.pro_tips: I2 Tri-Clean is compatible with ceramic-coated interiors. It's formulated to be gentle on protective coatings while still providing a powerful cleaning action and will not degrade the ceramic coating.
specs.use_case: Complete car interior cleaning and sanitization.
specs.dilution_ratio: Ready to use as is. Diluting the product may reduce its effectiveness in cleaning and its antimicrobial properties.
specs.application_method: Shake the bottle and wear protective gloves. Spray the product directly on a wet MF1 ZeroR microfiber cloth. Gently agitate the surface with slight stirring for optimal action.

name: Foam Yellow Med Cut Center Ring / 7.5inch
description: 7.5-inch yellow reticulated polyester foam pad with Center Ring system for medium cutting and light polishing on automotive paint.

specs.overview: This 7.5" yellow foam pad from Buff & Shine is engineered for medium cutting and light polishing work. The hex-face design helps dissipate polish or compounds evenly while minimizing grabbing and reducing heat generation. The patented Center Ring centering system allows for quick, perfect pad alignment on 6" backing plates, eliminating vibration and pad wobble during buffing operations.
specs.pro_tips: Pad must be used with Buff & Shine 6" Center Ring backing plates (658Y or 600Y) for proper fit and performance. The Center Ring system achieves perfect centering in seconds, reducing operator fatigue during extended buffing sessions.
specs.use_case: Designed for detailers and body shop professionals who need a medium-cut foam pad for paint correction, light compounding, and polishing on clear coats and automotive finishes.
key_features: Hex-faced design for even compound/polish distribution
Patent-pending Center Ring centering system for vibration-free buffing
Flexible backing plate that accepts air, rotary, and random orbit buffers
Recessed center protects paint from backing plate edges
Measured cell structure for controlled cutting performance
Reduces heat and eliminates pad grabbing
specs.coverage_yield: Durable 50+ uses with proper care and maintenance
specs.application_method: Mount to 6" Buff & Shine Center Ring backing plates (658Y or 600Y). Use with your preferred buffing compound or polish. Works with air, rotary, and random orbit buffers.

name: Brake Buster / 16oz
description: Non-acidic wheel and tire cleaner that safely removes brake dust, oil, dirt, stains, and light corrosion without damaging premium wheel finishes.

specs.overview: Brake Buster is a unique cleaning gel that adheres to wheel surfaces and penetrates dirt deposits for safe removal. It contains corrosion inhibitors that deposit a thin protective layer on wheels, guarding against future corrosion. The product is safe on all OEM finishes including painted, powder-coated, bare metal, and alloy wheels.
specs.pro_tips: Work in a cool, shaded area with cool wheels. For heavily contaminated wheels, allow product to dwell and agitate with a soft-bristle wheel brush. Do not spray on glass or hot surfaces. Not recommended for polished aluminum, uncoated or anodized wheels.
specs.use_case: Ideal for detailers and car owners who need to safely clean wheels and tires without using harsh acids. Works for both routine maintenance and professional shop applications.
key_features: Non-acidic formula safe on all wheel finishes
High-foaming gel formula for better dwell time
Cleans both wheels and tires in one step
Clings to surfaces for improved cleaning performance
specs.coverage_yield: Multiple applications per bottle depending on dilution ratio
specs.dilution_ratio: 5:1 for regular maintenance; undiluted for heavy buildup
specs.application_method: Dilute 5:1 (five parts water to one part cleaner) for regular maintenance or use undiluted for heavy buildup. Spray on cool wheels, allow to dwell 30-60 seconds, agitate with brush if needed, then rinse thoroughly with water.

name: IK Hc / 35oz
description: Professional industrial trigger sprayer engineered for oils, solvents, lubricants and petroleum products with maximum chemical resistance.

specs.overview: The IK HC TR 1 is an industrial-grade trigger sprayer manufactured with highly resistant materials specifically designed for use with animal and vegetable oils, hydrocarbon-based solvents, lubricants and petroleum products. Ideal for automotive applications including brake cleaning, tar stain removal, and pre-paint surface preparation.
specs.use_case: Professional automotive technicians and industrial workers who need to apply oils, solvents, and petroleum-based products with precision.
key_features: Highly resistant materials for oils and solvents
specs.application_method: Fill bottle with product, prime sprayer, and depress trigger for controlled application.

name: Spray Bottle / 32oz
description: Professional-grade spray bottle designed for repeated use in shop and field environments. Perfect for mixing and applying detailing chemicals.

specs.overview: Durable 32 oz professional-grade spray bottle designed for repeated use in shop and field environments, featuring a heavy-duty trigger sprayer with an adjustable dial nozzle that allows easy switching between spray and stream patterns for controlled application. Ideal for automotive detailing chemicals, cleaners, and degreasers.
specs.pro_tips: For best performance and extended service life, rinse thoroughly after use when dispensing solvents or acidic products.
specs.use_case: Perfect for automotive detailing, cleaning, and professional use. Ideal for mixing concentrated products and applying diluted detailing solutions.
key_features: Heavy-duty construction with an easy-to-read dilution chart and precise ounce measurements on the side
Adjustable nozzle that switches from fine mist to powerful stream
Made from HDPE plastic, which is chemically resistant
Thick sidewall construction with a dilution tab for chemical dilutions
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Fill bottle with concentrated product and water according to dilution chart. Adjust nozzle from mist to stream setting as needed for application.

name: Maxshine Spray Bottle/ Grey
description: Heavy-duty 25oz spray bottle with chemical-resistant plastic construction and adjustable nozzle for controlled dispensing of detailing chemicals.

specs.overview: MaxShine's Heavy Duty Spray Bottle features durable, chemical-resistant plastic construction designed to safely contain and dispense detailing chemicals without cracking or degrading. The 25-ounce capacity provides ample storage for your preferred products, while the high-quality sprayer head and adjustable nozzle allow you to control the spray pattern from fine mist to a high-powered stream for precise application.
specs.pro_tips: Use fine mist setting for light detailing tasks and stream setting for heavier cleaning. Ensure surface is clean and cool before application.
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional detailers and enthusiasts who need reliable storage and precise application of detailing chemicals, wheel cleaners, interior sprays, and other automotive products.
key_features: Adjustable nozzle - fine mist to high-powered stream
Available in multiple colors including Grey with trigger options
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Fill bottle with desired detailing chemical. Adjust nozzle to desired spray pattern (mist or stream) and spray onto surface.

name: Maxshine Spray Bottle/ Black
description: Heavy-duty 25 oz spray bottle with adjustable nozzle for precise spray control. Chemical-resistant plastic construction ideal for storing and dispensing detailing products.

specs.overview: MaxShine's Heavy Duty Spray Bottle features durable, chemical-resistant plastic construction designed to securely contain detailing chemicals. The high-quality sprayer head withstands rigorous detailing tasks, while the adjustable nozzle allows you to control the spray pattern from fine mist to high-powered stream. With a 25-ounce capacity, this bottle provides a practical solution for storing and dispensing your preferred detailing chemicals during application.
specs.pro_tips: Keep spare trigger replacements on hand (available separately in red, grey, or black). Rinse thoroughly after each use to prevent chemical buildup.
specs.use_case: Professional and DIY detailers who need reliable, chemical-resistant storage and dispensing of cleaning solutions, polishes, waxes, and other detailing products.
key_features: Adjustable nozzle for fine mist to high-powered stream spray patterns
Durable sprayer head for rigorous tasks
Black bottle with red and grey trigger

name: Maxshine Measuring Cup / 1L
description: Chemical-resistant measuring cup constructed from food-grade polypropylene with high accuracy markings for precise dilution and product transfer in car detailing.

Measurements on both sides allow you to read no matter when you hold the measuring beaker with your left or right hands. The angled handle makes the measuring cup comfortable and labor-saving to grip when transferring ingredients, providing a perfect choice for car detailing.
specs.pro_tips: Useful for professionals who order in bulk sizes to avoid carrying large, heavy bottles to job sites.

Ergonomic open handle – comfortable, non-slip grip
Dual-sided measurements for left and right-handed use

name: Max Shine Microfiber Wash Mitt
description: Ultra-soft microfiber wash mitt designed for scratch-free vehicle washing. Holds loads of soapy water for efficient cleaning of bodywork, wheels, and trim.

specs.overview: The Maxshine Microfiber Wash Mitt is engineered with ultra-plush microfiber fibers that safely lift dirt from surfaces and store contaminants deep within the fibers to avoid paint scratches. The chubby spun strands hold loads of soapy water to deliver superior cleaning performance. This ergonomically designed mitt won't hurt your car's paint or leave swirls, and features high-density sponge backing bonded with top-class microfiber for excellent durability and foam absorption.
specs.pro_tips: Store in a clean, dry place between uses. Use separate buckets for washing and rinsing to minimize dirt transfer. The mitt works great dry as a dusting tool. Machine wash regularly to maintain optimal performance and absorbency.
specs.use_case: Perfect for professional detailers and car enthusiasts who need a reliable, scratch-free wash mitt for routine vehicle washing and maintenance. Ideal for cleaning delicate paint surfaces while removing dirt and grime efficiently.
key_features: Ultra-soft microfiber material prevents scratches and swirls
Chubby spun strands hold loads of soapy water
High-density sponge backing with foam absorption
Elastic cuff designed to fit hands of all sizes
specs.coverage_yield: Over 100 washes with proper care
specs.application_method: Wet the mitt with clean water and car wash soap. Use gentle circular motions to wash the vehicle's exterior surfaces including bodywork, wheels, wheel wells, and grille. Rinse thoroughly between bucket dips. Machine wash in gentle cycle with low heat to clean.

name: Curved Med Green Brush / 18inch
description: 18-inch curved wash brush with super dense flagged-tip bristles designed to trap dirt, brake dust, and road grime from vehicle wheels and automotive bodies.

specs.overview: Renegade's 18-inch curved wash brush features super dense flagged-tip bristles that effectively trap and lift dirt, brake dust, and road grime from car wheels and automotive bodies. The long curved non-slip handle allows you to clean hard-to-reach areas. Bristles remain upright after many uses, making this brush ideal for professional detailing applications.
specs.pro_tips: The curved handle design allows access to hard-to-reach areas during vehicle washing. Rinse bristles thoroughly after each use to maintain bristle integrity.
specs.use_case: Perfect for cleaning vehicle wheels, fenders, undercarriages, SUVs, boats, and trucks. Professionals and detailing enthusiasts use this brush to reach difficult areas during wash operations.
key_features: Super dense flagged-tip bristles for effective dirt and grime removal
Long curved non-slip handle for ergonomic control
18-inch head width for efficient cleaning coverage
Bristles maintain upright shape after extended use
Suitable for wheels, rims, fenders, and undercarriages
specs.application_method: Wet the brush and vehicle surface. Agitate the brush across wheels, fenders, and other surfaces to loosen and lift dirt and brake dust. Rinse thoroughly after use.

name: Crevice Brush / 6inch
description: Essential detailing brush designed to reach tight spaces and crevices, removing dirt and grime from hard-to-access areas.

specs.overview: The Crevice Detailing Brush is the ideal brush for cleaning cracks, gaps and crevices anywhere in your vehicle. Whether it is waxes, polishes or sealants, the possible residue that can be left in the crevices of your vehicle can be ugly and really take away from the finish. Detail Factory Crevice brush sets have shorter, stiffer bristles designed to reach into cracks and crevices and "dig" out dirt and grime.
specs.pro_tips: I used one for reaching the between the seats and console and all the other little nooks, while using the other to brush out a microfiber pad just to see if it works. It brought the microfiber pad back from being flat while not destroying the integrity of the pad.
specs.use_case: I personally love this brush on the cracks between the seat and frame of the vehicle. Also, for the cracks in leather seats, this is my go-to brush. Handy little brush for all the crevices that collect dirt and dust around the dash, vents, console, and shift boot.
key_features: The extra durable 1/2" red nylon bristles are staple set into the black polypropylene handle for extreme durability
Metal free construction to prevent scratching
specs.coverage_yield: This brush is built to last and has countless uses
specs.application_method: This brush fits great in the hand and is very easy to maneuver in these cracks and crevices to remove any unsightly gunk!

name: Crystal Serum / 50ml
description: Premium ceramic coating protection for vehicle owners who demand a high-gloss finish and lasting defense against environmental contaminants.

specs.overview: This advanced silicon dioxide–based formula bonds at a molecular level with your paint's clear coat to create a durable, chemical-resistant layer that shields against swirl marks, bird droppings, UV rays, and water spots. It offers 80% of the performance of the professional-grade Crystal Serum Ultra, making it accessible to both enthusiasts and professional detailers. Serum Light forms an ultra- durable, high-gloss, slick to the touch, chemically bonding inorganic layer of 9h optically clear ceramic.
specs.pro_tips: To apply CSL your vehicle must be indoors and it must remain indoors for at least 12 hours after application · Ambient conditions must be above 3 degrees C and below 25 C. Coverage: around 3-4 sedans applying 1 layer.
specs.use_case: Designed for low-maintenance upkeep, it's the ideal choice for anyone seeking long-term paint protection and a professional-grade finish. Crystal Serum Light is the prosumer version of the world famous Gtechniq Accredited Detailer only Crystal Serum Ultra. Serum Light offers 80% of professional Serum's performance, but if applied incorrectly can be machine polished from your vehicle paintwork.
key_features: Up to 5 years of protection when properly maintained
9h clear ceramic will reach about 80% of the CS Pro's performance (scratch and chemical resistance)
Resistant to chemicals ranging from pH2 - pH12
Unlike mainstream wax and organic polymer coatings, Serum and Serum Light can resist much higher and lower temperatures. They resist temperatures as low as -40o to as high as +250o C
specs.coverage_yield: Sufficient for 1 Med-Large Car
specs.application_method: Soak the application pad with 3 full measures from the pipette. Spread onto a small panel, or half a large panel and immediately remove residue with a MF1 cloth, follow with a second wipe. Apply CSL in overlapping strokes to a 2ft by 2ft area or follow the natural body lines.

name: D/A Random Orbital Polisher / 3inch
description: The M312 orbital polisher effortlessly handles polishing intricate surfaces with its dual action motion, ideal for detailers working on curves and small details.

specs.overview: The M312 orbital polisher effortlessly handles polishing intricate surfaces and is a must-have for any detailer. With its 12mm short-throw range and a 3in backing plate, it perfects where larger polishers cannot, offering tremendous flexibility with a wide 2,000 to 6,000 OPM speed range. The CNC machined counterweight gives this orbital polisher its dual action motion and is made from premium-grade steel, with balanced internal components ensuring maximum power transfer to the surface for top polishing results.
specs.pro_tips: The six speed control adjustments ranging from 2,000 to 5,500 OPM help you achieve fine polishing; easily spin the speed dial while polishing to maintain constant job flow. A great companion to a long-throw polisher to perfect where they cannot.
specs.use_case: Best for removing swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation in small and intricate areas where larger polishers cannot reach. Perfect for professional detailers and beginners polishing tight curves and detailed surfaces.
specs.application_method: Attach a polishing pad to the 3-inch backing plate. Apply compound, polish, or wax to the surface. Start at lower speeds and gradually increase using the 6-speed dial. Use light pressure and allow the dual action motion to do the work. Ideal for small panels, curves, and detail areas.

name: C1 Lacquer Hydrophobic Nano Coating Sealant and Protectant (50ml)
description: Ceramic coating that bonds directly to car's paint, delivering long-lasting protection for up to five years.

specs.overview: C1 Crystal Lacquer is a chemically bonding quartz (ceramic) paint coating. The coating forms a hard crystalline film that resists swirl marks and minor scratches from everyday hand wash routines. C1 guards your clear coat against bird droppings, tree sap, and UV rays while maintaining a glossy finish that won't fade in direct sunlight.
specs.pro_tips: Works great as a base layer. For better water beading, apply EXOv5 or C2 Ceramic Sealant over the cured coating. Just wait at least 4 hours before adding your topcoat. Use C1 Crystal Lacquer within 1 year of purchasing; once opened use within 3 months.
specs.use_case: Perfect entry point for anyone new to ceramic coating, or for enthusiasts who want durable protection without a complicated process. Ideal choice for specialty paint finishes like matte, satin, single stage paint, or very soft clearcoats.
key_features: Chemically bonds to paint, not a surface layer
Up to 5 years of protection with proper maintenance
Swirl and scratch resistant crystalline film
Works on all automotive paintwork types
specs.coverage_yield: Suitable for 1 medium to large car
specs.application_method: Designed with home application in mind. Work in small sections and buff away residue immediately. Replace the applicator every 20-30 minutes so the product doesn't crystallize in the fabric.

name: D/A Random Orbital Polisher 15mm / 5inch
description: Professional-grade dual-action orbital polisher with 15mm throw and 5-inch backing plate for efficient paint correction, swirl removal, and polishing.

specs.overview: The MaxShine M15 Pro is a powerful dual-action orbital polisher featuring a 1000W motor with a 15mm throw and 5-inch backing plate. It delivers controlled, precision polishing with an adjustable 6-speed dial (2,200-5,000 OPM) and variable-speed trigger for tackling everything from light scratch removal to aggressive paint correction. The ergonomic design includes a rubberized horn grip, D-handle, and 13-foot power cord for extended reach and reduced fatigue during prolonged use.
specs.pro_tips: The M15 Pro is versatile enough for both aggressive compounding and delicate finishing work. Its balanced 15mm throw provides a good middle ground between precision and coverage. Allow the machine to do the work—minimal downward pressure is needed due to the internal balance. The variable speed dial and trigger give precise control for different compounds and pad types. Ideal for professionals seeking a reliable, mid-throw polisher without the price premium of larger models.
specs.use_case: Designed for professional detailers and automotive enthusiasts who need versatile paint correction capabilities. Perfect for removing swirl marks, light scratches, oxidation, and applying protective coatings like sealants and waxes.
key_features: CNC machined counterweight and NSK bearing for durability
Ergonomic rubberized horn grip and D-handle
13-foot power cord with reinforced cable base
Anti-tip brace for stability when placed down
Minimal vibration for comfortable extended use
specs.application_method: Attach the 5-inch backing plate, install foam pad using hook-and-loop fastener, apply polishing compound to the pad, set desired speed using the 6-speed dial, and apply steady pressure while moving the polisher in overlapping motions across the paint surface.

name: D/A Random Orbital Polisher 21mm / 6inch
description: Professional 21mm long-throw dual-action polisher with 6-inch backing plate and 1000W motor for efficient paint correction on large vehicles and surfaces.

specs.overview: The MaxShine M21 Pro is a 21mm orbit random orbital polisher engineered for maximum coverage and efficiency on large panels and vehicles. It features a 6-inch backing plate and operates at 2,200-5,000 OPM with a progressive trigger for precise speed control. The machine delivers even distribution of compounds, polishes, and sealants while maintaining comfort through reduced vibration and an ergonomic design with rubberized grip and adjustable D-handle.
specs.pro_tips: Start at low speeds to minimize product sling. The 21mm throw provides superior coverage speed compared to 8mm and 15mm throw polishers while maintaining smooth operation. Best suited for larger surface areas and heavy correction work. Minimize vibration fatigue during extended detailing sessions with proper grip technique.
specs.use_case: Designed for professional detailers and automotive enthusiasts tackling large vehicles, boats, RVs, and extensive panels. Ideal for paint correction, swirl mark removal, light scratch elimination, and oxidation removal with efficient coverage.
specs.size_volume: 16.5 inches length x 4.2 inches width x 5.2 inches height; 6.71 lbs (with plate and power cord)
key_features: 21mm long throw orbit for maximum coverage area
Ergonomic rubberized horn grip and detachable D-handle
specs.coverage_yield: Covers extensive areas faster than smaller throw polishers due to 21mm orbit size
specs.application_method: Apply polishing compound, polish, or sealant to the pad. Start the polisher slowly and adjust speed with progressive trigger. Maintain comfortable grip and allow even distribution of product across the work surface. Lock trigger for continuous operation.

name: Eraser Wheel
description: Rubber eraser wheel tool that safely removes decals, vinyl graphics, adhesive tape, and stickers from vehicle surfaces using friction instead of chemicals or abrasives.

specs.overview: This powerful tool is designed to quickly and easily remove vinyl decals, adhesive, pinstriping, and stickers without causing any damage to your vehicle's acrylic enamel, urethane paint, or clearcoat. The solid molded wheel rids the substrate of decals with friction, instead of abrasives, thereby preventing scratching and damage to the substrate. The rubber wheel includes an electric drill adapter arbor, making it simple to install on any home power or pneumatic drill.
specs.pro_tips: Best operating speed is 1,500-3,000 RPM with maximum 4,000 RPM. Use extra caution on fiberglass panels - apply only enough pressure to keep wheel against surface. Do not use on lacquer coatings.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and DIY enthusiasts who need to remove stubborn decals, vinyl graphics, pinstripes, or adhesive residue from vehicles without damaging paint or clearcoat.
specs.size_volume: Available in 3.5" and 4" diameter sizes, typically 3/4" to 1" wide
key_features: Uses friction instead of abrasives to prevent surface damage
Includes universal drill adapter for electric or pneumatic drills
Designed for high-speed operation with cooling features to reduce heat buildup
Available in multiple sizes including 3.5" and 4" diameter options
specs.coverage_yield: Wheel gradually wears down with use and may need replacement after multiple projects
specs.application_method: Apply light pressure to the top of the decal, working back and forth until it is removed. Start at the top of the decal and move side to side. Start wheel before beginning removal of decal, sticker, adhesive, etc.

name: 5 ft Metal Tip Brush Handle

Compatible with standard threaded brushes and cleaning tools

Works as a top coat to Inspiration Classic
Can be used as annual maintenance coating

description: Complete 6" buffing kit containing 5 pads from the Reflection Artist™ Pad Line: Grey Uro-Wool™ Blend, Uro-Fiber™ microfiber, and three Uro-Tec™ foam pads for cutting, polishing, and finishing.

specs.overview: The Reflection Artist™ Pad Line is a select combination of some the most innovative pads available in the industry today, created from select URO pads and specially designed new pads to complete this ALL-IN-ONE pad system. Buff and Shine developed an easy-to-use kit containing all the pads you need. These pads work with all polishing machines—simple rotary, dual-action, random-orbit, long-throw, high-action, and gear-driven machines.

ALL-IN-ONE pad system accommodating all machines, all buffing systems, and all skillsets from Novice to Professional
specs.application_method: Transfer power of the polisher and movement of the technician directly to the paint surface, resulting in faster polishing and correction cycles.

name: Dewalt Inverter Generator
description: Dewalt 2200W portable inverter generator with 80cc OHV engine, CO-Protect safety technology, and compact lightweight design. Delivers clean, stable power for sensitive electronics and tools.

specs.overview: The Dewalt DXGNI2200 is a 2200-watt portable inverter generator powered by an 80cc OHV engine with auto throttle and low-oil shutdown protection. It features CO-Protect Technology that automatically shuts down the unit if carbon monoxide levels become unsafe. The generator delivers clean, stable inverter power suitable for sensitive electronics and appliances. With a 1-gallon fuel tank, it provides up to 11 hours of runtime at 25% load, while the fully enclosed design reduces noise levels and meets National Park Service campground requirements.
specs.pro_tips: Operates quietly at 60 dBA, suitable for noise-sensitive environments. Runtime extends to 11 hours at 25% load with Economy Mode. Meets National Park Service campground noise requirements. Features recoil start for reliable operation.
specs.use_case: Ideal for jobsites, home backup power, camping, RV use, and emergency power. Perfect for powering tools, appliances, and sensitive electronics requiring clean, stable power delivery.
key_features: 2200 watts peak power / 1700 watts running watts
80cc OHV engine with auto throttle and low-oil shutdown
Clean Inverter Technology for sensitive electronics
Fully enclosed design reduces noise (60 dBA at 23 feet)
Economy Mode for fuel savings and quieter operation
Compact and lightweight with integrated carry handle
LED indicators for oil level, overload, and ready status
specs.application_method: Connect desired devices or appliances to the 120V outlets. Use the integrated Off/Run/Choke knob for startup. Economy Mode can be engaged to reduce fuel consumption during partial load operation.

name: EZ red sprayable metal polish
description: Renegade EZ Red is a spray-on metal polish formulated to restore shine and remove oxidation, water spots, and light haze from aluminum, chrome, stainless steel, and polished metal surfaces.

specs.overview: Renegade's EZ Red Sprayable Metal Polish brings brilliant shine and luster back to polished surfaces with a convenient spray formula designed for on-the-go application. Fine abrasives deliver a show-quality finish by removing light haze, imperfections, water spots, and staining. The easy-to-spray formula won't cake up or harden, making it ideal for checker plate and diamond plate polishing. Cleaning agents and sealants leave metal surfaces bright, clean, and protected between more intensive machine polishing sessions.
specs.pro_tips: For best results, pre-clean surfaces with Renegade Savage APC (All-Purpose Cleaner) or Renegade NOtorious H20 Waterless Wash to remove all surface contaminants before polishing. Follow polishing with a protective coating such as Renegade Hydro Guard Ceramic Spray or Graphene + Ceramic Spray Coating to extend shine and protection. To maintain spray trigger longevity, follow the manufacturer's maintenance practices outlined in their instructional video.
specs.use_case: Ideal for truck owners, vintage car enthusiasts, and professionals who need quick touch-ups on polished metal surfaces. Perfect for maintaining wheels, tanks, billet parts, and trim at car shows or between professional detailing sessions.
key_features: Spray-on formula for quick, easy application
Fine abrasives remove oxidation and water spots without caking
Contains protective sealants for extended shine
No mess compared to traditional paste polishes
Works on aluminum, chrome, stainless steel, and diamond plate
specs.application_method: Shake well before and during use. Apply EZ Red to a Premium Microfiber Round Pad or microfiber towel, or spray directly onto the surface. Work the polish into the surface thoroughly and let dry for approximately 30 seconds until a haze develops. Use a separate clean, dry microfiber towel to remove the polish and buff to a high shine. Recommend using linear motions that follow the mill lines of the surface being polished.

name: Flat White 4 Inch Brush
description: Soft white 4-inch flat brush attachment for cordless drills designed for cleaning large flat surfaces on vehicles and around the home without scratching.

specs.overview: The Drillbrush Flat White 4 Inch Brush is a drill-powered cleaning attachment featuring soft, non-scratch nylon bristles ideal for large flat surface cleaning. It works with any cordless drill via a quick-change connection and is suitable for automotive detailing tasks like car seats, fenders, and headlights, as well as home surfaces including tile walls, floors, and shower areas. The brush harnesses drill power to clean up to twice as fast as manual methods.
specs.pro_tips: The higher speed and power of a cordless drill allows you to cut through messes up to twice as fast as standard cleaning methods. Do not use on delicate or unfinished surfaces.
specs.use_case: Designed for professional auto detailers and homeowners who need efficient cleaning of large flat surfaces. Perfect for automotive trim, upholstery, door panels, windshields, and general home cleaning tasks.
key_features: Steel shaft with rust resistant nickel plating
1/4 inch quick-change connection compatible with cordless drills and impact drivers
Engineered for durability under heavy load and sustained use
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Attach the brush to a cordless drill or impact driver using the 1/4 inch quick-change shaft. Apply to large flat areas at appropriate pressure. For stubborn debris, tilt at a 45-degree angle.

name: Dragon Glide / XL
description: Soft and flexible synthetic drying cloth with high absorption and excellent glide for streak-free drying of all surfaces.

specs.overview: Dragon Glide is a non-woven synthetic drying cloth designed for superior absorbency and flexibility. Features outstanding drying, dusting, cleaning and washing power due to the unique construction of the fiber material.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and car enthusiasts who need a versatile drying cloth that can be used dry, damp, or with soapy water for cleaning, washing, and dusting.
key_features: Multi-purpose use - dry, damp, or with soap
specs.application_method: Use dry for dusting, damp for cleaning, or with soapy water for washing. Provides streak-free drying on all surfaces.

description: Professional foam finishing pad designed for ultra-fine finishing and applying protection products with smooth, even coverage

It ensures smooth, even coverage and is their most popular option for final finishing on the most delicate paints, as well as for applying sealants and waxes. Features a patent pending EdgeGuard that allows you to center the pad and peel the pad off the machine very easily.
specs.pro_tips: Works amazing on soft clear coats that haze very easily, black paint, and will be a go to pad for your final polish when dealing with faint haze.
specs.use_case: Perfect for professional detailers and enthusiasts working on delicate paints who need ultra-fine finishing and protection product application.
key_features: Patent pending EdgeGuard for easy centering and removal
Softest foam in the product line
specs.application_method: Best paired with finishing polishes, glazes, sealants and waxes for final finishing steps

description: A 4-inch flat yellow brush with medium stiffness nylon bristles, designed as a cordless drill attachment for bathroom and tile cleaning.

specs.overview: The Yellow Medium stiffness 4in Brush is great for cleaning flat surfaces around your bathroom. This brush features Medium non-scratch nylon bristles, steel shaft with rust resistant nickel plating, strong polypropylene plastic block for increased durability, and a 1/4 inch quick change shaft for use in any drill or impact driver. The 4 inch flat brush is best used on large flat areas like tile walls, floors, all types of tubs and showers, and even linoleum. The higher speed and power of a cordless drill allows you to cut through messes up to twice as fast as standard cleaning methods.
specs.pro_tips: When tilted at a 45 degree angle the flat brush is also great for stubborn grout lines.
specs.use_case: Great for cleaning flat surfaces around your bathroom. Best used on large flat areas like tile walls, floors, all types of tubs and showers, and even linoleum.

name: GTechniq Set 30ml
description: Two-layer ceramic coating system with 30ml Crystal Serum Light base coat and 30ml EXOv5 topcoat for comprehensive paint protection and hydrophobic gloss.

specs.overview: The Gtechniq Ceramic Coating Professional Set combines Crystal Serum Light as a base layer with EXOv5 as a topcoat for a complete paint protection system. Crystal Serum Light delivers premium ceramic coating with swirl and chemical resistance, while EXOv5 adds ultra-durable hydrophobic protection and enhanced gloss. This two-step system provides superior protection suitable for average sedans, with proper curing between applications.
specs.pro_tips: CSL requires Panel Wipe surface preparation to ensure optimal bonding. EXOv5 can be applied standalone or as topcoat over CSL. Rotate microfiber cloths during buffing to prevent premature curing. Maintain vehicle indoors for 12 hours post-application.
specs.use_case: DIY enthusiasts and professional detailers seeking comprehensive, long-lasting paint protection with enhanced gloss and water beading. Ideal for vehicle owners who want professional-grade results with an accessible two-layer ceramic coating system.
key_features: Silicon dioxide-based Crystal Serum Light formula
Includes protective gloves, applicators, and pipette
specs.coverage_yield: Sufficient for average sedan
specs.application_method: Clean and polish vehicle thoroughly. Apply Crystal Serum Light first as base layer with provided applicator in overlapping strokes. Allow short curing time. Apply EXOv5 topcoat in overlapping strokes. Buff residue with microfiber cloth. Allow 12 hours curing before exposure to water.

name: Sort & Store (coating) Bucket Bag / 1ct

They fit easily in a 5 gallon bucket (for easy filling), have a drawstring closure, and are labeled with various towel groupings (like paint, drying, glass, and wheels). The lightweight suede microfiber will protect your towels from debris and contamination, and will allow them to breath, helping to prevent the musty moldy smell associated with plastic bin storage.

specs.use_case: Ideal for mobile detailers or smaller shops who have limited space for storage. These car towel storage bags are great for mobile detailers, and shops who want to keep their clean towels separated and organized.
key_features: Labeled and color-coded for organized towel sorting
Fits perfectly in standard 5 gallon buckets
Protects towels from debris and contamination
specs.application_method: Simply place the bag in a bucket, wrap the opening edge around the bucket lip, fill the bag with folded towels, and pull it shut with the drawstring.

description: Ergonomically designed brush for dry and wet cleaning of textiles and gentle cleaning of smooth leather surfaces, including Alcantara.

Features a natural lacquered wooden handle with soft synthetic nylon bristles. Ideal for use in combination with Sonax upholstery, textile, and leather care products for complete interior detailing.
specs.pro_tips: Always brush textiles with the fiber direction to prevent roughening the surface. For sensitive surfaces, test on an inconspicuous area before full application. Pairs effectively with Sonax Foam Upholstery Cleaner, XTREME Upholstery+Alcantara Cleaner, and other Sonax textile care products.
specs.use_case: Professional and consumer detailers who need to safely clean and restore fabric upholstery, leather seats, carpets, and delicate Alcantara surfaces. Designed for both light maintenance and deep cleaning of automotive interiors.

Suitable for dry and wet cleaning
Rounded handle edges prevent surface damage

After use, wash brush with warm water and allow to dry.

name: Maxshine Bucket/ Green
description: Ultra Clear Detailing Bucket designed to add colorful fun to your detailing with transparent construction for visibility.

specs.overview: Made of durable, heavy duty materials and built to last, Ultra Clear Detailing Bucket gives you loads of functionality all while adding to your wash experience. Professionals recommend the two-bucket system to guard against wash-induced swirls. Fill one bucket with soapy water and fill the second bucket with clean water. Each time you need to reload your wash mitt, rinse it in the clean water first. Then reload the mitt in the soapy water. This extra step will keep the wash water clean and reduce the amount of dirt you transfer back to the paint.
specs.pro_tips: Implement the two-bucket system by filling one with soapy water and another with clean water. Rinse wash mitt in clean water first, then reload in soapy water. This keeps wash water clean and reduces dirt transfer to paint.
specs.use_case: Professional and DIY detailers who implement the two-bucket wash system to prevent swirls and scratches while maintaining clean wash water.
key_features: Part of recommended two-bucket wash system
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use as one bucket in a two-bucket wash system. Fill one with soapy water, the other with rinse water. Rinse wash mitt in clean water bucket between applications.

specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care

Its ergonomic design allows for controlled dispensing of polishes, compounds, glazes, and other automotive chemicals exactly where needed.

The bottle includes embossed fill lines with dilution ratio markings (1:1 to 10:1) for accurate product mixing. Compatible with standard 28/400 neck finish trigger sprayers.
specs.pro_tips: The embossed graduation marks eliminate guesswork when mixing solutions. Acid-resistant construction makes it ideal for use with wheel cleaners and other aggressive chemical solutions.
specs.use_case: Professional detailing shops, car wash facilities, and automotive technicians who need to mix and apply cleaning solutions, degreasers, wheel cleaners, and other detailing products with precise dilution control.

specs.use_case: For detailers and vehicle owners using pressure washers who want efficient pre-wash foaming to reduce swirl marks and scratching during the wash process.
specs.application_method: Add 2-3 oz of wash solution to the cannon, attach to pressure washer's 1/4" quick-release fitting, and spray onto vehicle surfaces.

name: Microfiber Applicator / 2 pk
description: Professional microfiber applicator pads for applying wax, sealant, and dressing products. Soft microfiber construction for scratch-free application.

specs.coverage_yield: Multiple uses with proper care and cleaning

specs.overview: The handheld dryer enhances car detailing, providing convenience and safeguarding the hours invested in car surface corrections, headlight restoration, and car washing activities by delivering filtered air. The 1.5 HP motor increases air temperature up to 25 degrees above ambient temperature for faster drying.
specs.pro_tips: Choose between rounded or rectangular focused nozzles to cater to various shapes for efficient drying and target specific areas.
specs.use_case: Perfect for removing water from hard-to-reach places like grilles, bumpers, vents, and wheels on any vehicle type. The machine is lightweight and efficient with filtered air ideal for delicate surfaces like paint, chrome, and plastics.
key_features: 1.5 HP motor with temperature increase capability
specs.coverage_yield: Continuous use with proper care
specs.application_method: Connect power cord to electrical outlet. Select appropriate nozzle tip (round focus or narrow high-speed) based on drying task. Point at wet surfaces and activate motor to blow away water from vehicle surfaces, crevices, and hard-to-reach areas.

name: Matt Dash / 100ml
description: Protective interior coating for dashboards and door panels that adds abrasion resistance, UV protection, and antimicrobial defense while maintaining a natural matte finish.

specs.overview: C6 Matte Dash is specifically designed to protect dashboard and door card materials including vinyl, plastics, rubberized finishes, and leather. The coating adds abrasion resistance and UV protection to treated surfaces. With added BioCote antimicrobial technology, treated surfaces kill 99.9% of bacteria. The product will not affect the gloss of your car's trim and leaves a natural feel.
specs.pro_tips: Do not use on suede, nubuck, or fibrous finishes. Use within 12 months of opening for best results. Apply in a cool, dry environment. Shelf life is 2 years from purchase. For best results apply two coats allowing 24 hours between applications. Foam applicator (AP3) must be purchased separately.
specs.use_case: For detailers and vehicle owners who want to protect and restore interior surfaces like dashboards, door panels, and trim from dust, dirt, UV damage, and bacterial growth while maintaining a natural matte appearance.

For optimal protection, apply two coats allowing 24 hours between applications and reapply every 6 months.

name: L1 Leather Guard AB

specs.overview: L1 Leather Guard AB is an advanced leather protection coating formulated with nanochemistry and BioCote® antimicrobial technology.
