The antibacterial properties eliminate 99.9% of bacteria on treated surfaces while the formula bonds to modern automotive leather to provide long-lasting protection for 3-12 months depending on wear intensity.
specs.pro_tips: Always test on an inconspicuous area first. Clean leather thoroughly with L2 Foaming Leather Cleaner or similar before applying L1. For high-use areas like driver's seat bolsters, apply a second light coat and buff. Reapply every 3 months for high-wear areas, every 6 months for low-wear areas, or every 3-6 months for convertibles. Regular maintenance cleaning with a microfiber cloth and distilled water extends protection.
specs.use_case: Ideal for protecting automotive leather seats, steering wheels, dashboards, and door panels—especially high-wear areas like seat bolsters and piping. Also effective on vegan leather and vinyl surfaces. Particularly valuable for light-colored leather upholstery prone to staining from denim transfer.
key_features: BioCote® antimicrobial technology kills 99.9% of bacteria
UV protection prevents cracking and fading
Anti-dye transfer reduces staining from fabrics like blue jeans
specs.coverage_yield: 3-12 months of protection per application (depending on wear intensity)
specs.application_method: Apply in circular motions using an AP3 Dual Layered Soft Foam Applicator, spreading a thin layer evenly. Remove excess immediately with an MF1 ZeroR Microfiber Buff Cloth. Allow 30 minutes drying time before use. For high-wear areas, reapply one hour after the first coat for best results.

name: IK Multi Tr Mini / 16oz
description: Compact trigger sprayer with 360° spray capability for cleaning, disinfection, and detailing work. Spray in any direction, including upside down.

Its innovative 360° siphon tube system allows spraying at any angle, even when inverted. The translucent tank features a color-coded content identification system and stable base. Ideal for isolated work on small surfaces across cleaning, disinfection, automotive detailing, pest control, and industrial applications.
specs.pro_tips: The translucent tank allows easy visibility of solution level, making dilution straightforward. Store between 5-30°C. Regularly apply grease to moving parts to extend seal life. Clean after each use to prevent chemical residue buildup.

key_features: Light, handheld trigger design with ergonomic comfort grip
Translucent tank with level indicator for easy monitoring
Adjustable nozzle for stream to mist application
Chemically resistant to disinfectants, alcohols, alkaline products, ketones, and dilute acids

specs.application_method: Fill tank with desired chemical. Adjust nozzle from fine stream to wide mist. Trigger spray as needed. After use, depressurize and rinse with water. For nozzle blockages, clean with water only—do not use metallic objects.

The high-quality ergonomic sprayer head withstands rigorous detailing tasks, while the adjustable nozzle allows you to control the spray pattern from a fine mist to a high-powered stream. With a 25-ounce capacity, it provides an easy solution for storing and dispensing your preferred detailing products.

key_features: Adjustable nozzle for fine mist to high-powered stream
Yellow bottle with black and grey trigger
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Fill bottle with detailing chemical or solution. Adjust nozzle to desired spray pattern (mist to stream). Trigger spray as needed during detailing applications.

specs.overview: This innovative tool, crafted with ultra-soft clay and a premium scratch-free towel fabric, effortlessly removes stubborn contaminants like tree sap, water spots, and overspray. Its advanced imported rubber polymer coating ensures superior cleaning power, leaving your car's paintwork flawlessly smooth and ready for the next step in your detailing process. Reusable and quicker than clay bars.
specs.pro_tips: After use, clean the towel per manufacturer instructions (rinse thoroughly, no softeners, air-dry) to maintain its performance and reuse potential.

Scratch-Free & Paint-Friendly Towel: The improved towel fabric ensures a safe and scratch-free cleaning experience, protecting your vehicle's delicate paintwork.
Unlike a clay bar, this towel can be rinsed and re-used time after time.

specs.application_method: Use the Magic Clay Bar Towel to gently glide across the paintwork in an overlapping pass, using light pressure to allow the embedded clay to work. Once the surface feels smooth to the touch, rinse and dry or proceed to polish/coating step.

name: Playmaker polish / Quart
description: All-in-one paint correction polish with micro-abrasives that removes swirl marks, light scratches, and mild oxidation while providing protection in one step.

specs.overview: Play Maker All-in-One Polish & Protectant (infused with Bead Maker) features micro-abrasive technology that removes swirl marks, light scratches, paint imperfections and mild oxidation producing a bright paint finish. The product is formulated to work by hand or with rotary, dual, or forced action machines, and is dust-free and easy to use for both professionals and enthusiasts.

Provides protective layer (infused with Bead Maker)
Works with hand or machine application
Works with rotary, dual, and forced action machines

name: P&S Clarity Creme 16oz
description: Professional glass polish that quickly removes water spots, mineral deposits, and wiper residue to restore crystal-clear OEM glass finish. Can be applied by hand or machine.

specs.overview: Clarity Creme Glass Polish is a specialized polishing compound designed to restore exterior glass surfaces. Over time, glass accumulates water spots, mineral deposits, calcium buildup, and wiper blade residue that regular glass cleaners cannot remove. Clarity Creme quickly and effectively removes these particulates to create a smooth OEM glass finish. The product can be used by hand with a microfiber towel for light applications or with a polisher and foam or wool pad for more intensive cleaning. specs.overview: No Rub Coating is an aerosol dressing designed for quick application on interior and exterior automotive trim. This self-leveling spray formula reaches tight spaces where applicator pads and brushes cannot, making it ideal for vents, cup holders, door jambs, and intricate moldings. The product instantly glosses and rehydrates faded plastic surfaces, turning them black without leaving a greasy finish. Simply spray, let settle, and perform a quick wipe for a professional appearance.
specs.pro_tips: Do NOT use on steering wheel, gas pedal, brake pedal, or clutch pedal as coating is slippery. Always test on small, hidden area first. For smoother surfaces, light buffing produces better shine results.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts who need to quickly dress and rehydrate plastic, rubber, and vinyl surfaces in hard-to-reach areas. Saves time on final detail inspections and touch-ups.
key_features: Aerosol spray application - no applicator pad needed
Reaches tight spaces and intricate trim
specs.application_method: Hold can 8-10 inches from surface. Apply thin coating to clean, dry surface. For very smooth surfaces, light buffing may produce more desirable shine. Let settle 5-10 minutes, then wipe to knock down any high spots.

name: Soft HD Double Insulated 6000 PSI Hose
Pressure Hand Gun
description: Compact pressure washer gun designed for auto detailing with enhanced maneuverability in tight spaces and compatibility with foam cannons.

specs.overview: A short-barrel pressure washer gun that replaces long wands for improved control and access to hard-to-reach areas during car washing and detailing. Features swivel inlet design to prevent hose tangling and ergonomic trigger for reduced hand fatigue during extended use.
specs.pro_tips: Use with swivel design to eliminate hose twisting. Pair with foam cannon for touchless pre-wash. Choose appropriate PSI rating for your pressure washer - typically 3000-4000 PSI for automotive use.
specs.use_case: Perfect for professional detailers and car enthusiasts who need precise control when washing vehicles, especially for accessing wheel wells, undercarriages, and tight spaces around automotive surfaces.
key_features: Compatible with foam cannons and accessories
specs.application_method: Connect to pressure washer hose via M22 fitting or adapter, attach desired nozzle tip or foam cannon to 1/4 inch outlet, squeeze trigger to spray.

name: Profiline Perfect Finish / 1000ml
description: Especially developed for 1-stage polishing of sanded paint defects, this finishing polish uses extremely fine yet hard abrasives to remove scratches and produce optimal gloss without holograms or buffing marks.

specs.overview: Special extremely fine yet hard abrasives allow good removal of scratches, and produce an optimal gloss without holograms or buffing marks. Removes marks of up to P2000 grit. Silicone free. Can also be processed with an orbital machine, if only a finish is required.
specs.pro_tips: If necessary, sand the paintwork beforehand with a P2000 grit (or finer) or pre-polish with Cut Max or Ultimate Cut. Always check the polishing result in between by wiping with PROFILINE Prepare on a Microfibre Cloth soft touch and then illuminating with a hologram lamp.
specs.use_case: Designed for 1-stage polishing of sanded paint defects in paint shops. Professional detailers and enthusiasts use it to achieve a high-gloss, hologram-free finish after paint correction work.
key_features: Extremely fine yet hard abrasives for scratch removal
Removes marks of up to P2000 grit
Produces optimal gloss without holograms or buffing marks
Compatible with orbital machines for finish-only work
specs.application_method: Use a variable-speed rotary polisher with Foam Pad medium or Foam pad soft. Exerting medium to slight pressure, always polish with plane pad. Never polish completely dry. Carry out several individual polishing steps with the addition of small amounts of polish instead of one long polishing cycle. Wipe off polish residue with a Microfibre Cloth soft touch applying light pressure.

name: Mirror-Glass Cleaner / 19oz
description: Aerosol foaming glass cleaner that removes smudges, film, and bugs with a streak-free finish and no residue.

specs.overview: Super Vision Glass Cleaner is a professional-strength aerosol foaming glass cleaner designed for automotive and industrial use. It easily removes smudges, film, scum, smears, bugs, and soil. The penetrating foam action lifts stubborn window film and leaves a clean, bright, streak-free finish without hazing, smearing, or residue.
specs.pro_tips: Use with lint-free cloth or squeegee for best results. The penetrating foam helps lift stubborn window film effectively.
specs.use_case: For professional detailers and commercial/industrial applications requiring fast, effective glass cleaning with professional results and no streaking.
key_features: No residue or film left behind
specs.application_method: Spray directly onto glass surface and wipe clean with a lint-free cloth or squeegee.

name: Nano Clay Pad / 6"
description: MaxShine Nano Clay Pad removes contaminants and impurities much faster than clay bars with long-lasting reusable performance.

specs.overview: The MaxShine Nano Clay Pad is a synthetic clay disc made with advanced rubber polymer technology that removes contaminants and impurities much faster than traditional clay bars. It safely and easily removes paint overspray, water spots, fresh tree sap, rail dust, bird droppings, light oxidation, brake dust, and other bonded surface contaminants. The pad is reusable and can be rinsed out and used again after each application.
specs.pro_tips: Pair with MaxShine Clay Lube for optimal results. Not to be used directly on dry paint—surface must be lubricated during use. Higher risk of marring when used with a machine if not performed properly. Set polishing machine to low speed during use.
specs.use_case: For professional detailers and enthusiasts who need to decontaminate vehicle surfaces before polishing and waxing. Ideal for paint, glass, and trim preparation.
key_features: Removes contaminants faster than clay bars
Works with DA polishers or hand application
Pairs with MaxShine Hand Polishing Pad Holder
specs.coverage_yield: Up to 150 uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use with MaxShine Clay Lube on the surface. Can be applied by hand with the optional pad holder or attached to a dual action or rotary polisher. Keep surface lubricated during use. Rinse with water after each use and reuse.

name: P&S Kyles Boat & RV Restorer
description: Kyle's Boat & RV Restorer mechanically removes damaged oxidized gelcoat and paint while enhancing, moisturizing and brightening in a single step restoration process.

specs.overview: Engineered for efficiency, Kyle's Boat & RV Restorer utilizes mechanical cleaning agents to aggressively address oxidation and surface irregularities on marine and RV finishes. This polish is formulated with medium-duty cleaners for effective correction, paired with advanced polymer sealants for long-term protection. By enhancing and moisturizing the finish simultaneously, it delivers a single-step restoration process that maximizes color depth and brightness while leaving a durable, sealed finish.
specs.pro_tips: For heavy oxidation removal we recommend a rotary tool paired with a wool pad. Step it down to a D/A with foam for milder restoration. Before restoration we recommend a solid washing and decontamination of the entire boat or RV.
specs.use_case: Perfect for one step correction processes on gelcoat, fiberglass and painted finishes. Designed for both professional detailers and boat/RV owners who need efficient oxidation removal and protection in one product.
key_features: Mechanical abrasive cleaning agents for oxidation removal
Perfect for machine or hand application
specs.application_method: Wash the entire boat or RV prior to beginning the polishing process. Shake well. Apply a small amount of Kyle's to the surface or pad and begin the correction process. Machine polishing is recommended and Kyle's works with dual action and rotary units. Pair with your favorite light to medium polishing pad and once finished, wipe away any excess with a clean microfiber towel.

name: SIO3 Max-Gloss Kit
description: Marine-grade ceramic coating kit designed to restore and protect boat hulls, RV surfaces, and fiberglass-gelcoat against UV damage and environmental elements.

specs.overview: Professional-grade ceramic coating system formulated specifically for marine and RV applications. Provides long-lasting protection against UV rays, water damage, and environmental contaminants while restoring surfaces to their original glossy finish. The coating creates a hydrophobic barrier that repels water and makes cleaning easier.
specs.use_case: Ideal for boat owners and RV enthusiasts looking to restore faded gelcoat surfaces and provide long-term protection against harsh marine and outdoor environments.
key_features: UV protection for fiberglass and gelcoat
specs.application_method: Clean surface thoroughly, apply coating with applicator in thin, even coats, allow to cure according to instructions

name: Skinny Foam Cannon / 1L
description: A 1-liter capacity foam cannon attachment designed for creating thick, clingy foam for pressure washer car detailing.

specs.use_case: Professional and DIY detailers who need a pressure washer foam cannon attachment for pre-wash foaming and surface cleaning.
specs.application_method: Attaches to pressure washer wand; fill with diluted foam soap solution and spray to create thick foam blanket on vehicle surfaces.

name: Premium Leather Chamois
description: Highly absorbent natural leather for streak-free drying of paintwork, glass, and mirrors. Refined through naturally oxidised oil for superior water absorption.

specs.overview: Premium Leather is a highly absorbent natural leather designed for stain and streak-free drying of wet surfaces including paintwork, glass, mirrors, furniture, and tiles. Refined through naturally oxidised oil, it maintains the shine on surfaces while providing excellent water absorption without scratching.
specs.pro_tips: Store slightly damp in an airtight container in the refrigerator to keep fresh and ready to use. Always wring out thoroughly after soaking in warm water before drying.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and car owners seeking a premium natural drying solution that won't scratch paint or clear coat. Ideal for final drying after washing or rinsing.
key_features: Will not scratch paint or clear coat
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Before use, put in warm water for approximately 1 minute and wring out. After use, rinse with clean water and spread out for drying.

name: Professional Detail brush Set / 3pk
description: Three-piece auto detailing brush set with soft yet durable boar hair and polypropylene bristles for cleaning hard-to-reach areas, wheels, and engine bays.

key_features: Three different sizes for versatile cleaning
Soft yet durable construction with fast bend recovery
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Bend the brush to fit tight areas and hard-to-reach spots. Use on car engines, wheels, emblems, dashboard vents, leather seats, and other intricate surfaces. Can be paired with cleaning compounds for best results.

name: Inspiration Classic
description: P&S Inspiration Classic Ceramic Coating provides a hard, long lasting extremely glossy layer of protection. This SiO2 based formula cures to form a solid molecular barrier that protects your paint for years.

Apply it to the paint, clear coat, glass, plastic, wheels, rubber trim and more for an incredible level of protection. The extremely hydrophobic layer of protection beads up water, helps resist dirt and grime, stands up to chemicals and corrosion and withstands harmful UV rays. When applied properly, INSPIRATION forms an impenetrable barrier resistant to heat up to 1800˚C, and 100% resistant to chemicals and oxidation.

key_features: Extremely hydrophobic layer that beads up water
Heat resistant up to 1800˚C and 100% chemical resistant

name: Quick Detailer / 500ml
description: Gtechniq Quick Detailer uses a unique ceramic-based formula to bond with your vehicle's paint, creating a layer that resists dirt, water spots, and environmental contaminants. It sets itself apart from other spray waxes and detailing products through its superior protection and high gloss finish.

It leaves behind a smooth, hydrophobic layer that repels water and contaminants. Quick Detailer works with all Gtechniq ceramic coatings, including Crystal Serum Light, enhancing the existing protection by providing an extra layer of gloss and hydrophobic properties without interfering with the coating's integrity.

key_features: Ceramic-based formula that resists dirt, water spots, and environmental contaminants
Superior protection and high gloss finish
Streak-free finish, even in direct sunlight
Leaves behind a smooth, hydrophobic layer that repels water and contaminants
Fully compatible with all Gtechniq coatings and can be layered to boost gloss, slickness and durability
specs.application_method: Shake well before use. Spray on the surface or directly onto a MF1 ZeroR Microfibre Buff Cloth, buff with a second, clean MF1. For best results, apply the spray to a cool surface and out of direct sunlight to prevent premature drying.

name: Silicone Free High Gloss Tire Dressing / gallon
description: 100% non hazardous water based product utilizing a blend of select polymers to mimic the performance of traditional solvent based silicone dressings.

specs.pro_tips: Prior to applying Dressed clean the tire surface with Undressed then dry tire for maximum dressing performance.
specs.use_case: The perfect option for clients looking for an alternative to silicone based tire dressings.
key_features: Silicone free formula, completely safe on rubber, plastic and more
Provides a nice, dark, natural looking shine to tires
Ready to use product creating a durable lasting finish
specs.dilution_ratio: Ready to use product and should not be diluted.
specs.application_method: Use an applicator pad or a spray bottle to apply to the surface of tires. Wipe away excess with a clean microfiber towel.

name: Sonax 314300 Car Wash Shampoo Concentrate
description: Highly effective, phosphate free formula that penetrates and loosens tough dirt without damaging or stripping the protective layer.

specs.overview: A highly effective, phosphate free formula that penetrates and loosens tough dirt without damaging or stripping the protective layer. The special anionic surfactants adhere to dirt particles and act as emulsifiers absorbing and dissolving oil droplets. Safe for all finishes and leaves a brilliant, clean shine to your paint surface. Sonax suggests a 2-bucket wash system for best results. Can also be used in a foam gun or power washer system.
specs.pro_tips: For the best results, rinse your wash mitt or sponge often to release any dirt. Wash from the top down and rinse frequently.
specs.use_case: Essential for any detailing job. It is safe for all finishes and leaves a brilliant, clean shine to your paint surface every time without removing waxes, sealants or other protective products.
key_features: pH neutral formula safe for all finishes and car surfaces
Will not harm existing waxes, sealants or ceramic coatings
Thick lathering foam action that rinses clean, leaving no water spotting or streaking
specs.coverage_yield: A 1 liter bottle produces 50+ gallons of car wash shampoo
specs.dilution_ratio: 2 caps of SONAX Gloss Shampoo into 10 l of warm water
specs.application_method: Pour two (2) capfuls of SONAX Car Wash Shampoo Concentrate into a 5-gallon bucket, then add warm water. Wash the vehicle using a soft sponge, starting from the top and moving downward. Rinse thoroughly with clean water. Immediately wipe the surface with a soft cloth or chamois.

name: Sonax Ceramic Ultra Slick Detailer / 750ml
description: SONAX XTREME Ceramic Ultra Slick Detailer makes paint extremely smooth and produces a mirror finish while removing dust and fingerprints without streaks, and renews existing ceramic sealants with a water-repellent effect.

specs.overview: This ceramic detailer makes paint extremely smooth, producing a mirror finish and removes slight superficial soiling such as dust and fingerprints without streaks. It renews existing ceramic sealants, generates a water-repellent effect, and is suitable for matt paintwork and all completely or partially wrapped vehicles and surfaces.
specs.pro_tips: High-quality ingredients may lead to separation of the formula. Do not use on heated surfaces and do not allow to dry.
specs.use_case: Professional and enthusiast detailers seeking quick, easy paint care between washes or to refresh existing ceramic coatings. Can be used between washes, as a standalone product to add instant slickness and gloss, or over existing ceramic coating to boost the finish.
key_features: Creates mirror finish with extreme smoothness
Renews and refreshes existing ceramic sealants
Suitable for matte and glossy paintwork
Compatible with wrapped vehicles and film-laminated surfaces
specs.application_method: Shake bottle before use, turn nozzle to spray position, spray onto a microfibre cloth, and then thinly and evenly distribute on adjacent partial areas, then wipe off residues with a dry microfibre cloth.

name: Scrub Ninja Wedge / 2pk
description: A 2-pack of ergonomic wedge-shaped scrubbers with firm nylon bristles for cleaning vehicle interiors. Safe for leather, vinyl, and plastic surfaces.

specs.overview: The Scrub Ninja Wedge Scrubber features brush-like nylon bristles that are aggressive enough to scrub deep into fabric pores and contours yet gentle enough for delicate interior surfaces. The unique wedge shape provides ergonomic leverage and control for scrubbing in tight spaces, seams, and hard-to-reach areas. More aggressive than a microfiber towel but gentler than a melamine sponge, it works like a brush but functions as a sponge for controlled cleaning.
specs.pro_tips: Spray cleaning chemical directly into the bristles to control chemical usage and prevent waste. Use with all-purpose cleaners (APCs), interior cleaners, or foaming agents.

Tapered ends for accessing tight spaces and seams
Works like a brush, functions like a sponge
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care

name: Inspiration Stout
description: P&S Inspiration Stout is a premium ceramic coating delivering a luxurious glossy finish with exceptional hydrophobic protection across all exterior surfaces.

specs.overview: Inspiration Stout is a professional-grade ceramic coating designed for paint, trim, and wheels. It combines a luxurious, glossy finish with remarkable depth and protection while featuring outstanding hydrophobic properties that repel water and contaminants. The user-friendly application process makes it accessible to both professionals and experienced DIYers, with a fast 2-hour cure time and quick 30-second to 2-minute flash time depending on conditions.
specs.pro_tips: This is a high-solids coating that flashes quickly. Work in small panels rather than full panels to manage the quick flash time. Use adequate lighting to see wipe-off, especially on dark or white paint. Multiple layers can be applied (wait 1 hour between coats) to increase durability. Not recommended for glass surfaces.
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional detailers and car enthusiasts seeking premium protection. This product is formulated for those who want an all-around ceramic coating with exceptional hydrophobic performance and a show-stopping gloss finish.
key_features: Luxurious glossy finish with remarkable depth
Outstanding hydrophobic properties for water and contaminant repulsion
Quick 2-hour cure time for fast turnaround
All-surface compatibility (paint, trim, wheels, PPF, wraps, chrome, stainless)
Long-term protection up to 5 years with proper maintenance
specs.coverage_yield: Up to 5 years protection with proper maintenance
specs.application_method: Shake bottle well. Apply a few drops onto an applicator pad. Work one panel at a time in a crosshatch pattern or with single solid passes. Allow 30 seconds to 2 minutes to flash depending on conditions, then level with a clean microfiber towel. Buff with a second towel to remove residue. Allow 24 hours for full curing. Avoid water and harsh chemicals during first 24 hours.

name: Synthetic Bi-Level wash Brush
description: Professional bi-level synthetic wash brush designed for safe, effective washing of vehicles and outdoor surfaces with soft flagged-tip bristles.

The flagged-tip bristles are super soft yet durable, making them safe for delicate surfaces like automotive paint, glass, and clear coats while effectively removing dirt and grime.

specs.use_case: Perfect for professional detailers and car enthusiasts who need a gentle yet effective brush for washing cars, trucks, RVs, boats, and other vehicles without scratching sensitive surfaces.
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care and maintenance
specs.application_method: Attach to extension pole or use with handle. Dip in soapy water and gently scrub surface using light pressure. Rinse brush frequently during use.

The high-density microfiber fibers trap contaminants deep within the mitt, keeping them away from paint while washing. Its plush design holds generous amounts of soapy water for efficient cleaning coverage. The mitt is machine washable for easy care and maintenance, and built to withstand rigorous detailing use.
specs.pro_tips: Rinse the mitt thoroughly in a bucket of water between panels to prevent dragging debris across the paint. Works effectively both for wet washing and dry dusting applications.
specs.use_case: Designed for professional and DIY detailers who want scratch-free, safe car washing. Ideal for washing bodywork, wheels, wheel wells, tires, and grills without damaging vehicle finishes.
key_features: High absorption capacity for soapy water
Traps dirt and contaminants in fibers
Soft padding protects hands during washing
specs.coverage_yield: Over 100 washes with proper care
specs.application_method: Wet the mitt with water, apply car wash soap, and use with circular or back-and-forth motions across vehicle surfaces. Rinse thoroughly between panels. Machine wash with cold water and air dry or tumble dry on low heat.

name: Wonder Wafer/ 250ct Nu Car
description: Wafer air fresheners containing 250 non-wrapped commercial units that freshen cars, homes, offices, boats, and RVs with long-lasting scents.

specs.overview: The original under-the-seat air fresheners, with one wafer under the seat providing months of long-lasting fragrance. They release perfume oils evenly over time instead of being overwhelming initially and weakening rapidly. Mess-free and easy to install with no spraying or cleanup, designed for attendant application by car wash or detailing professionals.
specs.pro_tips: For larger cabins or stronger effect, place a second wafer under the rear seat. Especially effective for customers who don't like strong or visible air fresheners.
specs.use_case: Designed for car wash and detailing professionals who need an easy, no-mess way to freshen vehicle interiors. Perfect for dealerships, detail shops, and any customer-facing business.
key_features: 100% air-activated, environmentally friendly, contain zero known carcinogens, and comply with IFRA standards
Sealed in airtight, resealable screw-lid canisters to maintain freshness
Compact, low-profile design keeps air freshener out-of-sight
specs.coverage_yield: One wafer provides months of steady, fresh fragrance
specs.application_method: Place 1 or 2 wafers under the front seat on top of the carpet so they are out of sight. Keep the lid closed when not in use.

name: Leather Foam
description: Two-in-one foam cleaner and conditioner for automotive leather that safely cleans and conditions all leather types, including heated and perforated seats.

specs.overview: SONAX Leather Foam is a premium leather cleaner and conditioner formulated to gently remove dirt, stains, and oil from leather seats and interior fittings. The foaming action prevents over-saturation and is safe for vehicles with heated or cooled seats and perforated leather surfaces. Modified beeswax conditions leather to restore suppleness while maintaining a natural, non-greasy appearance. The formula contains no silicone or harsh chemicals, making it suitable for all leather colors.
specs.pro_tips: Always test on a small, inconspicuous area before full application to check for color fastness and abrasion resistance. Do not use on hot surfaces. Not suitable for suede, aniline, nubuck, or velour. Protect from freezing. Pair with SONAX Dirt Eraser for stubborn stains like denim or ink marks.
specs.use_case: Designed for automotive professionals and enthusiasts who need to clean and protect leather car seats without damaging heated seats or perforated leather surfaces. Ideal for restoring worn leather to original suppleness.
key_features: Safe for heated and cooled leather seats
specs.application_method: Shake well before use. Spray directly onto a clean, dry microfiber towel to prevent overspray, or spray directly onto leather surface. Wipe over leather seats, agitating dirty areas gently. Allow to dry for several minutes, then buff with a clean towel. For heavily soiled leather, use with SONAX Textile & Leather Brush.

name: Universal Cleaner / 25oz
description: Powerful universal cleaner for all interior and exterior surfaces with maximum cleaning power featuring the best material compatibility.

specs.overview: Pre-cleaner for the intensive cleaning of heavily soiled surfaces before car wash. Removes insect residue, grease, oil, gasoline, and diesel grime quickly and effortlessly from glass, paintwork, and plastics. Ultra versatile for exterior and interior surfaces. Strong enough to clean tough areas such as wheel wells and engine compartments, but is also gentle enough to clean almost any interior surface without staining or adverse effects.
specs.pro_tips: Do not use in direct sunlight or on hot surfaces. Do not allow to dry. Not recommended for use on clear plastics (instrument panel cover, nav screen) or leather.
specs.use_case: For cleaning heavily soiled paint or exterior plastic surfaces prior to washing, removing insect residue, grease, oil, rubber marks, gasoline and diesel soot, as well as deep cleaning wheel wells, undercarriages, tires, and engine compartments.
key_features: Effective on organic soiling (grease, oil, insects, resin)
Safe on most interior and exterior surfaces
No dilution required for spray application
specs.application_method: Spray onto the soiled areas, spread around with a sponge or soft cloth evenly to eliminate drips, allow it to work for up to 3 minutes and then wash off with car wash and rinse with lots of clean water.

name: Alcantara upholstery cleaner
description: Foaming upholstery cleaner formulated to gently and thoroughly clean delicate Alcantara surfaces while eliminating odors and leaving a fresh fragrance.

specs.scent: Fresh scent, leaves a fresh fragrance
specs.overview: Thoroughly and gently cleans all textiles in the car's interior, such as seats, upholstery, panelling, roof lining, carpet, protective covers and sensitive Alcantara® surfaces. At the same time, the product's odour eradicator quickly and permanently neutralises unpleasant smells such as smoke, animal smells, spilled milk, etc.Leaves a fresh scent. Does not leave dirt marks. Leaves a fresh fragrance.
specs.pro_tips: To avoid differences in colour and brightness between treated and untreated areas, the cleaner should always be applied to the entire surface
specs.use_case: Ideal for car owners with Alcantara or delicate textile surfaces who need gentle yet effective cleaning while eliminating stubborn odors like smoke and pet smells.
key_features: Odor eradicator eliminates smoke and pet odors
Removes even stubborn stains such as chocolate, ice cream, cola, coffee, ketchup, jeans stains etc.

name: Extractor shampoo / gallon
description: A foam-free, 60:1 concentrate rug and upholstery cleaner for use with carpet extraction machines.

specs.overview: A foam free, 60 to 1 concentrate (2 ounces per gallon of water), rug and upholstery cleaner for use with carpet extraction machines. Extractor Shampoo is safe on all colors and pH balanced for use on all carpet materials. Simply mix Extractor Shampoo with water and add to solution tank of your extractor machine.
specs.pro_tips: Use Enviro Clean to pre-spot carpets in areas of heavily concentrated dirt or grease prior to shampooing. Prior to carpet shampooing dry brush and vacuum carpet/cloth to remove dirt and debris. Pre-treat stains with Enviro Clean diluted 8 to 1 and for heavy grease spots use Terminator.
specs.use_case: Ideal for automotive detailing, residential carpets, or office use. Professional carpet and upholstery cleaners rely on this concentrate for efficient extraction cleaning.
key_features: Safe on all carpet colors and materials
specs.coverage_yield: One gallon provides up to 64 gallons of cleaner, ideal for auto detailers, car washes, and carpet cleaning professionals
specs.dilution_ratio: 60:1 concentrate (2 ounces per gallon of water)
specs.application_method: Set up your carpet extractor and then add Extractor Shampoo to the solution tank. Add 2 ounces (60 to 1 dilution) for every gallon of water in the solution tank. Mix solution thoroughly and begin shampooing.

name: Hyper Gloss / 16oz
description: Our Hyper gloss product is made with teflon and animo functional polymers which resist UV rays, salt, air, snow, sleet, insects, road film, and environmental contaminants that can fade or discolor finishes prematurely. This product fills micro scratches and defects to form a long lasting barrier and a glass like finish. sealants provide extra durability for your paintwork.

name: Lumi-Gloss surface shine spray
description: Renegade Lumi-Gloss Multi-Surface Shine Spray delivers a high-gloss, reflective finish to a variety of surfaces. Its versatile formula enhances shine and provides a protective layer, making it ideal for use on paint, plastic, and metal.

specs.overview: Lumi-Gloss is a high-gloss, multi-surface protective and restorative coating. Lumi-Gloss can be used on rubber, vinyl, and plastic molding. It can also be used on trim for a high-shine finish, free of any greasy residue. The main goal of these products are to protect the vehicle's exterior from water spots, UV rays, and other contaminants while adding a high-gloss finish.
specs.pro_tips: It is recommended to do a test patch first and follow the directions found on the label. Optional: add an additional layer to increase shine and protectiveness.
specs.use_case: Preserve your vehicle's surfaces and add a stunning high-gloss finish. Lumi gloss specializes in protecting a vehicle's surfaces while also adding shine.
key_features: Protects against water spots and UV rays
Contains polymers, silicones, and carnauba wax
Safe on paint, glass, plastic, chrome, rubber, vinyl, and trim
specs.application_method: Clean your vehicle with a car shampoo and dry with microfiber towels. Thoroughly shake the bottle before spraying the product. You can either spray directly onto the surface, or you can choose to spray it onto a microfiber towel or applicator. With light pressure, use a microfiber towel to wipe the product in circular motions. Let this dry for a couple of minutes and then use a clean microfiber towel to buff the surface to achieve that high-gloss finish.

name: Touchless Sealant / 25oz
description: Touchless paint protection during vehicle wash that restores existing sealants. Provides up to 3 months protection with Hybrid Polymer Technology and excellent hydrophobic properties.

specs.overview: The easiest and quickest paint protection during vehicle wash that reinforces the water-repellent effect, the shine and the surface's smoothness. Sonax Spray + Seal is a touchless spray-on sealant that provides an instant hydrophobic layer simply by spraying on a wet vehicle and rinsing off. Also suitable for matt paintwork.
specs.pro_tips: Product can be applied to the shampooed vehicle directly during the wash. Do not use on hot surfaces. Do not allow to dry.
specs.use_case: Ideal for quick maintenance and restoring existing sealants, perfect for ceramic sealant maintenance. Professional and consumer detailers who need fast, touchless protection during routine vehicle washing.
key_features: Easiest and quickest paint protection during vehicle wash
Provides up to 3 months protection with Hybrid Polymer Technology
Reinforces water-repellent effect, shine and surface smoothness
specs.coverage_yield: Consumption per vehicle: approx. 50–100 ml
specs.application_method: Wash the vehicle. Shake canister before use. Pour product into a sprayer and sparingly spray the wet vehicle. Consumption per vehicle: approx. 50–100 ml. Thoroughly rinse with water immediately afterwards. Remove remaining water with a SONAX Microfibre Drying Cloth.

name: Total Heavy Duty Degreaser / 1 gallon
description: Total is a concentrated degreaser that safely removes dirt, grease, grime, and brake dust from tires, wheels, engine compartment, door jams, and gas cap compartment. it is fast and effective for white walls and safe for all kinds of tires. This degreaser does not leave any film residue. Its fast acting ingredients eliminate hard scrubbing.

name: Xpress Interior Cleaner / gallon
description: Professional-grade interior cleaner that safely cleans leather, vinyl, and plastic without leaving residue or causing damage.

specs.overview: P & S Xpress Interior Cleaner is a ready-to-use formula designed for quick, effective cleaning of all vehicle interior surfaces. Developed specifically for leather, vinyl, and plastic, it removes dirt, grease, oil, and traffic marks while leaving surfaces clean and residue-free. The product cleans without drying, discoloring, or damaging the treated surface, making it ideal for professional detailers and car enthusiasts seeking express interior maintenance.
specs.pro_tips: For tight or textured areas like vents and seams, use a soft detailing brush to agitate and lift grime. For tough stains, allow product to dwell 1-2 minutes before agitating. Follow with a leather conditioner for additional softness and UV protection. Always spot test on inconspicuous areas first.

key_features: Safe for leather, vinyl, plastic, and rubber surfaces
Residue-free formula leaves natural matte finish
Removes dirt, grease, oil, and interior traffic marks
Can be used straight or diluted for flexibility
Professional-grade formula from Renny Doyle Double Black Collection

name: Ozone Odor Doc
description: Odor Elimination Kit using a quick release vapor process with chlorine dioxide gas technology to eliminate stubborn odors including bacteria, mold, mildew, and smoke.

specs.overview: ODOR DOC is a quick release vapor process that eliminates stubborn odors including odor causing bacteria, mold, mildew, smoke, etc. It quickly treats enclosed areas with the most powerful chlorine dioxide gas penetrating technology available. Released as a vapor, the broad-spectrum biocide product is safe, powerful and effective. ODOR DOC is 8 times stronger than traditional chlorine dioxide treatments and destroys the toughest of odors.
specs.pro_tips: Park the car outside in the shade. Keep car temperature controlled at 60-80 degrees F with windows rolled up. Place the container flat on the floor under the recirculation vent. Vehicle will smell like chlorine after treatment - windows down and leaving in sun will help dissipate this temporary smell.
specs.use_case: For eliminating stubborn odors in vehicle interiors caused by bacteria, mold, mildew, smoke, and other odor sources. Professional detailers and vehicle owners seeking permanent odor elimination rather than temporary masking.
key_features: 8 times stronger than traditional chlorine dioxide treatments
Released as a vapor - broad-spectrum biocide product
Everything needed included in the metal container
specs.coverage_yield: Designed for single use application - one kit per treatment
specs.application_method: Make sure the interior of the vehicle is clean and dry prior to treatment. Treatment takes one hour. Add water and set your car's air to max recirculation for best results. Follow included instructions.

name: Metal Polish Show Shine / 12oz
description: Renegade Red provides the ultimate show shine finish, formulated with precision polishing grains, cleaning agents, and sealants for aluminum and stainless steel surfaces.

specs.overview: Renegade Red provides the ultimate show shine finish. Formulated with precision polishing grains, cleaning agents, and sealants, it will leave your aluminum and stainless steel bright, clean, and protected. Routine application will extend your finish and maintain protection.

name: DA Polisher Backing Pad / 5inch
description: Universal 5-inch dual action backing plate compatible with foam, wool, microfiber, and sanding pads for DA polishers with 5/16" diameter thread.

key_features: Heat-resistive polyurethane material reduces vibration and heat transfer
Hook and loop fastener for secure pad attachment and easy replacement
Tapered edge prevents contact between plate and paint surface
6 reinforced steel struts maintain balance and apply even pressure
8 holes vented design for cooling and extended durability

specs.use_case: For detailers and vehicle owners who need a safe, multi-surface cleaner for leather and plastic components without risk of damage or discoloration.

name: Panel Wipe / 16oz

specs.use_case: Panel Wipe by Gtechniq is your go-to for car panel preparation, cleaning and prepping surfaces effortlessly for a professional-grade finish.
specs.size_volume: 16oz size not found — available in 250ml, 500ml, 5 Liter
key_features: Removes all polish residues for maximum coating adhesion
Specifically designed for modern day top coats and safe to use on softer paints (Japanese and GM)
Alcohol and solvent blend that flashes off
specs.application_method: Shake the bottle well. Dampen a clean and lint-free microfiber cloth or applicator pad with Panel Wipe. Gently wipe the damp cloth over the surface in a single direction, working in small sections. Wipe with light pressure to remove contaminants, residues, or oils. Buff the surface with a clean, dry microfiber towel in straight motions for an even, streak-free finish.

name: Complete Buffing Kit / 5inch
description: Five-piece paint correction kit featuring Uro-Wool, microfiber, and foam pads for complete paint correction from heavy cutting to fine finishing.

specs.overview: The Complete 5" Buffing Kit is an all-in-one system from Buff & Shine that includes one each of five innovative pads from their Reflection Artist pad line. This curated collection provides a complete paint correction solution, taking you from heavy-duty cutting and leveling to high-gloss final polishing. The kit combines specialized wool, microfiber, and foam technologies designed to work seamlessly together for professional-grade results on any paint condition.
specs.pro_tips: Each pad should be cleaned between uses with compressed air or a pad brush. Compatible with all polishes and compounds. Can be used with any orbital machine type—long-throw, gear-driven, dual-action, or random-orbit.

Compatible with long-throw orbital and gear-driven machines
Progression from heavy cutting to fine finishing capability
Professional-grade material blends for maximum control and performance

name: White Wall Tire Cleaner / 8oz
description: Renegade White Lines Whitewall Tire Cleaner restores dingy whitewalls with a formula containing mild abrasives and cleaners to remove scuffs, grease stains, and surface contaminants.

specs.overview: Renegade White Lines Whitewall Tire Cleaner will bring the life back to your dingy whitewalls with a formula containing mild abrasives and cleaners. It removes scuffs, grease stains, and other surface contaminants to help make sure that your whitewalls are as clean as the rest of your ride. Simply apply onto a clean Whitewall Scuff Strip, gently scrub and agitate the whitewall of the tire in a back and forth motion to break up surface contaminants, then wipe off the excess product with a clean microfiber towel.
specs.pro_tips: Use water to remove any leftover residue after wiping. Best used with Renegade Whitewall Scuff Strips for optimal agitation and abrasive action.
specs.use_case: Ideal for lowrider and classic car enthusiasts who want to restore and maintain the bright, clean appearance of whitewall tires without professional detailing services.
key_features: Mild abrasive formula for effective cleaning
Removes scuffs, grease stains, and surface contaminants
specs.application_method: Apply onto a clean Whitewall Scuff Strip. Gently scrub and agitate the whitewall of the tire in a back and forth motion to break up surface contaminants. Wipe off the excess product with a clean microfiber towel. Use water to remove any leftover residue.

name: Yellow drill brush kit
description: 3-piece drill-powered brush kit with yellow medium stiffness bristles designed for bathroom cleaning, soap scum, and mildew removal.

specs.overview: This is a three piece brush kit with a focus on bathroom cleaning. All brushes feature yellow medium stiffness nylon bristles color-coded for bathroom use, with a heat treated steel 1/4" quick change shaft compatible with most cordless drills and polypropylene plastic blocks for durability. The kit includes a 4-inch flat brush for large flat areas and grout lines, a bullet-shaped original brush for curved spaces and corners, and a 2-inch detail brush for small spots and tight areas.
specs.pro_tips: The 4-inch flat brush works up to twice as fast as hand scrubbing. Tilt the flat brush at a 45-degree angle for stubborn grout lines. Use the original bullet brush for curved spaces like sinks and toilet bases. The 2-inch detail brush is ideal for faucets and shower heads.
specs.use_case: Professional and residential bathroom cleaners who want to eliminate soap scum, mildew, and stubborn stains using cordless drill power. Effective for tile, grout, tubs, showers, and bathroom fixtures.
key_features: Yellow medium stiffness nylon bristles (color-coded for bathroom use)
3-piece kit with varying brush sizes and shapes
Non-scratch design for most bathroom surfaces
specs.coverage_yield: Durable construction for extended professional use
specs.application_method: Insert brush shaft into cordless drill or impact driver chuck. Attach to bathroom surface and activate drill at moderate speed. Tilt flat brushes at 45-degree angles for grout lines.

name: Sonax Wheel Rim Shield
description: Spray-on wheel rim coating that provides brilliant shine and protective coating against brake dust and dirt contamination for up to 6 weeks.

specs.overview: Sonax Wheel Rim Shield is a convenient aerosol spray coating designed to protect and enhance the appearance of wheel rims. The product creates a dirt-repellent finish that makes future wheel cleaning easier while providing a brilliant shine. It reliably protects against brake dust, road grime, and other stubborn dirt contamination.
specs.pro_tips: Reapply after every car wash and wheel cleaning to renew shine and protection. Test on inconspicuous area first before full application. Ensure wheels are completely clean and dry before application. Carefully remove any water from grooves and cavities (wheel bolt recesses) prior to spraying.
specs.use_case: For detailers and car enthusiasts who want quick, easy wheel protection with minimal effort. Ideal for customers seeking convenient spray-on rim protection that delivers both aesthetic enhancement and practical protection.
key_features: Aerosol spray application - no wiping required
Protects against brake dust and dirt contamination
Reduces cleaning effort on future washes
Self-cleaning properties due to dirt-repellent finish
specs.coverage_yield: 6-8 weeks of protection per application
specs.application_method: Shake can well. Apply generously to absolutely dry wheel rims by spraying. Do not wipe. Allow to dry for at least one hour without moving the vehicle or touching treated surfaces. Do not apply to warm surfaces or in direct sunlight. Best applied at 65°F.

name: C-1 Crystal Lacquer / 30ml
description: C1 Crystal Lacquer is the perfect entry point for anyone new to ceramic coating, or for enthusiasts who want durable protection without a complicated process. This ceramic coating bonds directly to your car's paint, becoming the functional exterior surface of your vehicle and delivering long-lasting protection for up to five years.

specs.overview: C1 Crystal Lacquer is a chemically bonding quartz (ceramic) paint coating. The coating forms a hard crystalline film that resists swirl marks and minor scratches from everyday hand wash routines. C1 guards your clear coat against bird droppings, tree sap, and UV rays while maintaining a glossy finish that won't fade in direct sunlight. Unlike other coatings, C1 will setup on any type of automotive paintwork due to its reaction with oxygen in the air, making it the ideal choice for specialty paint finishes like matte, satin, single stage paint, or very soft clearcoats.
specs.pro_tips: Reaction time of C1 is temperature and humidity dependent – for normal room temperature at around 50 percent humidity, recommend buffing between 30 and 60 seconds afterwards. Rotate microfiber towels frequently and replace the applicator every 20-30 minutes so the product doesn't crystallize in the fabric. Use C1 Crystal Lacquer within 1 year of purchasing, for best results, once opened use within 3 months.
specs.use_case: C1 Crystal Lacquer is the perfect entry point for anyone new to ceramic coating, or for enthusiasts who want durable protection without a complicated process. It protects without adding extra gloss, making it ideal for matte finishes, offering the same scratch resistance and protection against bird droppings, tree sap, and UV damage without changing paint's appearance.
key_features: Forms a crystalline film which is extremely hard, effective at preventing minor scratching from poor wash technique on relatively soft automotive paint
Panels coated with Gtechniq C1 exhibited 50 percent less swirl marks than those coated with waxes or left uncoated
Chemically bonding formulation that creates a permanent bond with your paint for high gloss retention
Resistant to temperatures up to 500 degrees Celsius
Offers up to 5 years of protection with proper maintenance; comes with a 5-year guarantee when applied by a Gtechniq Accredited Detailer
specs.coverage_yield: 30ml is sufficient for all vehicles up to and including a medium sized saloon such as a BMW 5 series
specs.application_method: Polish paintwork if required to remove imperfections. Use Gtechniq Panel Wipe and MF1 Microfibre Cloth to remove all residues. Soak the applicator pad with several drops of product. Spread onto a small panel or 1/2 a large panel and immediately remove residue with a MF1 cloth. Keep vehicle indoors for at least 12 hours after application.

name: Microfiber Drying / Size XL / 1pk
description: Dreadnought XL microfiber drying towel made with long pile twist microfiber weave and double layer design with interior sewn edges for durability.

specs.overview: The Dreadnought XL microfiber towel is made with a long pile twist microfiber weave with a double layer design featuring interior sewn edges and center stitching for structural integrity and durability. The 20"x40" size is perfect for the 1100 gsm weight and thick pile, lending itself to be easily used as open sheet or folded twice for 8 distinct sections. The twist pile design glides softly across paint, glass and plastic surfaces while absorbing completely streak free.
specs.use_case: Professional drying solution for paint, glass, and plastic surfaces on vehicles, ideal for detailers and enthusiasts seeking streak-free water absorption.
key_features: Double layer design with interior sewn edges and center stitching
specs.coverage_yield: Can be folded twice for 8 distinct sections per use
specs.application_method: Glide the twist pile design softly across paint, glass and plastic surfaces for streak-free absorption

name: HALO / 30ml
description: HALOv2 chemically bonds to your car's surface, forming an ultra-dense, protective layer that enhances the performance of paint protection film (PPF) and vinyl.

specs.overview: HALOv2 chemically bonds to your car's surface, forming an ultra-dense, protective layer that enhances the performance of paint protection film (PPF) and vinyl. It improves dirt and water repellency while reducing the risk of UV damage, ensuring your vehicle remains protected from daily wear and tear. HALOv2 defends against road debris, bird droppings, and UV rays, and its low surface energy allows dirt, water, and grime to slide off effortlessly.
specs.pro_tips: Your vehicle must be indoors and remain indoors for at least 12 hours after the coating has been applied. Use the bottle within 3 months of opening.
specs.use_case: HALO is specifically formulated for protective film and vinyl wraps. It enhances the appearance of matte, satin, or gloss finishes while shielding against dirt, rock chips, and UV damage.
key_features: Chemically bonds to PPF and vinyl surfaces
Compatible with gloss, satin, or matte finishes without compromising self-healing properties
Prevents minor scratches, swirl marks, and grime buildup
specs.coverage_yield: Lasts up to 2 years when applied correctly and maintained with Gtechniq shampoos and cleaning products
specs.application_method: Spray a 30% dilution of isopropyl alcohol (IPA) on a Gtechniq MF1 ZeroR Microfibre Buff Cloth to remove fingerprints and contaminants. Apply HALOv2 evenly on the application pad in overlapping strokes to an area roughly 2'x2', then remove residue with an MF1 cloth.

name: Foam Black Finishing Pad / 6inch
description: Thin black foam finishing pad designed for dual action and rotary polishers, allowing for better control and consistent results while compounding, polishing, and waxing.
