These specialized pads are thin, allowing for better control and more consistent results while compounding, polishing, and waxing larger panels on your vehicle. Flat pad surface assures even polishing coverage.
specs.pro_tips: Suggested RPM: 1200-1750.
specs.use_case: For final polishing work after more aggressive compounding and polishing steps. The soft foam texture provides little to no cut depending upon the product and paint.
key_features: 1.25 inches thick for easier use with dual action polishers
Velcro backing evenly trimmed along edges to reduce the risk of marring paint
Consistently cut with even, flat edges
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use on dual action and rotary polishers equipped with a 5 inch backing plate.

name: Ceramic Gwash / 500ml
description: Super concentrated all-in-one shampoo that delivers exceptional cleaning power while leaving behind an extremely durable, dirt-repellent, and hydrophobic layer.

specs.overview: Ceramic GWash is a super concentrated all-in-one shampoo that delivers exceptional cleaning power while leaving behind an extremely durable, dirt-repellent, and hydrophobic layer. This specialized coating is essential for long-lasting performance, as it repels water, dirt, and other harmful substances. The advanced low-suds, high-lubrication formula safely and effectively lifts and captures dirt particles from your paintwork, minimizing the risk of abrasion during the washing stage. Safe for matte and satin finishes, Ceramic GWash ensures your vehicle looks its best with minimal effort.
specs.pro_tips: For added hydrophobic protection, use no more than 10ml of product. Apply a small amount of product to a WM2 Microfibre Wash Mitt and apply to the vehicle one panel at a time. The hydrophobic properties can last up to 3 months, but regular washing will maintain the protective barrier.
specs.use_case: For those who struggle to remove dirt and debris from their car, boat, or bike, Ceramic GWash can reduce cleaning time and boost the life of paint.
key_features: Repels water, dirt, and other harmful substances
Advanced low-suds, high-lubrication formula minimizes swirl marks
Safe for matte and satin finishes
specs.dilution_ratio: 20ml per 5-gallon bucket for light soiling; 40ml per 5-gallon bucket for heavy soiling
specs.application_method: For light soiling, add two caps (20ml) of G-Wash to a 5-gallon bucket wash and for heavy soiling, use four caps (40ml). Fill the bucket with warm water to activate the foam. Wash the car starting at the top and work your way down using a microfibre wash mitt or cloth.

name: Sonax OS 02-06 Glaze
description: Mild all-in-one polish with fast-acting sealant that produces intensive, deep colours for a perfect showroom finish.

specs.overview: Mild all-in-one polish with fast-acting sealant for manual and machine application. 3-in-1 formula provides correction, polish, and protection in one pass with a gentle cut that removes haze, wash marring, and micro-scratches without holograms. Contains silicone and removes light scratches while producing a high gloss.
specs.pro_tips: Use small reloads to keep pads from saturating. Decontaminate first with clay to maximize correction and sealant anchoring. With proper prep and maintenance, protection can last up to 6 months.
specs.use_case: Streamlines detailing workflow by lightly cutting, polishing, and ceramic sealing in a single application, delivering a deep, high-gloss finish with professional results in less time.
key_features: Removes haze, wash marring, and micro-scratches without holograms
Ceramic-infused layer resists UV and contaminants with standout water repellency
Correction, polish, and protection in one pass
Produces intensive, deep colours for a perfect showroom finish
specs.application_method: Shake well. Apply a small amount to your polishing pad. For single-stage and clear-coated paints, OEM and refinished surfaces.

name: Sonax Profiline Ultimate Cut / 250ml
description: Highly effective abrasive polish for high process speeds containing ultra-pure, extremely hard aluminium oxide. Removes marks of up to P1000 even faster and can be used wherever high polishing speeds are required, for example on fresh paintwork or on very large surfaces such as motorhomes or boats.

specs.overview: Highly effective abrasive polish for high process speeds containing ultra-pure, extremely hard aluminium oxide that removes marks of up to P1000 even faster. Can be used wherever high polishing speeds are required, for example on fresh paintwork or on very large surfaces such as motorhomes or boats. Silicone free. Odorless water-based formulation with low dusting and no silicone.
specs.pro_tips: If necessary, sand the paintwork beforehand with a P1000 grit (or finer). Afterwards, polish to a high gloss with Perfect Finish. Regularly clean polishing pads. Never use different polishes on one pad.
specs.use_case: Professional and enthusiast detailers seeking aggressive paint correction on fresh or severely weathered paint, including large surfaces like motorhomes and boats. Ideal for removing deep scratches and sanding marks up to P1000 grit.
key_features: Ultra-pure, extremely hard aluminium oxide abrasive
High cutting power (6+ rating) with low gloss finish (3 rating)
Silicone free and low dusting formula
specs.application_method: Use either a rotary polishing machine with Lambswool Pad or an orbital polishing machine with Hybrid Wool Pad. Keep the pad flat and carry out several short polishing cycles, especially on fresh paintwork. Wipe off polish residue with a Microfibre Cloth soft touch.

name: Envy Jeweling Polish
description: A finish polish that gives paint a "jeweled" appearance once polished, creating amazing depth and lasting gloss for high-end paint correction projects.

specs.overview: Contains an extra fine abrasive package designed to give your paint a wet or jeweled appearance. The resulting deep gloss will give your paint restoration a show car quality finish without fillers which hide imperfections, meaning it will create a lasting gloss that is ideally suited for a coating application and high end paint correction projects. Does not contain any wax or silicones, making it safe for use in body shops.
specs.pro_tips: Designed for use with a polisher on a foam pad. If a more aggressive cut is needed, use a fine-cut pad instead. Pair this polish with a finishing pad for best results.
specs.use_case: For professionals and enthusiasts who want to remove light imperfections and refine paint to achieve deep clarity, taking paintwork to another level in terms of gloss, depth and overall clarity. Ideal for pre & post coating applications.
key_features: Extra fine abrasive package for wet jeweled appearance
Wax and silicone-free for body shop safety
Part of Renny Doyle DoubleBlack Collection
specs.application_method: Select desired tool and pad combination. Apply a small amount to paint surface or pad and begin paint correction process. Use light to medium pressure to produce a bright finish. Work a 2' x 2' area or smaller.

name: Tire Dressing Applicator
description: EVA foam tire dressing applicator sponge designed to hold and distribute tire gel products evenly without absorption or waste.

specs.overview: The proper way to apply tire gel dressing is by using an applicator that can hold and distribute the product evenly. Golden State's tire gel applicator is made of EVA foam with surface modification. It won't absorb or waste the tire gel products like microfiber applicators. Can be used to apply tire dressing, waxes, lotions, and more. Ideal for applying wax, lotion and gel on car body, wheels and leather upholstery.
specs.pro_tips: Use this EVA foam applicator instead of microfiber applicators to save tire gel dressing by holding and distributing product evenly without absorption or waste.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and car enthusiasts who need an efficient applicator for tire dressing that minimizes product waste while delivering even coverage on tires and other vehicle surfaces.
key_features: EVA foam construction with surface modification
Won't absorb or waste tire gel products
Blue EVA layer helps grip comfortably and control movement easily
Multi-purpose - can apply tire dressing, waxes, lotions and more
specs.coverage_yield: Reusable with proper care
specs.application_method: Apply tire gel dressing or other products using the foam applicator pad, using the EVA textured surface to hold and distribute product evenly across tire sidewalls and other surfaces.

name: Wonder Wafer/ 250ct Black Royale
description: Wonder Wafers are long-lasting air fresheners that release perfume oils evenly over time without overwhelming scents.

specs.scent: Black Royale - a masculine cologne scent
specs.overview: Wonder Wafers offer a long-lasting and pleasant fragrance solution with 250 wafers per canister. Each wafer can be used in cars, closets, bathrooms, drawers, in the garage and more. These non-wrapped wafers can be used in various settings, including cars, homes, RVs, boats, and practically anywhere you want to enjoy a delightful scent.
specs.pro_tips: Do not place wafer on dashboards, seats, consoles, wooden surfaces, floor mats, furniture or any visible carpet area
specs.use_case: Wonder Wafers are used by professional auto detailers and auto dealerships worldwide to provide customers with air fresheners that last. Ideal for anyone seeking long-lasting vehicle interior freshness.
key_features: Release perfume oils evenly over time instead of being overwhelming
Easy seal container to ensure longevity of wafers
specs.application_method: Place 1 or 2 wafers under the front seat and on top of the carpet of any automobile, boat, RV, etc. so that they are out of sight. Keep the lid closed when not in use.

name: Wool Light Double Sided
description: 8-inch double-sided wool blend pad designed for light compounding and polishing applications on paint and gel coat surfaces.

specs.overview: The Buff & Shine Wool Light Double Sided pad is a professional-grade single-ply wool blend buffing pad engineered for light compounding and polishing work. Made with plush, durable fibers and a strong, washable backing structure, this double-sided pad features an inner plastic plate for enhanced flexibility when maneuvering around automotive panels. The screw-on adapter system ensures secure mounting with no chance of the pad flying off during use.
specs.pro_tips: Requires 5/8 x 24 thread screw-on adapter for proper mounting. Pads center perfectly with no chance for wobble. Washable backing allows for easy cleaning and reuse.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts who need to remove light oxidation, swirls, and finish marks while preparing surfaces for final polishing or wax removal.
key_features: Double-sided design for extended pad life
Inner plastic plate for enhanced flexibility
specs.coverage_yield: Extended use due to double-sided design
specs.application_method: Mount to rotary polisher using double-sided pad adapter. Use with medium to light cutting polishes and compounds at recommended RPM range.

name: Amphibian XL Drying Towel/Blue
description: Extra large 20x40 microfiber drying towel combining twist pile and plush sides for streak-free drying of paint, glass, and plastic surfaces.

specs.overview: The Amphibian XL is a 1100 gsm microfiber drying towel featuring a hybrid design with half twist pile (Dreadnought-style) and half high-pile plush (Motherfluffer-style). Use the twist pile side for initial water removal and follow with the plush side to eliminate residual dampness and streaks on windows. The 20x40 size can be used as an open sheet or folded twice for eight distinct working sections.
specs.pro_tips: The large 20x40 format allows you to fold the towel twice to create 8 distinct working sections, extending the usable life per towel.
specs.use_case: Ideal for complete vehicle drying using rinseless wash methods. Perfect for detailers who want a single towel that handles both aggressive water removal and final streak-free finishing.
key_features: Hybrid twist/plush pile design for maximum versatility
1100 gsm weight with thick pile construction
Streak-free drying on paint, glass, and plastic
Large 20x40 inch format for efficient coverage
Dual-purpose: initial wipe and final finishing
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use the twist pile side for the initial wipe to remove bulk water. Follow up with the plush pile side to clean residual dampness and streaks from windows and other surfaces.

name: Gamma Bucket Lid
description: Airtight screw-on bucket lid that transforms standard buckets into spill-proof storage containers for detailing supplies and liquids.

specs.overview: The Gamma Bucket Lid features a two-piece design with an adapter ring and threaded lid that creates an airtight, watertight seal on standard buckets. Made from heavy-duty HDPE plastic with rubber gaskets, it prevents spills during transport and keeps stored materials fresh and contamination-free. Perfect for mobile detailers who need secure, portable storage solutions.
specs.pro_tips: Use with grit guards for complete wash bucket setup. Can double as a seat while detailing. Ensure proper bucket diameter compatibility before installation.
specs.use_case: Ideal for mobile detailers and professionals who need to transport wash solutions, store detailing chemicals securely, or convert buckets into airtight storage containers.
key_features: Two-piece screw-on design with rubber gaskets
specs.coverage_yield: Reusable for years with proper care
specs.application_method: Tap the adapter ring onto bucket rim with mallet, then screw on the threaded lid to seal.

name: 100 Ct Gloves/ Large
description: Premium nitrile disposable gloves designed for auto detailing and mechanical work, offering superior chemical resistance and puncture protection.

specs.overview: Professional-grade nitrile disposable gloves specifically designed for automotive detailing and mechanical applications. These latex-free, powder-free gloves provide excellent protection against chemicals, oils, and solvents commonly used in detailing work. The textured fingertips ensure secure grip even in wet conditions, while the ambidextrous design fits either hand comfortably.
specs.pro_tips: Choose nitrile over latex for better chemical resistance. Change gloves frequently when working with harsh chemicals. Store in cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
specs.use_case: Perfect for professional detailers and automotive technicians who need reliable hand protection while working with cleaning chemicals, polishes, waxes, and automotive fluids.
key_features: 3-6 times more puncture resistant than latex or vinyl
specs.coverage_yield: 100 disposable gloves per box
specs.application_method: Select appropriate glove, slip on hand ensuring proper fit, dispose after single use. Change gloves when contaminated or damaged.

name: Assorted Scent Fogger/ New Car
description: New Car scent refreshes your beloved car's interior with the unmistakable musk of a new ride. Provides 360º degree air ventilation defense to help freshen your car interior.

specs.overview: An excellent option when a vehicle requires serious odor elimination. The fogger will remove foul odors and add a pleasant scent to the automobile. The New Car fragrance is a smooth masculine scent that replicates the amazing smell of a fresh-off-the-lot vehicle. Using aerosol spray and the vehicle's own air circulation system, these odor eliminators hit every surface and rid the interior of stubborn smells from cigarette smoke, pets, mildew, and food. This means they don't just cover up odors - they attack and neutralize them!
specs.pro_tips: Don't use it all in one shot. Let it shoot for 15 seconds and shut it off.
specs.use_case: Car dealership air fresheners and odor bomb eliminators are an easy way to keep your car and truck inventory smelling fresh and appealing to potential clients. Unique odor control effective in eliminating all types of malodors including urine, feces, decay, rancidity, animals, fire, tobacco smoke and cooking.
specs.coverage_yield: Neutralizes and destroys odors in up to 6,000 cubic feet of space.
specs.application_method: Turn on air conditioner and set fan speed to maximum with the recirculating setting on and close all windows. Remove cap, point away from face and press down on the nozzle to release Fogger Spray. Place fogger in the center of the vehicle interior. Exit vehicle, close all doors and wait for 10 minutes while fogger fully depletes. Open doors, turn off air conditioner and engine, allowing vehicle to vent for 15 minutes.

name: Wonder Wafer / 250ct Fresh Lemon
description: Ultra-scented wafer air fresheners in Fresh Lemon scent for automobiles and professional use. One wafer provides months of long lasting fragrance.

specs.overview: Wonder Wafers are the "first of its kind" ultra scented Wafer Air Fresheners that received a U.S. Patent in 2000. Specially designed to be attendant applied with super easy, non messy application. Mess free and easy to install – no spraying, no cleanup. Fresh Lemon scent provides a crisp, clean fragrance ideal for vehicles and interior spaces.
specs.pro_tips: Typically several days of steady fragrance per wafer, depending on climate and airflow. Packed in easy-on/easy-off airtight screw lid canisters to assure product freshness.
specs.use_case: Designed for car wash or detailing professionals. Used in cars, boats, aircraft, RVs, hotels, homes, offices and more.
key_features: Sealed in airtight, resealable screw-lid canisters
Compact, low-profile keeps the air freshener out-of-sight
Provides months of long lasting fragrance per wafer
specs.coverage_yield: One wafer provides months of steady fresh fragrance
specs.application_method: Place one wafer under the seat for months of steady fresh fragrance with no spraying or cleanup. For larger cabins or stronger effect, place a second wafer under the rear seat.

name: Alloygator Wheel Protection/ Silver
description: Durable silver wheel protectors designed to prevent curb and pothole damage. Fits wheels 12-24 inches using patented locking technology between tire and rim.

specs.overview: AlloyGator Wheel Protection Silver is a premium wheel rim protection system engineered to prevent damage from curbs, potholes, and road hazards. Made from super tough blended nylon composite with UV stabilizers and impact modifiers, it integrates physically between the tire and alloy wheel using patented 360° locking technology. The silver color offers a discreet finish that blends seamlessly with most wheel finishes while providing robust protection that absorbs heavy impacts without breaking.
specs.pro_tips: Always use the included suitability gauge before installation to verify wheel compatibility. Clean regularly with mild car shampoo or universal wheel cleaners suitable for delicate finishes. Avoid harsh acid-based cleaners and thick brush-on tire shines. Not recommended for diamond cut or machine-polished wheels due to moisture corrosion risk. Not suitable for vehicles exceeding 5500 lbs. Each set includes 4 protectors, 6 joining clips, stainless steel securing clips, and adhesive. Warranty covers 12 months against color fading; extends to 2 years with professional 5-Star Fitting installation.
specs.use_case: For vehicle owners who want to protect their alloy wheels from costly curb rash and pothole damage while preserving resale value. Ideal for drivers in urban environments or those who frequently park in tight spaces.
specs.size_volume: Set of 4 protectors, fits wheels 12-24 inches diameter
key_features: Made from super tough blended nylon composite
Integrated between tire and rim - no removal needed for tire changes
TUV and MIRA certified for quality and safety
Color runs throughout - no visible damage after impacts
Stainless steel securing clips and super bond adhesive included
Engineered to withstand winter salt, acid rain, and summer heat
specs.coverage_yield: Durable with long lifespan when properly maintained; color runs throughout material so no fading after impact
specs.application_method: Jack up vehicle, fully deflate tire, insert stainless steel clips into AlloyGator, apply soapy water to rim and tire, firmly tap AlloyGator between rim and tire with mallet working around circumference, cut excess, mesh ends together with glue, tap into final position, inflate tire. Professional installation available through certified 5-Star Fitters. DIY installation takes approximately 2 hours for a set of four wheels.
surface_compatibility: Suitable for approximately 80% of OEM wheel and tire combinations

name: Wash & Wax/ 16oz
description: Highly concentrated, pH-balanced, 100% biodegradable car wash soap that cleans and protects in one easy application, leaving behind a wax layer for enhanced gloss.

specs.overview: P&S Wash & Wax allows you to clean and protect in one easy-to-use shampoo by washing your vehicle like traditional shampoo, resulting in a clean and protected surface. The highly concentrated, pH-balanced, 100% biodegradable formula is safe for all washing applications. After cleaning and rinsing, the vehicle is left with a durable layer of wax-like protection that increases gloss and provides protection for approximately 3 to 4 weeks.
specs.pro_tips: Always wash vehicle in shaded area when possible to ensure paint surface is cool prior to washing. Do not apply product in direct sunlight or onto a hot surface to eliminate the possibility of staining.
specs.use_case: Excellent for hand washing in auto dealerships, car rental operations, detail shops, and car wash facilities.
key_features: Easy on vehicle finish and hands
Reduced viscosity for use with dilution equipment
specs.application_method: Dilute Wash & Wax up to 128:1 with water (1 oz. per gallon of water). Rinse/wet down vehicle surfaces, wash down vehicle with desired wash mitt or sponge, rinse as needed depending upon dry time and temperature, repeat over entire vehicle, and dry.

name: Maxshine Car Wash Bucket Rolling Dolly
description: Mobile car wash caddy with 360-degree swivel wheels that holds a 5-gallon bucket, cleaning supplies, and detailing brushes for efficient, organized washing.

specs.overview: The Maxshine Rolling Bucket Dolly is an essential car wash accessory that combines mobility and organization. It features 360-degree swiveling wheels for effortless maneuvering around your vehicle while keeping all your supplies within reach. The dolly holds up to a 5-gallon bucket along with compartments for 2 car cleaners and 3 detailing brushes, keeping everything organized during your wash process.
specs.pro_tips: Use the locking casters on inclines or uneven surfaces to prevent rolling. Minimal assembly makes setup quick—simply snap wheels and casters into place. The 3 interlocking screws allow secure fit adjustment for smaller buckets.
specs.use_case: Perfect for professional detailers and car wash enthusiasts who need to transport buckets, cleaning solutions, and tools while maintaining organization and mobility. Ideal for both commercial and home detailing operations.
specs.size_volume: Diameter: 10.38 inches (fits buckets up to 6 gallons). Overall dimensions: 14.96"D x 16.54"W x 4.33"H
key_features: Holds up to 5-gallon bucket plus 2 car cleaners and 3 detailing brushes
5 wheels with 2 locking casters for stability on uneven surfaces
Polypropylene plastic construction resistant to pressure and moisture
Fits buckets up to 6 gallons with 10.38 inch diameter opening
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Place your bucket into the dolly opening and secure with the 3 interlocking screws. Insert cleaning bottles into the side compartments and attach detailing brushes to the holder slots. Roll smoothly around your vehicle using the wheels; engage the 2 locking casters when parked on uneven surfaces.

name: MaxShine Double Polisher Wall Holder
description: Wall-mounted double polisher holder with steel construction and anti-corrosion coating. Securely stores two polishers with protective rubber edges while keeping workspace clutter-free.

specs.overview: The MaxShine Double Polisher Wall Holder is designed to maximize detailing workspace efficiency by securely storing two machine polishers. Built with durable steel and a high-performance black powder coat anti-corrosion finish, this organizer protects your valuable tools from wear and tear. Rubber edge cradles provide protective cushioning to prevent scratches on your polishers. The holder features dedicated cord storage space to eliminate cable clutter and comes with all necessary mounting hardware for simple wall installation.
specs.pro_tips: The holder's universal design accommodates most polisher brands and models on the market. Use the dedicated cord storage area to keep power cords organized and out of the way for safe workspace management.
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional detailers and garage enthusiasts who need organized storage for multiple polishers. Perfect for both stationary garage setups and mobile detailing vans.
specs.size_volume: Dimensions not specified on vendor page
key_features: Universal design fits most polisher sizes
specs.coverage_yield: Durability rated for professional and heavy use with proper care
specs.application_method: Mount directly to wall using included screws and hardware. Carefully place polishers into rubber-lined cradles. Use dedicated space below for organized cord storage.

name: Milwaukee Compact Drill
description: Compact brushless cordless drill delivering professional power in a lightweight design for tight spaces and overhead work.

specs.overview: The M18™ Compact Brushless Drill/Driver is engineered for professionals who need power in a compact package. This cordless drill features a brushless motor that delivers 550 in-lbs of torque and 0-1,700 RPM, handling a wide range of drilling and fastening applications. At just 5.7" in length and 2.3 lbs (without battery), it provides excellent control in overhead and tight-space work. Premium construction includes an all-metal gear case and ½" metal chuck for durability on demanding jobsites.
specs.pro_tips: Pairs with REDLINK™ intelligence and REDLITHIUM™ M18™ batteries for efficient power delivery. The compact brushless motor is optimized for performance across the full M18™ system.
specs.use_case: Professional contractors and tradespeople who work in confined spaces, overhead positions, or tight areas where a compact drill is essential. Perfect for applications requiring both power and maneuverability.
key_features: Brushless motor with 550 in-lbs of torque
Compact 5.7" length for tight space access
All-metal gear case and 1/2" metal chuck
specs.coverage_yield: Compatible with M18™ REDLITHIUM™ batteries for extended runtime
specs.application_method: Load drill bit or fastener into 1/2" metal chuck. Adjust speed and torque using trigger control. Use in tight spaces or overhead work where compact size is advantageous.

name: Iron Buster / 1 Gallon
description: Color changing, fast acting, pH balanced cleaner formulated to safely dissolve ferrous particulate from wheel and painted surfaces.

specs.overview: Iron Buster is a color changing, fast acting, pH balanced cleaner formulated to safely dissolve ferrous particulate from wheel and painted surfaces. It will safely and effectively remove embedded iron particulate along with other contaminants from wheels and painted surfaces. Once applied product will quickly change to a purple color when iron particulate is plentiful and then can be rinsed to produce a clean surface.
specs.pro_tips: For maximum results, follow up with a clay bar or clay mitt after rinsing to remove any remaining bonded contaminants.
specs.use_case: For professionals and DIYers who need to remove embedded iron particulate and other contaminants from wheels and painted surfaces.
key_features: pH balanced, safe on clear coat paint
Removes brake dust and iron deposits
specs.dilution_ratio: Ready to use – no dilution required.
specs.application_method: For paint - Wash and dry surface prior to product application for maximum effectiveness. Pre washing for wheels is not required. Once surface has been prepared spray apply a generous amount of Iron Buster to the paint and/or wheels. Allow product to dwell for 2 - 5 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water using hose or pressure washer.

name: Microfiber Coating Leveling Towel / 10 pack
description: Numbered microfiber coating leveling towel with 8 marked sections for easy tracking during ceramic coating application. 10-pack of premium 390 GSM towels.

specs.overview: The Quadrant Wipe Microfiber Coating Leveling Towel is specifically designed for ceramic coating residue removal and leveling. Each 16" x 16" towel features printed quadrants numbered 1-8, allowing detailers to track which sections have been used. When folded twice, the towel creates eight 8" x 8" working sections. The firm, stiff construction resists collapsing during leveling, while the ultra-fine 70/30 microfiber yarn prevents micro-marring and scratches on paint surfaces.
specs.pro_tips: The numbered quadrants are printed directly into the microfiber and cannot be felt on the surface. Always use a clean section for each wipe to prevent reintroducing cured coating particles to the paint. When leveling coatings, proper section rotation is essential because the ceramic begins curing in the towel fibers immediately upon contact—improper towel rotation can result in firm fibers that scratch.
specs.use_case: Professional and DIY detailers applying ceramic coatings who need to track towel sections during the critical leveling stage. Solves the common problem of forgetting which towel sides have been used during multi-step coating applications.
key_features: No scratching on soft paint surfaces
specs.coverage_yield: Each towel yields 8 clean working sections per fold; reusable with proper care
specs.application_method: Fold towel twice to create eight 8" x 8" sections. Apply ceramic coating, wait for flash time, then wipe using one numbered section at a time. After each section becomes saturated, flip or refold to the next numbered section. Machine wash with mild detergent (avoid softeners and bleach) and tumble dry on low or air dry.

name: IK Hc Tr1 / 32OZ
description: Professional-grade spray bottle designed for vegetable and animal oils, hydrocarbon-based solvents, lubricants and petroleum products, ideal for automotive tasks like brake cleaning and tar removal.

specs.overview: The IK HC TRIGGER 1 is manufactured with materials of maximum resistance for use with vegetable and animal oils, hydrocarbon-based solvents, lubricants and petroleum products. It is ideal for the automotive industry for tasks such as cleaning brakes, removing tar stains and removing silicone from bodywork prior to painting. The translucent tank has clearly marked levels, allowing dilution inside the bottle with confidence, and the well-balanced base reduces the risk of tipping.
specs.pro_tips: Optimal for industrial applications of protection, degreasing and lubrication, as well as wood treatment. Clearly marked level indicators allow you to dilute inside the bottle with confidence.
specs.use_case: Professional automotive and industrial professionals who need isolated work on small surfaces. Designed for brake cleaning, tar removal, surface preparation, and solvent-based applications.
key_features: Materials of maximum resistance to hydrocarbon-based solvents and petroleum products
Translucent tank with clearly marked levels for precise dilution
Well-balanced wide base reduces tipping risk
Comes with colored ID card for chemical identification
Adjustable conical nozzle for versatile spraying patterns
specs.application_method: Adjustable trigger spray mechanism with nozzle adjustment from tight stream to wide mist. Fill bottle to desired level using side markings.

name: Graphene Wash
description: Graphene + Ceramic Wash engineered with a proprietary blend of sio2 emulsions, graphene dispersion & premium surfactants that provide cleaning ability, protection and shine to your vehicle's surface.

specs.overview: This 2-in-1 cleaning and protection product contains a proprietary blend of sio2 emulsions, graphene dispersion & premium surfactants that provide cleaning ability, protection and shine to your vehicle's surface. While results may vary depending on climate & mileage, this can last from 6 months to 1 year. Great for any surface on the outside of the vehicle and can be used in a foam cannon or bucket application.
specs.pro_tips: Start washing from the top of the vehicle working downward to avoid spreading contaminants. Leave front and rear bumpers for last to avoid spreading exhaust contaminants and insects.
specs.use_case: A 2-in-1 cleaning & protection product designed for both enthusiasts and professionals to make maintenance washes easy on any exterior vehicle surface.
key_features: Proprietary blend of sio2 emulsions, graphene dispersion & premium surfactants
Lasts 6 months to 1 year with proper use
Compatible with foam cannon or bucket application
specs.coverage_yield: 6 months to 1 year of protection per application
specs.application_method: Apply 2-3 oz. of wash into a foam cannon, hose foam gun, or bucket to pre-soak and loosen dirt. Soak microfiber wash mitt in solution and gently scrub vehicle, then rinse away.

name: Foam Pad  Cleaning Brush
description: Dual-functional tool that cleans foam pads and safely removes them from backing plates in one convenient device for professional detailing.

specs.overview: The MaxShine Foam Pad Cleaning Brush and Pad Removal Tool is a double-sided accessory featuring a semi-stiff nylon bristle brush on one end for cleaning polishing pads and a wedge removal tool on the other end for safely detaching pads from backing plates. The brush effectively removes dried polish, compounds, waxes, and sealants trapped in foam pads, while the wedge shape prevents accidental tears during pad removal. This dual-purpose design makes maintenance quick and extends the overall lifespan of both foam and wool buffing pads.
specs.pro_tips: Use this tool to clean pads during detailing sessions to maintain consistent pad performance. Regularly cleaning pads helps reduce heat buildup and extends pad life by up to 50% with proper maintenance.
specs.use_case: Professional and enthusiast auto detailers who need to maintain polishing pads between jobs. This tool solves the problem of residue buildup on pads and the risk of damage during removal from backing plates.
key_features: Dual-function design with cleaning brush and pad removal wedge
Semi-stiff nylon bristles safe for foam and wool pads
Ergonomic hand-held size for easy control
Wedge design prevents accidental pad damage during removal
Extends pad lifespan by reducing heat and compound saturation
specs.coverage_yield: Reusable tool with durable construction
specs.application_method: 1. Dip brush in suitable cleaning solution. 2. Gently scrub polishing pad with brush to remove excess polish and trapped compounds. 3. Rinse pad thoroughly. 4. Allow pad to dry before using or storing. Use wedge end to safely remove pads from backing plates by gently prying away from Velcro.
surface_compatibility: Dual action and rotary polisher backing plates

name: MaxShine Single Polisher Wall Holder
description: Wall-mounted single polisher holder with sturdy iron construction and rubber edge protection. Fits any size polisher with a sleek, space-saving design for garages and mobile detailing vans.

specs.overview: The MaxShine Single Polisher Wall Holder features durable iron construction with a V-shaped notched design that accommodates any polisher style—whether dual action or rotary. The holder includes rubber trim to prevent scratching both the polisher and the paint-lined holder surface. With a powder-coated black finish, it resists rust and corrosion while maintaining a sleek appearance. Mounts directly to the wall with included hardware for secure, permanent installation.
specs.pro_tips: V-shaped design allows multiple holders to be mounted on the same wall for organizing different polisher types. Ideal for both rotary and dual-action polishers. Rubber edges protect expensive equipment from damage.
specs.use_case: Designed for detailers, garages, and mobile detailing professionals who need organized, space-efficient polisher storage. Perfect for both personal shops and commercial detailing operations.
specs.coverage_yield: Holds 1 polisher
specs.application_method: Mount directly to wall using included screws. Secure the holder at desired height and position polisher in the V-shaped cradle.

name: Kneeling Pad
description: Essential companion for car detailers who spend long hours working on the low parts of the car.

specs.overview: The Car Detailing Kneeling Pad is an essential companion for demanding tasks, crafted from thick and high-density foam to protect the knees effectively. This multi-purpose pad works perfectly for Detailers, Mechanics, and Consumers, saving your body from excessive strain while working down low on your vehicle or around the house.
specs.use_case: For detailers, mechanics, and consumers working on low parts of vehicles or around the house who need knee protection and comfort during extended work periods.
key_features: Built-in carry handle with lightweight design
Large surface area for knee and back coverage
specs.coverage_yield: Durable multi-use accessory designed for long-term use
specs.application_method: Place the kneeling pad in your work area and kneel on it while performing detailing, mechanical, or other tasks on the lower parts of your vehicle.

name: Insect Remover/ 16oz
description: Bug Off Insect Remover breaks down heavy bug concentrations on the front grill and bumper prior to vehicle washing. Apply prior to washing and watch bug debris disappear.

specs.overview: P&S BUG OFF Insect Remover is a powerful, industrial-strength cleaner that will quickly remove even the heaviest deposits of insect debris. Given just one minute on an affected area, P&S BUG OFF Insect Remover will quickly break down all insect residues left behind on your paintwork and neutralize the acids that would otherwise eat away at your vehicle's clear coat. Even though P&S BUG OFF Insect Remover is a very powerful cleaner, it has been proven to be absolutely safe for any vehicle's paintwork.
specs.pro_tips: Avoid washing vehicles in direct sunlight when possible. Do not apply Bug Off to hot surfaces or allow to dry on surface. Bug removers are strong products and are known to be incompatible with some surfaces. Spot test on all surfaces in an inconspicuous area before use.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and vehicle owners who need to remove heavy insect splatter from vehicle exteriors. The product solves the problem of acidic bug residues that can damage clear coat if left untreated.
key_features: Breaks down insect residues and neutralizes acids within one minute
Can be used straight or diluted up to 5:1 with water
specs.dilution_ratio: Can be used straight or diluted up to 5:1 with water
specs.application_method: Spray onto cleaning surface and allow to stand for one minute or longer to allow bugs to soften and release from surface. Wash vehicle after application to remove insect particles.

name: Foam Maroon C/P  Pad / 6inch
description: Medium-cut maroon foam pad for paint correction and heavy polishing on dual action polishers. Removes light swirls and holograms with excellent finish.

specs.overview: The Buff & Shine Uro-Tec 6 inch Maroon Foam Pad is designed for medium cutting and heavy polishing applications. This pad removes light swirl marks, holograms, clay-induced marring, and other light paint imperfections while delivering a haze-free finish. Made from European high-density open-cell foam, the pad offers extended durability without softening during intensive use and maintains excellent surface contact for superior polishing efficiency.
specs.pro_tips: This pad performs exceptionally well on one-step compounds and polishes. Professional detailers often use it as a middle-ground pad—more aggressive than finishing pads but less aggressive than wool or blue cutting pads. Recommended for use with long-throw dual action polishers. Always follow with a softer finishing pad for maximum gloss on softer paint systems.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers use this maroon pad for one-step compounds and polishes on moderate paint imperfections. It bridges the gap between aggressive cutting pads and finishing pads, making it ideal for soft-to-medium paint systems requiring balanced correction.
key_features: Medium cutting power with excellent finishing ability
Excellent heat dissipation to prevent pad softening
Superior surface contact and pad balance
5 inch hook and loop backing (fits 5 inch backing plate)
specs.application_method: Mount the 5 inch hook and loop backing to a dual action polisher (15mm long-throw recommended). Apply your chosen compound or one-step polish and work the pad across paint surfaces using overlapping passes. Clean pad between applications.

name: Iron & General Fallout Remover / 500ml
description: Dissolves fallout and brake dust fast without damaging coatings. Effective on wheels and paintwork.

specs.scent: Has a noticeable odor due to its powerful formula
specs.overview: W6 features a thick gel-like formula that clings to vertical surfaces, efficiently degreasing them. The purple color change indicates that the iron remover is reacting with iron particles on the surface, dissolving them and making them easy to rinse away. It also acts as a rim, trim, and wheel cleaner with corrosion inhibitors and additives designed to combat the effects of acid rain and stubborn iron particles. W6 is safe to use on paintwork, wheels, trim, and other exterior surfaces and effectively removes contaminants without damaging coatings.
specs.pro_tips: After using an iron remover, it is recommended to follow up with a clay bar treatment. The clay bar will remove any remaining contaminants that the iron remover may have missed, ensuring a smooth and clean surface. This step is crucial for achieving a perfect finish and preparing the surface for further detailing or protective treatments.
specs.use_case: An iron remover is designed to remove iron particles and other contaminants from paint, wheels, and other surfaces that can come from brake dust, rail dust, and industrial fallout. You should use an iron remover before applying a clear coat.
key_features: Dissolves fallout and brake dust fast
Purple color change indicates iron particle reaction
Contains corrosion inhibitors to combat acid rain effects
Won't damage your coating or leave a residue on the surface
Thick gel-like formula clings to vertical surfaces
specs.dilution_ratio: Ready to use – do not dilute
specs.application_method: Use in a well-ventilated area, out of direct sunlight. Spray directly onto the surface and leave to dwell for 3-5 minutes. Where the surface is heavily soiled you can agitate W6 with an MF1 ZeroR Microfibre Buff Cloth or a suitable soft bristled brush. Rinse thoroughly with water.

name: Legend Premium Coating / 30ml
description: Premium ceramic coating with higher active ingredient concentration for deeper gloss and maximum durability. Creates hydrophobic protection resistant to chemicals and UV damage.

specs.overview: P&S Legend Premium Coating is a premium-tier ceramic coating designed for professionals seeking maximum performance. It features the same active ingredient as P&S Classic, Sole, and Vue, but with significantly higher concentration to provide a deeper, glossier finish. The coating cures to form a solid molecular barrier that resists chemicals, corrosion, UV exposure, and high temperatures while creating an ultra-hydrophobic surface. Legend delivers long-lasting protection with an adjusted delivery system for easy installation compared to other coatings in its class.
specs.pro_tips: Legend is designed for professional installers. Proper training and procedures must be followed for optimal results. The product includes door jamb label and QR code access to custom installation video specific to Legend.
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional detailers and discerning clients looking for the next level of ceramic coating performance. Legend provides maximum durability and aesthetic depth for all exterior surfaces including paint, trim, and wheels.
key_features: Higher active ingredient concentration for superior gloss and depth
Hydrophobic layer resistant to chemicals, UV, and corrosion
Adjusted delivery system for pleasant application experience
specs.application_method: Apply with the included two-color barrier coating applicator following manufacturer training procedures. Prior to application, perform complete paint correction and clean surface with Inspiration Prep. Professional installation recommended.

name: Envy jewel polish
description: Envy is designed as a finish polish giving the paint a 'jeweled' appearance once polished. The resulting deep gloss will give your paint restoration a show car quality finish without fillers.

specs.overview: Envy is designed as a finish polish giving the paint a 'jeweled' appearance once polished. Envy contains an extra fine abrasive package designed to give your paint a wet or jeweled appearance. The resulting deep gloss will give your paint restoration a show car quality finish without fillers which hide imperfections, meaning it will create a lasting gloss that is ideally suited for coating applications and high end paint correction projects.
specs.pro_tips: Pair with a finishing pad for best results. No wax or silicones make it safe for use in body shops and as a pre/post coating polish.
specs.use_case: This product is ideally suited for coating applications and high end paint correction projects. It is designed for professionals and enthusiasts seeking to refine paint and prepare surfaces for ceramic coatings.
key_features: Creates jeweled appearance with deep gloss
specs.application_method: Use with high action, forced rotation and traditional polishers. Apply a small amount to the paint surface or pad and work in 2' x 2' areas with light to medium pressure.

name: Dashboard Cleaner / 500ml
description: Silicone and solvent-free interior cleaner that cleans and maintains dashboards and plastic surfaces while preventing electrostatic buildup and dust attraction.

specs.overview: For the cleaning and care of all plastic surfaces in the vehicle's interior. Seals the matt and textured surfaces to retain the fine textures of the modern, finely grained cockpits. Reliably prevents electrostatic charges, has a dust repellent effect and protects against resoiling. Retain the cockpit's original matt appearance; distracting reflections on the front windscreen are avoided. Leaves a pleasantly fresh fragrance.
specs.pro_tips: Can be applied with SONAX Care Pad for Plastics Part # 04172000. The product works best when applied to interior plastic surfaces that benefit from matte finishes without shine.
specs.use_case: Especially suitable for plastics with "soft touch effect". Ideal for professional detailers and vehicle owners who want to maintain interior plastic surfaces with a matte finish without gloss or greasy residue.
key_features: Seals matt and textured surfaces to retain fine textures
Prevents electrostatic charges with dust repellent effect
specs.application_method: Shake before use. Turn nozzle to spray position. Spray onto a SONAX Care Pad for Plastics or lint-free cloth. Rub surfaces evenly and allow to dry.

name: MaxShine short wand high pressure washer gun
description: High-pressure short wand washer gun that effortlessly douses vehicles and large surfaces with thick foam.

specs.overview: Light and easy to use pressure washer gun with 5000PSI (345 bar) power and brass fitting that meets daily cleaning needs for cars, walls, and gardens. The handle is made of anti-skid and wear-resistant black rubber for durability. Shell and plate are crafted from durable materials for longevity.
specs.pro_tips: The short wand design makes it ideal for foam cannon attachments and provides better control for detailed cleaning work on vehicles.
specs.use_case: Professional and DIY users who need an efficient, easy-to-handle pressure washer gun for car detailing, foam cannon applications, and general surface cleaning on vehicles, walls, and gardens.
key_features: Multiple connector types: 1/4″ quick-release coupler, 3/8" quick-release connector, M22 14mm twist & plug connector
Durable plastic shell and plate construction
specs.application_method: Connect the appropriate inlet connector (3/8" male or M22 14mm) to your pressure washer hose. Select your nozzle and trigger to spray. Always use the safety lock after using to prevent accidental spraying.

name: Hand Polishing Pad Holder
description: Hand backing plate for manual polishing with hook and loop fastener and strap for secure control of 5" or 6" polishing foam pads.

specs.overview: The MaxShine Hand Polishing Pad Holder is an essential accessory designed to help with manual polishing. Featuring a 4.95-inch diameter with hook and loop fastener and strap, it provides secure attachment and grip for 5" or 6" polishing foam pads. This hand-held backing plate allows you to hand polish your vehicle with high performance pads when a machine polisher cannot be used.
specs.pro_tips: Dense, firm construction provides a durable and comfortable grip. Works with foam, microfiber, or wool buffing pads. Ideal for spot repairs, detail work, or when machine polishing is not practical.
specs.use_case: For detailers and enthusiasts who need to perform manual hand polishing tasks or as an alternative when machine polishers are not suitable for the application.
key_features: Built-in strap for secure grip and control
Compatible with 5" and 6" polishing foam pads
Enables manual polishing without a machine
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Insert your fingers through the strap on the pad holder and attach a 5" or 6" polishing foam pad using the hook and loop fastener. Hold securely and apply manual polishing pressure to the surface.

name: Finger Mitt Applicator / 6pk
description: Microfiber finger applicators (5" x 4") fit over 3-4 fingers for precise application of wax, sealants, and trim restoration products without product waste.

specs.overview: Apply trim restoration products, wax, & more, without wasting any product, with these microfiber Finger Applicators. These Finger Applicator microfiber wax applicator pads cover 3 or 4 of your fingers depending on your hand size. They are great for applying dressings, and trim restoration products like Solution Finish, and also serve well as wax or sealant applicators.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and DIY enthusiasts who need precise application of detailing products to trim, dressings, waxes, and sealants on vehicle surfaces.
key_features: Fits 3-4 fingers depending on hand size
specs.application_method: Slip the finger applicator mitt over your fingers and apply products directly to the desired surface such as trim, wax, or sealant.

name: Dirty Towel Separator 32 Gallon Tcan / 1ct
description: Laundry separator bag insert for 32-gallon trash cans with 4 internal sections to organize and separate dirty microfiber towels by use and chemicals.

specs.overview: This trash can insert organizer separates dirty detailing towels into 4 distinct sections, allowing detail shops to quarantine towels by use and chemical type. The bag features elastic edges and carry handles that securely fit any standard 32-gallon round trash can, making collection and transport to laundry convenient. Made from lightweight 200gsm suede microfiber, the insert is itself machine washable for easy cleaning and reuse.
specs.pro_tips: Implement a color-coding system with different section assignments to further reduce cross-contamination during the detail phase and laundering. This organizer works with a complete towel management system to control costs and extend towel lifespan.
specs.use_case: Professional detail shops and mobile detailers who need an organized system to separate and store dirty microfiber towels during daily operations while preventing cross-contamination of chemicals and debris.
key_features: 4-section internal dividers for organizing towels by task and chemical use
Elastic edge and carrying handles for secure fit in standard 32-gallon trash cans
Easily removable bag for transport to laundry
Prevents cross-contamination of chemicals and contaminants
specs.coverage_yield: Durable with proper care and washing
specs.application_method: Place the separator bag inside a standard 32-gallon round trash can. Wrap the elastic edge around the rim of the trash can to secure. Fill each section with dirty towels as needed. Remove using handles and transport to laundry.

name: IK Foam Pro2 / 50oz
description: Professional foam generator manufactured for generating dry and durable foam, ideal for vehicle washing, detailing, and professional cleaning work.

specs.overview: The IK FOAM Pro 2 handheld sprayer is a foam generator designed for cleaning tasks in various sectors and has been manufactured for the generation of dry and durable foam. It provides dense, permanent foam ideal for professional cleaning, sanitation and disinfection work, HVAC system cleaning, vehicle washing and detailing, bike cleaning as well as for the disinfection of food processing areas and industrial kitchens. The foam increases contact time between the chemical and the surface to be cleaned while preventing excessive soaking.
specs.pro_tips: Easy manual assembly and disassembly allows complete maintenance without the use of tools
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional cleaning, sanitation and disinfection work, vehicle washing and detailing, and bike cleaning.
key_features: Wide filling mouth, ergonomic design, safety valve set at 3 bar (depressurisable), base for greater stability
Three mixers (orange, grey and green) which allow to vary the type of foam by choosing between wet, intermediate or dry foam
Coloured caps to identify the contents of the tank, safety lock on the opening and closing system
Translucent tank facilitating easy liquid level checks
specs.dilution_ratio: Follow the dilution ratio recommended by the foaming agent you are using
specs.application_method: Follow the dilution ratio recommended by the foaming agent you are using. Pressurize the sprayer until the safety valve pops out. Make sure the felts are clean.

name: Defender SIO2 Protectant / 16OZ
description: SiO2-infused spray protectant that creates gloss and durable protection on paint, glass, metal, and trim. Ready-to-use coating topper or standalone sealant.

specs.overview: Defender SiO2 Protectant is an easy-to-apply SiO2-based protection spray designed for both professional and enthusiast detailers. It can be used as a topper/maintenance treatment for ceramic coatings or as a standalone protectant. The formula creates incredible gloss, slickness, and durable protection while repelling water and preventing dirt and road grime from adhering to surfaces. Apply to paint, glass, metal, and trim for all-in-one exterior protection.
specs.pro_tips: Apply after every wash for maximum protection. Best for gloss finishes. Test on inconspicuous area if using on matte or satin finishes. For best results, apply on cool surfaces out of direct sunlight. Can extend protection to 9-12 months depending on environmental conditions.
specs.use_case: For professionals and enthusiasts looking to enhance and protect vehicle exteriors. Ideal for maintaining ceramic coatings, protecting paint, or providing standalone protection with enhanced gloss and water beading.
key_features: Can be used as coating topper or standalone sealant
specs.application_method: Spray directly onto paint surface or apply to microfiber towel. Spread evenly across 3' x 3' area. Allow brief setting time, then flip towel and buff to bright finish. If using as coating topper, allow coating minimum 1 hour to set. Apply to cool surface out of direct sunlight.

name: Edgeless Microfiber Black Shop Rag / 10pk
description: Budget-friendly 2-pile microfiber cleaning rag with edgeless design, ideal for all-purpose car detailing and general cleaning tasks.

specs.overview: The Autofiber Cost What! Edgeless Microfiber Shop Rag is a versatile 2-pile microfiber cloth featuring one high-pile side for applying waxes and quick detailers, and one low-pile side for cutting through residues and polishing. The edgeless ultrasonic cut design prevents scratching on paint and other surfaces. Constructed from a durable 80% polyester and 20% polyamide blend at 340 GSM, these rags are suitable for interior surfaces, engine compartments, glass cleaning, and general-purpose detailing.
specs.pro_tips: The longer pile side is excellent for applying waxes and liquid sealants, while the shorter pile side grips residues better and cuts through traditional waxes and polishing compounds more effectively. Fold the cloth into quarters to create eight different wet or dry cleaning surfaces for maximum efficiency.
specs.use_case: Perfect for professional detailers and DIY enthusiasts looking for affordable, disposable microfiber rags for interior cleaning, wax removal, polishing, and general car maintenance without breaking the budget.
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use the high-pile side for applying waxes, sealants, and quick detailers. Use the short-pile side to cut through wax, polish, and oil residues. Can be used wet or dry. Fold in quarters for eight different cleaning surfaces.

name: Buff Master Microfiber Blue / 10pk
description: Pearl weave microfiber polishing towel with tight closed loop pattern and low pile that cuts through polish and wax residue.

specs.overview: Unlike traditional microfiber towels, the Buffmaster is woven in a tight closed loop pattern, often called a Pearl weave, with a low pile that cuts through polish and wax residue. Designed at 16"x16" to fold into 8 sections that fit perfectly in your hand, allowing you to flip and refold to access clean sections without rewetting your polished surface.
specs.pro_tips: Fold the towel twice into 1/4 sections; when one section is dirty, flip or refold to get a clean section to avoid rewetting your polished surface.
specs.use_case: Professional auto detailers and car enthusiasts seeking to buff and remove polish and compound residue without scratching paint or clear coat.
key_features: Pearl weave tight closed loop pattern
400 GSM microfiber with 75% Polyester / 25% Polyamide composition
specs.coverage_yield: 8 usable sections per towel when folded twice into quarters
specs.application_method: Fold towel in half twice to create 8 sections. Use one section to buff polish or compound residue from paint. When section becomes soiled, flip or refold to access a clean section. Wash after use.

name: Cone Shape White Brush
description: Soft white cone-shaped brush attachment for cordless drills, designed to scrub grime out of tight corners in homes and vehicles.

specs.overview: The Soft White cone-shaped corner brush features long, tapered bristles that come to a point, allowing it to penetrate tight 90-degree angled surfaces where traditional brushes cannot reach. The 2.5-inch diameter brush has bristles that are 2 inches long in the center and trimmed down to 1 inch around the outside, forming a distinctive sloped cone shape. On softer bristles, they can flare out from the center when used at higher speeds, providing a wider contact area for flat surfaces and corners.
specs.pro_tips: The bristles return to their original cone shape when the drill stops spinning. For softer bristled variants, the bristles can flare out at higher speeds to provide a wider contact area, making it useful for both tight corners and larger flat surfaces. Not recommended for chrome or high-end rims as dirt particles can cause scratching.
specs.use_case: Perfect for cleaning car rims, window sills, car seats, tight corners in bathrooms, backsplashes, crown molding, and other 90-degree angled surfaces in home and automotive applications.
key_features: Bristles flare at higher speeds for wider coverage
Steel shaft with rust-resistant nickel plating
Strong polypropylene plastic block for durability
1/4-inch quick-change shaft for any cordless drill or impact driver
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Insert the 1/4-inch quick-change shaft into any standard cordless drill or impact driver. The cone-shaped brush can be used at various speeds; higher speeds cause the soft bristles to flare outward for greater cleaning contact on flat surfaces and corners.

name: Ceramic shampoo / 16oz
description: A shampoo with sealing effect that provides long-lasting, water and dirt-repellent protection while cleaning, specifically formulated for vehicles with ceramic coatings and sealants.

specs.overview: The XTREME Ceramic ActiveShampoo is a car shampoo with sealing effect that thoroughly cleans while providing long-lasting, water and dirt-repellent preservation. It leaves behind an effective protective layer on the paint, making it the perfect care for vehicles already equipped with ceramic sealants. The shampoo works during the wash cycle to both clean and maintain ceramic coatings.
specs.pro_tips: Do not use on hot surfaces and do not allow to dry. Do not store above 40°C. For best results, work on cooler surfaces and treat one section at a time.
specs.use_case: Designed for vehicle owners with ceramic-coated or sealed vehicles who want to maintain and refresh their protection while washing. Ideal for regular maintenance washing that extends the life of existing ceramic coatings.
key_features: Safe for ceramic coatings and sealants
Maintains existing protection during wash cycle
specs.application_method: Shake bottle before use. Dilute 50 ml of product into 10 liters of hot water. Wash the vehicle from top to bottom with a soft sponge. Do not allow the shampoo to dry; if necessary only treat partial areas. Rinse with plenty of clean water and dry with a microfiber cloth.

name: Ceramic sealant / 16oz
description: Professional-grade ceramic sealant spray delivering water beading, slickness, and UV protection for up to 6 months with a single application.

specs.overview: Gtechniq C2 Ceramic Sealant is a spray-applied ceramic sealant that bonds at the molecular level with automotive paint. It creates a hydrophobic layer that repels contaminants while delivering superior clarity and durability. The sealant can be used alone or as a top-up over existing ceramic coatings, offering enhanced dirt repellency and extended UV protection.
specs.pro_tips: Can be used as a drying aid by spraying onto wet surfaces. Use microfiber towels and apply to clean, dry surfaces for optimal results.
specs.use_case: Ideal for automotive enthusiasts and professional detailers looking for long-lasting paint protection without the hassle of traditional wax. Suitable as a maintenance layer or standalone protection for daily drivers.
key_features: Can be used as drying aid
specs.application_method: Spray onto clean, dry painted surfaces, a panel at a time. Wipe with a microfiber towel (such as MF4 Diamond Sandwich Microfibre) to buff and dry.

name: Cherry Speed Wax / 16oz
description: Fast-drying liquid paste wax that enhances paint, adds depth, and provides protection. Formulated for easy application in professional detailing.

specs.overview: Cherry Speed Liquid Paste Wax is a fast-drying express wax perfect for enhancing paint, adding depth and providing protection. Formulated to be extremely easy to use for everyday professional detailing applications. This unique product mildly cleans paint surfaces while enhancing overall paint appearance. Compatible with multiple application methods and suitable for all paint surfaces on automobiles, trucks, motorcycles, airplanes and nautical craft.
specs.pro_tips: Apply on clean, dry surfaces for best results. Avoid applying in direct sunlight or on hot surfaces to prevent wax from drying too quickly. Store in a cool, dry place. For best adhesion and uniform finish, ensure surface is properly cleaned before application.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers seeking a quick, easy-to-apply wax for express detailing services. Ideal for adding gloss and protection to painted surfaces on vehicles and other craft.
key_features: Compatible with hand, orbital, dual action polisher, or variable speed polisher application
Mild cleaning action while protecting paint
specs.application_method: Apply a thin, even layer of Cherry Speed Wax to clean, dry paint surfaces, working in sections. Buff to a high gloss with a clean, soft microfiber towel after brief drying time. Compatible with hand application, orbital polishers, dual action polishers, or variable speed polishers.

name: DA Polisher Backing Pad / 6inch
description: 6-inch DA backing plate ideal for high-speed DA polishers with durability and efficient heat management.

specs.overview: The 6-inch DA backing plates are ideal for high-speed DA polishers, boasting durability and efficient heat management through a Smart design. Constructed with heat-resistive polyurethane material, they stand up to the power and colossal throw produced by MaxShine polishers. Shaped by injection molding with high elasticity and durability, featuring high-quality hook & loop which can be used for more than 10,000 times.
specs.pro_tips: Compatible with 12,000 OPM high-speed DA polishers. The polyurethane construction with soft edges provides protection against swirls and scratches on painted surfaces.
specs.use_case: Specially designed for surface polishing on cars, glass, ships, and floors with high-speed DA polishers for paint correction and finishing work.
key_features: High-quality hook & loop attachment rated for 10,000+ uses
Smart design for heat dissipation, less vibration, and balance
specs.coverage_yield: 10,000+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Attach to dual action polisher using the 5/16" threaded connection. Secure polishing pad to the hook and loop surface, then operate at speeds up to 12,000 OPM.

name: Citrus Foam Wash
description: Effective foam that cuts through dirt and grime, leaving your vehicle spotless and shining.

specs.overview: W4 Citrus Foam works great with a foam cannon, foam gun, or pump sprayer, producing thicker foam for maximum coverage and a touchless car wash experience. pH-neutral and specially formulated to clean without stripping or damaging ceramic coatings, matte finishes, or clear coats. Combines an effective citrus degreaser with a strong foaming agent, making it tough on road grime and bug spatter, but kind to waxes and coatings.
specs.pro_tips: For tougher grime in wheel wells or hard-to-reach areas, use a wash mitt or microfiber towel for added agitation. While effective on road grime and traffic film, follow up with a quick detailer or water spot remover for stubborn water spots.
specs.use_case: Citrus-infused pre-wash designed for use with a foam cannon to loosen and remove dirt, grime, and road contaminants before hand washing.
key_features: Works with foam cannon, foam gun, or pump sprayer
pH-neutral formula safe for ceramic coatings, matte finishes, and clear coats
Citrus degreaser with strong foaming action
Removes grime, bug splatter, and dirt while maintaining surface integrity
specs.dilution_ratio: 10:1 ratio recommended when using a foam cannon or foam gun; 1:400 dilution for light dirt with snow foam lance, 1:200 for heavier soiling; 1:20 dilution recommended with pump sprayer
specs.application_method: Apply using 10:1 dilution ratio (10 parts water to 1 part product), let dwell for three to five minutes, then rinse thoroughly with clean water using a garden hose or gentle pressure washer. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface.

name: Assorted Scents/ Air Freshener/ Jasmine/ 8oz
description: Concentrated jasmine air freshener that makes up to two gallons of powerful, long-lasting fragrance spray for vehicles and indoor spaces.

specs.overview: Auto Scents Jasmine Air Freshener Concentrate is a highly concentrated formula designed to remove stale or musty odors and improve air quality. The concentrate makes up to two gallons of powerful, long-lasting fragrance spray. Heavily scented pads deliver consistent fragrance throughout application.
specs.pro_tips: Professional use in car washes, detail shops, new car dealerships, used car dealers, and RV dealerships. Heavily scented concentrate for maximum coverage.
specs.use_case: Ideal for professional detailing shops, car washes, dealerships, and RV facilities that need effective odor removal and fresh scenting solutions for vehicles and indoor spaces.
key_features: Concentrated formula yields up to two gallons of spray
Suitable for vehicles, RVs, offices, and homes
specs.coverage_yield: Up to two gallons of finished fragrance spray
specs.dilution_ratio: Makes up to two gallons when diluted
specs.application_method: Apply using appropriate spray bottle or diffuser. Spray in vehicle interior, under seats, on floor mats, or in desired spaces.

name: 6” URO TEC Black Finishing Pad
description: The softest URO TEC pad designed for ultra-fine finishing and protection product application, ideal for delicate paint systems.

specs.overview: The Buff & Shine 6" URO TEC Black Finishing Pad is engineered for ultra-fine finishing work and applying protection products. Constructed from premium European open-cell foam with high-quality reticulated construction, this pad features exceptional durability and heat dissipation. The beveled design and center hole maximize heat control while maintaining consistent contact across the pad face, making it perfect for long-throw orbital polishers and equally effective on standard DA and rotary machines.
specs.pro_tips: Works exceptionally well on finicky paint systems like black Teslas or blue Porsches. Use at low speed when applying liquid waxes or sealants for thin, even coverage. Clean with soft nylon brush or compressed air between applications.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers use this pad for final finishing on delicate and finicky paint systems, jeweling, and safe application of liquid waxes, sealants, and glazes at low speed.
key_features: Softest in the URO TEC line
Center hole for enhanced heat dissipation
specs.coverage_yield: Multiple uses with proper care; durable open-cell construction allows extended working time
specs.application_method: Mount on 6" backing plate. Use at low speed for protection product application. Pair with ultra-fine polishes or jeweling waxes for finishing work.

name: Classic Detailing Brush / M
description: Soft, densely packed bristles expertly designed for both car interior and exterior detailing tasks while remaining gentle and safe for delicate surfaces.

specs.overview: The Maxshine White Classic Detailing Brush is expertly designed for both your car's interior and exterior, featuring soft, densely packed bristles that tackle the toughest, hardest-to-reach detailing tasks while remaining gentle and safe for delicate surfaces. The non-slip rubber handle provides a secure grip, ideal for use with water-based cleaning agents, shampoos, and degreasers, with slip-resistant design helping prevent accidental drops. Synthetic fibers dry quickly, resist mildew and bacterial growth, while premium PET bristles resist wear and tear and hold up to chemicals and oils.
specs.use_case: Designed for both car interior and exterior detailing, ideal for tackling hardest-to-reach detailing tasks while remaining gentle on delicate surfaces.
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care

name: Cali's Love Freshener / 12oz
description: California Love Air Freshener eliminates strong odors with sweet vanilla and spice scent, designed to neutralize food, pet, and cigarette odors in vehicles.

specs.scent: Vanilla with a dash of spice
specs.overview: California Love Air Freshener is formulated to keep your vehicle smelling great with sweet notes of vanilla and a dash of spice. This product not only neutralizes but actively eliminates strong fast food, cigarette, and pet odors that cling deep into vehicle fabrics and carpeting. The formula is designed for use in any vehicle to keep interiors fresh and rejuvenated.
specs.pro_tips: Repeat treatment after pets have been in vehicle. Smokers should repeat process weekly as it neutralizes new odors over time. Always vacuum and dispose of trash before application for best results.

name: Carpet Bomber / 16oz
description: Citrus-based carpet and upholstery cleaner with biodegradable solvents that dissolves grease and rinses away stains most cleaners leave behind.

Provides a safe, natural solution to vehicle heavy duty cleaning and degreasing. Can be used full strength on tough applications or easily diluted with water for lighter cleaning applications.
specs.pro_tips: Use as Step 2 in the P&S Double Black Interior System after Terminator Step 1.

key_features: Heavy-duty cleaning power with citrus derivatives and water-based solvents
Multi-surface versatility for carpets, upholstery, vinyl, engines, wheel wells and painted surfaces
No residue formula that rinses clean
Biodegradable and eco-friendly, made in the USA
specs.dilution_ratio: Use full strength or dilute with water as needed

name: Bead Maker Paint Protection / 16oz
description: Ready-to-use spray paint protectant using binding polymer monomer technology to create a water-beading, brilliant, long-lasting hydrophobic finish with UV protection.

specs.overview: Bead Maker Paint Protectant uses binding polymer monomer technology featuring a surface migrating molecule that attaches to paint surfaces and cross-links to build a durable hydrophobic protective layer. The unique formulation allows for quick spray application and can be applied to wet or dry vehicles. It includes UV filters and UV stabilizers for sun protection while creating a glossy, water-beading finish that repels dirt and contaminants.
specs.pro_tips: Works best on new finish or freshly detailed vehicles. Dry surface application enhances overall product performance. Can be used as a drying aid after maintenance washes. Repels water and dirt across vehicles, RVs, ATVs, boats, and planes. Cure time is approximately 2 hours in normal conditions, though 8-10 hours is recommended for maximum protection.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts seeking fast, easy paint protection between maintenance washes or after full detailing services. Ideal for preserving freshly detailed finishes and maintaining gloss on all vehicle types.
key_features: Can be applied to wet or dry surfaces
specs.coverage_yield: Multiple applications per bottle (exact number varies by application method and surface area)
specs.application_method: Wash and dry vehicle. Working in small sections, spray Bead Maker directly onto paint or microfiber towel. Spread evenly with towel, then buff with a clean dry towel. Allow 2 hours minimum cure time (8-10 hours for maximum protection).

name: 6" Microfiber Pad
description: 6-inch dual-fiber microfiber pad with 25% lower pile than traditional pads, combining two microfiber grades for cutting, polishing, and finishing in one step.

specs.overview: The Buff and Shine Uro-Fiber Microfiber Pad features a patent-pending dual-fiber construction with black and white microfiber blended into a single pad. With 25% lower pile than traditional microfiber pads, it enables cutting, polishing, and finishing in just one step. The pad is manufactured in the USA with precision foam backing and beveled edges for easy centering. It's designed for cutting light to moderate scratches and swirls while finishing to a high shine.
specs.pro_tips: Use a clean pad for each correction step. Many professionals prefer 'The Uro-Fiber Twins' approach—use the standard Uro-Fiber Pad for cutting and polishing, then switch to the Uro-Fiber Finisher Pad for final finishing work. Compatible with 5 or 6 inch backing plates.

Beveled edges for fast, easy pad centering

name: C-5 Wheel Armor / 30ml
description: C5 Wheel Armour is the ultimate choice for wheel care, providing exceptional protection and repelling brake dust, dirt, and road contaminants.

specs.overview: C5 features advanced chemical bonding technology that creates a durable layer adhering seamlessly to wheel surfaces, with a formula that resists stains and harsh environmental elements. The coating withstands temperatures up to 600°C (1112°F). C5 Wheel Armour provides up to two years of protection against brake dust, road grime, and high temperatures. It's perfect for enhancing and protecting wheels, brake calipers, and exhaust tips with a durable, long-lasting high gloss finish.
specs.pro_tips: Allow coating to cure at least 12 hours before exposing wheels to the elements. Wheels coated with C5 only require car shampoo or non-acidic degreaser for regular cleaning.
specs.use_case: C5 is designed for anyone seeking exceptional wheel protection that repels brake dust, dirt, and road contaminants while keeping wheels effortlessly clean and pristine.

Up to two years of protection
Delivers high gloss shine or satin finish depending on application preference

This spray can be applied anywhere in your vehicle or near the recirculation vents to neutralize and eliminate unwanted odors while leaving behind a sweet cherry fragrance.

specs.use_case: The perfect drying towel for rinseless wash methods. Ideal for professional detailers and DIY users who need quick, streak-free water removal without additional finishing towels.

Can be used as open sheet or folded twice for 8 distinct sections

name: Black Paint Polish
description: Paint correction and protection solution specifically formulated for black and dark-colored automotive paint finishes with graphene, ceramic, and polymer technology.

specs.overview: Graphene and Ceramic Black Paint Polish combines advanced micro-abrasives with graphene, ceramic, and polymer technology to correct fine imperfections while enhancing gloss, depth, and long-term protection on darker paints. Graphene is a single layer of carbon atoms known for its exceptional strength, durability, thermal stability, and hydrophobic properties. The hydrophobic properties minimize the occurrence of water spots, while the balanced micro-abrasive system safely refines the clearcoat while laying down a protective graphene and ceramic layer that enhances gloss, slickness, and surface uniformity.
specs.pro_tips: Always test in an inconspicuous area prior to full application. Ensure the vehicle is completely dry before application. Work in small sections for even correction and coverage. Use with foam or microfiber polishing pad on a dual-action or rotary polisher for best results.

Graphene-infused for enhanced strength and durability
Ceramic SiO₂ protection against UV damage and environmental contaminants
Hydrophobic properties for water spot resistance
Reduces light scratches and swirl marks
Enhances gloss, clarity, and surface slickness
Color-specific formula optimized for black and dark paint finishes
