Interior sewn edges and center stitching
Streak-free absorption on paint, glass and plastic surfaces
specs.coverage_yield: Can dry two fairly large vehicles (Land Rover LR3 and Lexus LS400) before needing to be wrung out
specs.application_method: Use as an open sheet or fold twice for 8 distinct sections. Gently pull across the surface using the pull-dry method.

name: Wheel Acid / 16oz
description: Heavy-duty acid wheel cleaner that removes brake dust, grease, grime, and corrosion from wheels, spokes, and hub caps.

specs.overview: DS Acid Wheel Cleaner is a concentrated formula engineered for quick and efficient cleaning of wheels and associated components. It removes grease, grime, dirt, and brake dust from all wheel types, including removal of oxidation stains and corrosion on aluminum, alloy, and chrome wheels.
specs.use_case: Professional and DIY detailers who need powerful cleaning for heavily soiled wheels, brake dust buildup, and oxidation on various wheel materials.
key_features: Removes brake dust and road grime
specs.application_method: Dilute product with water per instructions, spray onto wheels, agitate with brush, and rinse thoroughly with water.

name: Engine cleaner
description: Water-soluble, fast releasing surfactant-based cleaner for quickly and reliably removing oily and greasy soiling from machine parts, power units, engines, transmission systems, petrol pumps and tools.

specs.overview: Water-soluble, fast releasing surfactant-based cleaner for quickly and reliably removing oily and greasy soiling from machine parts, power units, engines, transmission systems, petrol pumps and tools. The product features an excellent creep behaviour to also reach areas hard to access. Spray on the product generously, leave to work for 3 to 5 minutes and rub in with a brush if necessary. Wash down with a strong water jet afterwards.
specs.pro_tips: Do not use on hot surfaces. Do not allow to dry. Only clean your engine where oil and petrol separators are available.
specs.use_case: Professional and DIY mechanics cleaning heavily soiled engine compartments, machine parts, and tools where penetrating power and safety on multiple surfaces is required.
key_features: Excellent creep behaviour to reach hard to access areas
Safe on metal, plastic, and rubber surfaces
specs.dilution_ratio: 1:1 to 1:10 with water depending on extent of soiling
specs.application_method: Dilute with water at a ratio between 1:1 and 1:10. Spray on the product generously, leave to work for 3 to 5 minutes and rub in with a brush if necessary. Wash down with a strong water jet afterwards.

name: Nano Clay Pad / 5"
description: Professional-grade nano clay pad that removes contaminants and impurities much faster than traditional clay bars with reusable, durable performance.

specs.overview: The MaxShine Nano Clay Pad 5" features brilliant nano clay material that removes stubborn bonded contaminants including paint overspray, water spots, tree sap, rail dust, bird droppings, light oxidation, and brake dust. The pad is reusable and not water-soluble—simply rinse it out after use and apply it again later. Best results are achieved when used with MaxShine Clay Lube and applies to paint, glass, and chrome surfaces.
specs.pro_tips: Do not use directly on dry paint—always apply clay lube first. Use at low speed if attaching to a dual-action polisher. Pairs with MaxShine's Hand Polishing Pad Holder for manual application.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and car enthusiasts who need to decontaminate paint, glass, and chrome surfaces during pre-polishing preparation. Ideal for those seeking faster, more thorough results than traditional clay bars.
key_features: Removes contaminants faster than traditional clay bars
Reusable and durable with long-lasting performance
Effective on paint, glass, and chrome surfaces
Works best with MaxShine Clay Lube
specs.coverage_yield: Over 150 uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Apply clay lube to the surface. Use the pad with hand application or attach to a dual-action polisher. Work across the surface to remove contaminants. Rinse thoroughly after use and squeeze out excess water for storage.

name: Lucid Headlight Coating / 30ml
description: P&S Lucid Headlight Coating is the latest addition to the Inspiration Coating family, specifically formulated for use on polycarbonate headlight lenses.

specs.overview: The LUCID Kit includes a 30 ml bottle (enough product to do at least 10 sets of lights) and a coating applicator pad. LUCID lays down easily on the lenses. LUCID is a high solids coating perfectly paired to work on headlight lenses new or recently restored. Lucid is a high solid coating, perfect as the final step of a headlight restoration process and to help protect the headlight from yellowing again due to UV damage. This is due to the thicker formula filling in a more porous surface left on a headlight that has had the factory surface removed via the sanding and polishing process.
specs.pro_tips: Durability: New Headlights - 2-3 years depending on driving conditions; Restored Headlights - 1-2 years depending on driving conditions
specs.use_case: Polycarbonate headlight lenses are extremely durable but they do take a beating and can benefit from a properly installed layer(s) of LUCID Headlight Coating. Whether the lenses have been recently restored or are brand new LUCID is the foolproof solution to provide a layer of protection.
key_features: Fills porous surfaces on restored headlights
Prevents future damage, scratches, and imperfections with easier future cleaning as dirt and grime is less likely to stick
specs.coverage_yield: Enough product to do at least 10 sets of lights
specs.application_method: Can be applied to new or old surfaces, but for best results it is recommended to polish the surface to remove imperfections first. Apply with included coating applicator pad, applied thin.
surface_compatibility: Other hard coated plastic areas on the exterior of the vehicle

name: Edgeless Microfiber Yellow Shop Rag / 10pk
description: High-quality 340 gsm microfiber shop rag set with a 2-pile design (80% polyester and 20% polyamide) for all-purpose detailing.

specs.overview: This 10-pack of 340 gsm microfiber cleaning rags features a 2-pile construction with 80% polyester and 20% polyamide. The all-purpose 2-pile design has one side high and one side low, allowing different fiber lengths to handle various detailing tasks. The towels feature an edgeless ultrasonic cut design. These economical rags are ideal for professionals and enthusiasts who need reliable, multi-purpose cleaning towels.
specs.pro_tips: The longer fiber side works best for waxes and liquid sealants; the shorter fiber side cuts through traditional waxes and oily residues that can be difficult to remove with softer cloths.
specs.use_case: Designed for interior surfaces, engine compartment and interior doors. The longer and softer fiber side is perfect for waxes or liquid sealant, while the shorter fiber side offers better grip for cutting through traditional waxes or polishing residues.
key_features: Dual-pile design with high and low fiber sides
specs.coverage_yield: 100+ uses with proper care
specs.application_method: Use the longer, softer pile side for applying waxes and sealants; use the shorter pile side for removing residues and buffing surfaces.

name: Quick conditioning spray
description: High gloss unscented vinyl and plastic coating spray ideal for conditioning and shining trim, moldings, and air conditioning vents with a fan spray pattern.

specs.overview: Quick Shine is a high gloss unscented vinyl and plastic coating designed for final detailing work. Excellent for hard-to-reach areas, it delivers professional results on vinyl, rubber, body moldings, door seals, and air conditioning vents. The fan spray pattern ensures even, controlled application for a polished finish.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and enthusiasts looking for a quick, easy-to-apply vinyl and plastic dressing that provides high gloss shine without scent, ideal for final detail work on various vehicle surfaces.
key_features: High gloss unscented vinyl and plastic coating
Fan spray pattern for even application
Works on vinyl, rubber, body moldings, door seals, and air conditioning vents
specs.application_method: Shake well before use. Spray directly onto vinyl and plastic surfaces using the fan spray pattern. Allow product to coat surface evenly.

name: Teflon Sealer / 16oz
description: Teflon-based sealer that resists UV, salt and other environmental elements, creating a lasting protective finish.

specs.overview: Made with Teflon and amino functional polymers which resist UV rays, salt, air, snow, sleet, insects, road film & environmental contaminants that can fade or discolor finishes prematurely. This product fills micro scratches and defects to form a long lasting barrier and a glass like finish. The polymers employ a tight molecular bond that forms a protective layer on your vehicle's clear coat to keep contaminants from degrading and bonding with your vehicle's finish.
specs.pro_tips: Supreme Sealant is meant to be the last step in the detailing process--acting as a protective layer.
specs.use_case: This product is for vehicle owners seeking long-lasting paint protection and a glossy finish. It serves as the final step in the detailing process to protect against UV damage, salt spray, insects, and environmental contaminants.
key_features: Teflon and amino functional polymer formula
More durable than traditional carnauba wax
specs.application_method: Apply 3-4 pea-sized drops to a Premium Microfiber Applicator Pad, apply evenly, and cover a 12" x 12" area in a cross-hatch pattern. Let cure on the surface for about 10 minutes before buffing off with a clean Premium Microfiber Towel.

name: Brake Buster / 1 Gal
description: Brake Buster is a unique cleaning gel that adheres to the wheel surface and penetrates dirt deposits. It deposits a thin layer of special corrosion inhibitors to protect the wheel from future corrosion.

specs.overview: Safely removes accumulated brake dust, oil, dirt, stains and light corrosion from premium quality wheels without damaging the delicate surface. Brake Buster is a unique cleaning gel that adheres to the wheel surface and penetrates the dirt deposits to clean them away. Brake Buster deposits a thin layer of special corrosion inhibitors to protect the wheel from future corrosion. Non-acid formula is safe for all OEM finishes and rubber.
specs.pro_tips: Best used in an IK Foamer. Works great for light to moderate cleaning in the engine compartment.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and DIY enthusiasts who need to clean both wheels and tires efficiently in one step. Ideal for removing brake dust, oil, dirt, and light corrosion without damaging delicate wheel finishes.
key_features: High-foaming gel formula clings to wheels and tires for better dwell time and cleaning performance
Non-acid formula, safe for all OEM finishes and rubber
Cleans wheels and tires in one step
Deposits corrosion inhibitors to protect wheels from future corrosion
specs.dilution_ratio: 5:1 for regular maintenance and undiluted for heavy buildup
specs.application_method: Work in a cool, shaded area and ensure the wheels are cool to the touch. Dilute Brake Buster 5:1 (five parts water, one part cleaner) in a dedicated spray bottle or foam sprayer. Alternatively, can be used at full strength for super dirty wheels, and 1:10 for maintenance washes.

name: Inspiration Fabric Coating / 16oz
description: VOC-compliant acrylic fluoropolymer protectant that shields fabric and carpet from water and oil-based stains with a durable polymer barrier.

specs.overview: Inspiration Fabric Coating Protectant is a solvent-based, VOC-compliant acrylic fluoropolymer protectant formulated for professionals and enthusiasts. It provides superior protection against both water-based and oil-based stains, with particular effectiveness against oil stains. The advanced polymer coating encases each fiber to create a durable protective barrier. Product dries to touch in 2-3 hours and reaches complete cure in approximately 24 hours at ambient temperature.
specs.pro_tips: A light misting is preferred over heavy application. Ensure surfaces are completely clean and dry before application. Use a properly labeled secondary container spray bottle for dispensing per OSHA requirements.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and vehicle owners protecting fabric and carpet interiors from spills, stains, and contamination from oils, grease, coffee, soda, and juice.
key_features: Protects against water and oil-based stains
Fibers feel natural with no sticky residue
specs.application_method: Apply to clean and dry fabric and carpet surfaces in a uniform spray pattern using a light misting. Use secondary spray bottle for application.

name: Rehab correction crème
description: Multi-use paint correction compound offering a wide range of correction capabilities from strong cut to final finish, ideal for resolving paint imperfections, sanding marks, swirl marks, and scratches.

specs.overview: Rehab Correction Creme is a multi-use compound offering a wide range of correction capabilities from strong cut to final finish depending upon paint hardness, pad and tool type, and is exceptional with all types of foam pads from cut to finish. The ease of use and product removal saves time and produces amazing results. The product produces low dust during use and a glossy finish.
specs.pro_tips: Exceptional at working with all types of foam pads (from cut to finish), allowing you to change up your polishing power with the simple swap of your polishing pad.
specs.use_case: Designed for skilled technicians performing paint correction tasks, making correction and finishing easy. Suitable for both single-step and multi-step correction processes.
key_features: Wide range of correction capabilities from strong cut to final finish
Exceptional with all types of foam pads from cut to finish
specs.application_method: Select desired tool and pad combination. Apply a small amount of Rehab to the paint surface or pad and begin the paint correction process. Use light to medium pressure to remove paint imperfections, defects, and sanding marks to produce bright finish.

name: Premium Detergent / 1 Gal
description: Next generation microfiber detergent using new cleaning technology. Absolutely safe for all microfiber types and concentrated for commercial use. Softens, brightens, and restores microfiber towels to like-new condition.

specs.overview: Rags to Riches is the next generation of microfiber detergents using new breakthroughs in cleaning technology. The advanced formula deep cleans and restores cleaning and detailing products. It goes far beyond standard detergents — deep cleaning fibres while restoring the absorbency, softness, and colour that waxes, sealants, and polishes slowly destroy. Modern spray sealants, ceramic coatings, and quick detailers leave behind water-repelling chemistry that clogs microfiber fibres. Rags to Riches is specifically formulated to break down and flush these hydrophobic compounds — restoring true absorption where standard detergents fail.
specs.pro_tips: Never use fabric softener — liquid or any softening additive coats fibres with a waxy residue that permanently reduces absorbency. Do not add it to any microfiber wash, ever. Always wash cotton separately from your microfiber items — cotton sheds lint that embeds permanently into microfiber fibres. Keep cotton and microfiber loads separate at all times.
specs.use_case: Whether you're a professional detailer washing a daily pile of towels or an enthusiast protecting a single show car, Rags to Riches keeps your microfiber performing like new. Ideal for restoring absorbency to microfiber towels used with professional detailing products, sealants, and coatings.
key_features: Next generation of microfiber detergents using new breakthroughs in cleaning technology
Absolutely safe for all microfiber types and concentrated for commercial use
Formulated for use with all residential and commercial washing machines, including HE
Removes hydrophobic contamination from ceramic coatings, sealants and spray detailers
Safe on all textile types including microfiber, cotton, chamois, and other fabric blends
specs.coverage_yield: The 3.78L (1 gallon) size yields around 125 standard washes
specs.dilution_ratio: 1 oz for small/light loads, 2 oz for large loads
specs.application_method: For small or lightly soiled loads use 1 ounce. For large loads use 2 ounces. Pre-soak heavily soiled and/or hydrophobic towels in a bucket of water mixed with 1-2 ounces of Rags to Riches prior to washing. Use warm water (30–40°C is ideal). Select a normal wash cycle. Wash with warm water and dry on a low heat setting or hang to dry.

name: Actifoam Energy
description: High dirt-dissolving cleaner with excellent foam development ("snow foam") for washing vehicles using a foam sprayer.

specs.scent: Energy fragrance (similar to energy drink scent)
specs.overview: Strong dirt-dissolving cleaner with excellent foam development ("snow foam") for washing vehicles using a foam sprayer. Perfectly suitable as shampoo, insect remover and wheel rim cleaner. pH-neutral and can be used on all hard surfaces, including decals and wraps. Won't mar or break down existing car wax or coating and is safe to use on all hard surfaces including tires, rims, and trim.
specs.pro_tips: Always pre-clean the vehicle with a strong water jet first. Do not use on hot surfaces. Do not allow to dry. Immediately use a wash mitt after applying with foam cannon, beginning at roof and top surfaces working down. Do not use on hot surfaces or in direct sunlight.
specs.use_case: Professional and enthusiast car washers using foam sprayers, cannons, or guns who need a high-foaming pre-wash cleaner that works as a shampoo, insect remover, and rim cleaner.
specs.size_volume: Available in 1 L and 5 L sizes
key_features: pH-neutral - safe on wax and coatings
Works on all hard surfaces including decals and wraps
Suitable for foam guns, cannons, and pressure washers
specs.coverage_yield: One bottle can provide up to 50 washes
specs.dilution_ratio: Foam lance: 1:10 to 1:20 (depending on foam type desired); Foam sprayer: 15-25 ml per liter of water; Manual wash: 50-80 ml in 10 liters of warm water
specs.application_method: For foam lance: Dilute 1:10 to 1:20 depending on foam type desired. For foam sprayer: Mix 15 to 25 ml of product per liter of water. For manual wash: Foam 50-80 ml in 10 liters of warm water. Apply foam from bottom to top and rub with wash sponge, then rinse thoroughly with clear water immediately.

name: Bead Maker Paint Protection / 1 Gallon
description: Time-saving spray-on paint protectant using binding polymer monomer technology to produce water beading, brilliant, long-lasting finish. Safe to spray on wet or dry vehicles and all exterior surfaces.

specs.overview: Bead Maker's unique formulation allows for quick spray application. The surface migrating molecule attaches to the paint surface of a vehicle and once attached, this molecule cross-links and polymerizes on the surface to build a hydrophobic durable layer of protection. Includes UV Protection with a combination of a UV filter and UV stabilizers. Cure time is essentially two hours depending upon ambient conditions.
specs.pro_tips: Bead Maker works best on new finish or freshly detailed vehicles. Dry surface application will enhance overall product performance.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and car enthusiasts seeking quick, easy paint protection that creates water beading and brilliant gloss without requiring polishing or waxing techniques.
key_features: Water beading, brilliant, long lasting finish
UV Protection with UV filter and UV stabilizers
Safe to spray all exterior surfaces
Builds hydrophobic durable layer of protection
specs.application_method: Wash vehicle prior to product application. Spray Bead Maker on wet or dry surface (dry surface will enhance product performance). Once applied remove product with microfiber towel, flipping as needed for proper removal. Repeat across entire paint surface and allow product to cure for a minimum of eight hours to achieve maximum performance.

name: Finisher Peroxide Treatment / 1gal
description: Final step in the Double Black Interior Cleaning System that breaks down odor-causing molecules and organic stains, leaving no chemical residue.

specs.overview: Finisher Peroxide Treatment is Step #3 in the Double Black Interior Cleaning System. Finisher completes the system by adding a final attack on odor causing molecules and organic stains. Finisher breaks down odor causing chemicals, eliminates any residual organic stains and slightly sterilizes the surface. Finisher assists in reducing water stains, mold and mildew odors as well as finalized stain removal. Finisher breaks down into oxygen and water, leaving no chemical residue left that requires further removal.
specs.pro_tips: Prior to sanitizing with any cleaner it is always recommended to clean the surface with the Xpress Interior Cleaner. This product is part of the Double Black Interior Cleaning System (Step 1: Terminator, Step 2: Carpet Bomber, Step 3: Finisher).
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and vehicle owners who need to eliminate stubborn odors and organic stains from vehicle interiors as the final step in a comprehensive interior cleaning system.
key_features: Breaks down into oxygen and water
specs.application_method: Spray a light mist of P&S Finisher Peroxide Treatment onto the treated surface after completing steps #1 and #2. Allow to remain wet for 6-8 minutes for optimal effectiveness. If excessive moisture is present, remove the excess by vacuuming.

name: Premium Detergent / 1 Liter
description: Next-generation microfiber detergent with advanced cleaning technology that deep cleans and restores absorbency and color to detailing towels.

specs.overview: Rags to Riches is a concentrated microfiber laundry detergent engineered to deep clean towels and restore absorbency and color lost to product buildup, waxes, sealants, and polishes. The advanced formula removes hydrophobic contamination that causes microfiber to bead water or smear. Safe for all microfiber types and formulated for both residential and commercial washing machines including HE units.
specs.pro_tips: Always wash microfiber separately from cotton and other non-microfiber items to prevent lint transfer. Separate dark and light-colored towels to avoid dye bleeding. Never use fabric softeners as they coat fibers and reduce absorbency permanently. Pre-soak heavily soiled towels and those contaminated with ceramic coatings before washing for best results.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and automotive enthusiasts who need to restore performance to microfiber towels used with polishes, waxes, ceramic coatings, and sealants.
key_features: Removes hydrophobic contamination from spray sealants and coatings
Restores absorbency and softness to microfiber fibers
Safe for all textile types including microfiber, cotton, chamois, and fabric blends
Compatible with residential and commercial washing machines including HE
Highly concentrated formula—only 1-2 ounces per load
specs.coverage_yield: Approximately 30 washes per 946ml bottle at standard dosage (1 oz per small load, 2 oz per large load)
specs.application_method: For small or lightly soiled loads, add 1 ounce to washing machine. For large loads, use 2 ounces. For heavily soiled or hydrophobic towels, pre-soak in a bucket with 1-2 ounces mixed with warm water for 30-60 minutes before washing. Wash with warm water and dry on low heat or hang dry. Do NOT use fabric softeners or bleach.

name: Supreme Suds Wax Shampoo / 16oz
description: High-foaming wax shampoo with emulsified carnauba wax for enhanced shine and protection during regular maintenance washes.

specs.overview: Supreme Suds is a high-foaming car soap engineered with emulsified carnauba wax. It cleans away grease, bugs, oil, and rain film from paint, glass, and chrome surfaces while enhancing paint shine. The formula works effectively with foam cannons or traditional bucket washing methods, making it suitable for both powder-coated and painted wheels.
specs.use_case: Ideal for regular maintenance washing and detailing professionals who want to clean vehicles while adding carnauba wax protection.
key_features: Works with foam cannons and buckets
specs.application_method: Mix with water and apply with foam cannon or wash mitt using the two-bucket method. Rinse thoroughly with clean water.

name: Paint Surface Prep / 1 Gallon
description: Ready-to-use paint surface prep and glass cleaner designed to remove wax, silicone, and contaminants before ceramic coating application.

specs.overview: Paint Coating Surface Prep solution is used as a surface preparation solution to clean paint surfaces prior to application of automotive coatings. The purpose of this product is to cleanse the paint surface of wax, silicone or other contaminants that could potentially hinder the coatings performance. This product was specifically formulated for use with Inspiration as part of the P&S Double Black Renny Doyle Collection.
specs.pro_tips: Take Surface Prep, spray it onto a panel, let dwell for 30 seconds and wipe away with a clean microfiber towel. Apply to the entire vehicle and inspect the paint thoroughly before applying your first coating layer.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers preparing vehicle paint for ceramic coating installation, particularly for use with P&S Inspiration coating systems.
key_features: Prepares paint for ceramic coating adhesion
Part of Renny Doyle Double Black Collection
specs.application_method: Spray apply a heavy coating of solution saturating the paint surface. Allow product to sit for 30 seconds and wipe clean frequently rotating towel to ensure proper product removal. Repeat process over entire vehicle.

name: Dream Maker / 16oz
description: Exterior show spray that amplifies paint gloss on single stage and clear coated surfaces. Developed for the McCall Detailing Team, delivers deep wet gloss for show cars and daily drivers.

specs.overview: Dream Maker is an exterior show spray specifically developed for the McCall Detailing Team during Monterey Car Week. It amplifies the gloss of both single stage and clear coated paint, delivering exceptional shine for show cars and detail-oriented drivers. Safe for use with all existing protection including Bead Maker, Dream Maker will not change the surface tension or attributes of coatings or hydrophobic finishes. Offers extremely short-term protection with approximately one week of longevity, but provides maximum gloss enhancement.
specs.pro_tips: Perfect for the final wipedown before car shows. Dream Maker offers no cleaning capabilities and only short-term protection (approximately one week), so it should be applied as a final step on clean vehicles. Does not affect the water beading or hydrophobic properties of existing coatings or sealants.
specs.use_case: Ideal for car show preparation, photoshoots, and professional detailers who need maximum gloss enhancement. Perfect for freshly detailed vehicles that require the final gloss amplification before competitions or events.
key_features: Amplifies gloss of single stage and clear coated paint
Safe for all existing protection including Bead Maker
Does not change surface tension or beading attributes
Safe on all paint finishes including satin and matte
specs.application_method: Apply to freshly washed vehicle free of major contaminants. For dry paint, mist 1-2 sprays per panel and immediately work in with microfiber towel, flipping as needed to level. Can also be used as a drying aid by applying 1-2 sprays per panel and working in with drying towel.

name: Profiline Perfect Finish / 250ml
description: Perfect Finish was developed for single step polishing of sanded paint defects such as dust inclusions or paint runs. It is rated at an impressive 4 for cut and an impeccable 6 for finish.

specs.overview: Especially developed for 1-stage polishing of sanded paint defects in paint shops. Special extremely fine yet hard abrasives allow good removal of scratches, and produce an optimal gloss without holograms or buffing marks. Silicone-free and does not contain any waxes. Can be used on all paint systems including scratch-resistant clear coats.
specs.pro_tips: Perfect Finish has a thicker consistency and it has the tendency to saturate pads more frequently than other polishes. For the best results be sure to change your pads frequently, 3 to 4 pads per car is a good rule of thumb for absolute maximum results.
specs.use_case: Designed to finish down your paint, removing haze and leaving behind an ultra smooth finish at the microscopic level, which is especially effective on soft and finicky paints that can be challenging to work on.
key_features: Removes marks of up to P2000 grit
Rated 4/6 for cut and 6/6 for finish
Contains very homogeneous aluminum oxide with ultra-fine crystal structure
VOC compliant and body shop safe
specs.application_method: Apply a small amount (3 or 4 Dime-sized drops) of polish onto the SONAX Polishing Pad. Polish the surface at a low rotation speed (800 rpm) for approximately 20-30 seconds, applying 15-20 pounds of pressure. After 30 seconds, remove pressure completely using only machine weight, increase machine speed (1200 RPM) and continue polishing for 45-60 seconds.

name: Profiline Cutmax / 1000ml
description: Highly effective abrasive polish for rotary polishing machines ideal for heavily weathered, scratched or sanded paint layers. Removes scratches and nibs in refinishing paintwork, smooths marks, and removes spray paint mist.

specs.overview: Highly effective abrasive polish for rotary polishing machines, ideal for heavily weathered, scratched or sanded paint layers. Removes scratches and nibs in refinishing paintwork, smooths marks, and removes spray paint mist. Removes sanding marks of P1000 and finer. Low dust thanks to innovative Low Dust Technology. Water-based formula offers a long working window and will not dry out like other compounds. It is also dust-free for easy cleanup after use, and solvent-free & silicone-free makes it safe for use in body shops and collision centers.
specs.pro_tips: The times given refer to an average hard paintwork and a surface to be polished of approx. 50 x 50 cm. Use SONAX PROFILINE Perfect Finish (02243000) for the finishing polish. Regularly clean polishing pads. Never use different polishes on one pad. Do not use on hot surfaces.
specs.use_case: For heavily weathered, scratched or sanded paint layers. Professional paint correction and restoration work on vehicles with severe paint defects.
key_features: Low dust thanks to innovative Low Dust Technology
Removes sanding marks of P1000 and finer
Water-based formula offers a long working window and will not dry out like other compounds
Solvent-free & silicone-free makes it safe for use in body shops and collision centers
specs.application_method: Apply some product to the SONAX Foam Pad hard or the SONAX Lambswool Pad and polish at low speed and increased pressure for approx. 10 sec.; the machine can be slightly tilted for deep scratches. Afterwards, exerting slight pressure, polish with plane pad for 20 seconds. Then, apply new product to the pad and carry out another polishing cycle. Remove polish residue with a SONAX Microfibre Cloth soft touch.

name: True Vue Concentrated Glass Cleaner / 1 gallon
description: Professional-grade concentrated glass cleaner that removes road film, smoke, and dirt from automotive glass with dilution ratios from 4:1 to 10:1.

specs.overview: True Vue Concentrated Glass Cleaner is an excellent and effective water-based glass cleaner designed for professional auto detailing. It removes road film, smoke, and dirt from automotive glass surfaces. The product offers flexible dilution ratios from 4:1 to 10:1 depending on desired performance, making it suitable for both hot and cold weather applications with longer working times in hot weather and faster evaporation for cold climates.
specs.pro_tips: Use the two-towel method for best results. Flip towels regularly to maintain a clean wiping surface. Adjust dilution ratio based on conditions—stronger concentration for heavier contamination, lighter for routine maintenance.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and automotive enthusiasts who need a versatile glass cleaner for automotive windows, mirrors, and glass surfaces. Perfect for service facilities and detailing shops that require customizable dilution for various conditions.
key_features: Removes road film, smoke, and dirt
Performs in hot and cold weather
Longer working time in hot weather
specs.application_method: Dilute product accordingly through ChemTrol fill station or by hand. Spray properly diluted True Vue to glass surface. Use two towel method for wiping glass, flipping towels regularly to maintain clean towel surface.

name: Graphene wax / 16oz
description: Graphene and ceramic wax is a formula that is designed to enhance, protect, and provide durability to a vehicle's surface. It gives water repelling properties, adds gloss, and has hydrophobic elements.

specs.overview: Graphene and ceramic wax is a formula designed to enhance, protect, and provide durability to a vehicle's surface while preventing oxidation, scratches, and contaminants from settling. Graphene is a game-changing, carbon-based molecule that can effectively bind to and fortify surfaces when functionalized, demonstrating improved contact angle, gloss, scratch resistance, UV resistance and a reduction in water spotting.
specs.use_case: This wax offers high levels of UV protection and prevents oxidation, scratches, and other contaminants from settling on the surface of your car. Ideal for car enthusiasts and professional detailers seeking long-lasting paint protection.
key_features: Water repelling properties and hydrophobic elements
specs.coverage_yield: Provides protection for up to 1 year and over 12 washes
specs.application_method: Apply a few drops of the wax to an applicator pad and use crosshatch motions (up and down and side to side) to get an even application across the surface. Ensure the vehicle is washed and dry prior to application.

name: 3/8 Female Quick Connect
description: A 3/8" female quick connect coupler for pressure washers that enables fast, tool-free connections and disconnections between hoses and pressure washing attachments.

specs.overview: The 3/8" female quick connect coupler allows you to quickly disconnect hose lines, spray guns, foam cannons, lances, and other pressure washing attachments without tools. Available in both stainless steel and brass construction, these fittings feature NPT (National Pipe Thread) connections and are designed for high-pressure applications up to 4,000-5,000 PSI depending on material.
specs.pro_tips: Stainless steel couplers resist corrosion better than brass for long-term durability. Always fully insert the plug and pull the collar completely forward when connecting. Avoid hand-loosening connections under pressure.
specs.use_case: For pressure washer operators and auto detailers who need to quickly swap between different spray guns, nozzles, foam cannons, and hoses without stopping to hand-tighten threaded connections.
key_features: Available in brass or stainless steel
Stainless steel offers superior corrosion resistance
specs.coverage_yield: 50+ uses with proper care

Specific holes for brush storage (14mm and 18mm)
specs.coverage_yield: Durable construction for extended professional use

specs.pro_tips: For AC flush: Set AC to maximum with recirculate on, spray under glove compartment and above pedals. Repeat weekly for smokers or after pets have been in vehicle.

name: Maxshine Bucket/ Red
description: Professional-grade 3.5 gallon transparent red detailing bucket designed for scratch-free car washing and tool organization.

specs.overview: The Maxshine 3.5 Gallon Universal Detailing Bucket in transparent red is built from durable, heavy-duty materials for professional car washing. The bucket serves dual purposes as both a washing vessel and garage storage organizer for detailing tools.
specs.pro_tips: Professionals recommend the two-bucket system to guard against wash-induced swirls. Fill one bucket with soapy water and fill the second bucket with clean water. Each time you need to reload your wash mitt, rinse it in the clean water first. Then reload the mitt in the soapy water. This extra step will keep the wash water clean and reduce the amount of dirt you transfer back to the paint.
specs.use_case: Professional detailers and car enthusiasts who want to prevent wash-induced swirls and maintain organized detailing workflows. Essential for implementing the two-bucket wash system.
key_features: Dual function as wash bucket and tool organizer
specs.application_method: Use in two-bucket system: fill one with soapy water and one with clean rinse water. Rinse wash mitt in clean water before reloading with soap.

Resistant against ice and frost in cold climates
Invisible and completely undetectable when applied
